description:
We build mobile apps used by real customers, not test projects sitting in a repo.

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

- Contributing to a React front-end migration (from Flutter)

TECH STACK

- Flutter (primary)

- React (important)

- C# / .NET APIs

- SQL Server

- Git + DevOps



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

THE ROLE

- Full-time

- Direct hire only (no agencies)



HOW TO APPLY

title: Creative Video Editor  – Daily YouTube Videos (Think for Yourself)
description:
Pay: $300/month (1 video per day, 7–9 minutes) 

Paid $75/week.



---



Read this carefully before applying.



I am NOT looking for someone who just follows instructions.



I’m looking for a creative video editor who can think, make decisions, and take ownership of the final video.



---



What You’ll Do (Daily):



You will turn a script + voiceover into a complete YouTube video.



I will provide:

- Script (with structure + suggestions)

- Voiceover audio

- Some B-roll clips (when available)

- A reference video (the exact style to match)



You are responsible for:

- Building the video from scratch (not re-editing)

- Choosing the best visuals for each 
nt

- Generating additional B-roll when needed (Grok, stock, screen recordings, etc.)

- Adding A-roll clips (HeyGen or provided)

- Syncing visuals to audio

- Adding captions, motion, zooms, overlays (CapCut)

- Making the video engaging and easy to watch



If something is missing visually, you solve it.



---



Creative Responsibility (Important):



If the script says:

“people can’t recognize faces”



I expect you to think:

? show a face  

? show confusion  

? make it visual  



Not:

? drop a random clip



---



Style We Want:



- Fast-paced and engaging  

- Clean but dynamic  

- Educational + emotional  

- You will be given an exact reference video to match  



---



Requirements:



- Strong CapCut skills (Pro preferred) or tell me what editing software you use and prefer.

- Ability to think and make creative decisions without being told every step

- Reliable DAILY turnaround (non-negotiable)

- Good internet for uploading/downloading assets

- Fluent in English



---



What Success Looks Like:



You take:

- a script  

- a voiceover  

- basic assets  



…and turn it into a complete, polished video people actually want to watch.



You are responsible for the final result.



---



Application Process (Paid Test Only):



No portfolio needed.



To apply, you will complete a paid test task.



You will:

- Receive a script + voiceover + reference video

- Create a short sample video



You will be paid $7 USD for this test.



I will choose the best editor based on:

- creativity

- pacing

- visual choices

- overall feel



---



To Apply:



Send a message and confirm:

- You can complete the paid test

- You can deliver 1 video per day



Start your message with: “I THINK”



(If you don’t include this, I will not respond.)



---



Looking for someone long-term who wants consistent monthly income and can grow with me.

title: Paid Traffic Operator
description:
Company Overview:

We're a US-based digital media agency experiencing rapid growth. We manage content and marketing campaigns for creators across various platforms. Our team works fully remote, spanning multiple time zones.



The Role:

We're hiring a Paid Traffic Operator to handle the hands-on execution of our paid advertising campaigns. This is an operational role—our internal traffic management system guides campaign decisions, and your responsibility is to execute workflows precisely, launch campaigns according to specifications, track performance, and report consistently.



You don't need to be a media buying strategist. You need to be dependable, process-oriented, and a clear communicator.



What You'll Do:

- Launch paid campaigns across multiple ad networks using detailed SOPs

- Check campaign performance daily through our internal dashboard

- Make manual adjustments in ad platforms—budgets, creatives, targeting—as instructed

- Flag performance issues that fall outside defined thresholds for management to review

- Deliver a brief daily async update covering spend, results, and any concerns

- Maintain accurate, current campaign data across all platforms



What We're Looking For:

- Meticulous attention to detail—you follow processes exactly, without shortcuts

- Dependable and consistent—daily reporting and punctuality are essential

- Basic experience with at least one ad platform (Meta Ads, Google Ads, or similar)

- Self-sufficient in a remote, async work environment

- Strong written English—clear, concise communication is central to this role

- Open to feedback—you ask questions early instead of guessing



Bonus Points:

- Experience with push, pop, or display traffic networks

- Background in a digital agency or media buying team

- Familiarity with CPM or CPC buying across multiple networks



How to Apply

Send your resume along with a short paragraph about the ad platform or traffic network you know best and what your responsibilities were. Applications missing this will not be considered.

title: Remote Appointment Setter – US Life Insurance (Full-Time, WFH)
description:
About the company

We are Florida-based life insurance agency focused on final expense and life insurance sales. We protect American families with quality coverage solutions, and we're expanding our remote support team in the Philippines.



What you'll do

You will be the front line of our sales operation — calling fresh and aged final expense leads through a dialer to qualify prospects and schedule appointments for our licensed US-based agents. This is a high-volume, script-driven role. You will NOT be selling insurance; your job is strictly appointment setting and lead qualification.



Day-to-day responsibilities

Make outbound calls using a provided dialer system and approved scripts

Double-dial new leads immediately — target speed-to-lead under 5 minutes

Qualify leads and schedule appointments directly into agent calendars

Handle inbound calls, collect client info, and route to licensed US agents

Confirm and reconfirm appointments via call, SMS, or

Follow up on no-shows and re-engage cold leads

Update CRM in real time — log all calls, status changes, and notes accurately

Strictly follow all approved scripts and compliance guidelines



Requirements

2–3 years of experience as an appointment setter (required)

Prior experience in US life insurance or final expense industry (strongly preferred)

Excellent spoken English — neutral accent, warm and confident phone presence

Comfortable calling American seniors over the phone

Proven track record in a quota-based, sales-driven environment

Skilled in using sales tonality and vocal inflection while reading from a script

Experience with dialer systems such as GoHighLevel, Mojo, or PhoneBurner

Proficient with CRM tools and accurate data entry

Quiet, distraction-free home workspace with reliable high-speed internet



Performance metrics

Speed to lead — target under 5 minutes for new leads

Daily and weekly call volume

Appointment set rate and show rate



Lead contact rate

CRM accuracy and completeness

Script and compliance adherence

title: Amazon PPC & Marketplace Manager
description:
Company Overview

A fast-growing, bold CPG food brand in the grilling and seasoning space, selling direct-to-consumer across Amazon and other online marketplaces. The brand has strong traction, high unit velocity, and loyal customers, with a clear focus for 2026: increase profitability, optimize ad spend, and scale revenue responsibly without leaking margin.



Role Overview

We are hiring an experienced Amazon PPC & Marketplace Manager to take full ownership of Amazon performance, including advertising, listing optimization, catalog accuracy, and marketplace management.

This is not an entry-level Amazon VA role.

We need someone who:

Understands ROAS and profitability deeply

Knows how to use Helium 10 properly

Can optimize listings for keywords and conversion

Can manage PPC strategically, not emotionally

Notices errors before the owner does

The primary focus is Amazon. Secondary platforms include Walmart, Shopify, TikTok Shop, and other DTC marketplaces.

Initial scope is part-time with room to grow into expanded hours as profitability improves.

Work Hours: US CST overlap required.





Core Responsibilities



1. Amazon PPC Management (Primary Focus)

Audit existing Amazon ad structure

Identify and eliminate unprofitable campaigns

Optimize for profitable ROAS, not vanity metrics

Manage keyword targeting, bid adjustments, and budget allocation

Monitor impression share, ACOS, TACOS, and overall ad efficiency

Use Helium 10 for:

Keyword research

Listing optimization

Market tracking

Competitive analysis

Provide clear reporting on performance and profitability

Goal: Improve profitability while maintaining or growing revenue.



2. Listing Optimization & Catalog Management

Ensure all listings are:

Uniform in branding and naming conventions

Keyword-optimized

Conversion-focused

Maintain correct:

Product titles

Variations

Quantities

Bundles

Packaging information

Ensure consistency across all SKUs

Update enhanced A+ content as needed

Prevent duplicate naming inconsistencies (e.g. brand variations, formatting errors)

Implement updates via individual edits or flat files when appropriate

Attention to detail is critical.



3. Marketplace Expansion & Management

Oversee product listings and updates across:

Amazon (primary)

Walmart

Shopify

TikTok Shop

Shopify Collective

Additional DTC channels as needed

Responsibilities include:

Listing updates

Pricing corrections

Bundle accuracy

Manual order entry when required

Monitoring for inconsistencies or suppressed listings

If you can manage Amazon well, the rest should feel manageable.



4. Inventory & Replenishment Monitoring

Pull Amazon replenishment reports

Monitor FBA stock levels

Flag restock needs bi-weekly or monthly

Identify inventory discrepancies

Assist with FBA shipment tracking

Coordinate with team on inbound shipment discrepancies



5. Customer Service (Light Volume)

Handle Amazon customer messages daily

Manage low-volume customer service tasks

Escalate issues appropriately

Maintain high response standards



6. Basic Creative Support (Nice to Have)

Use Canva for simple visual edits

Support basic ad creative updates

Collaborate with graphic designer when needed

Advanced graphic skills are not required, but comfort with Canva and AI tools is helpful.



Required Skills & Experience

2+ years managing Amazon Seller Central

Strong Amazon PPC experience

Deep familiarity with Helium 10

Strong keyword research and listing optimization skills

Strong spreadsheet skills

Understanding of profitability and contribution margin

Clear communicator

Detail-oriented

Proactive problem-solver

title: Curative Title Researcher
description:
???? Job Title: Curative Title Researcher

Position Type: Remote – Part-Time (20-25 hours)

Schedule: Flexible hours; deliverables-based

Compensation: $5/hour + $75 bonus per deal



???? About the Role

We’re a small but growing real estate investment company that specializes in acquiring off-market properties — often those with title issues due to tax liens, probate complications, or missing heirs. We’re seeking a dedicated, detail-obsessed Curative Title Researcher to help us uncover and resolve ownership challenges behind the scenes.

If you love deep-diving into public records, solving puzzles, and working independently, this could be the perfect long-term fit for you.



???? Key Responsibilities

Conduct detailed research into county records, probate filings, obituaries, tax records, and court documents to identify rightful property owners or heirs.





Analyze title reports, deeds, affidavits, and public databases to identify title defects and chain-of-title gaps.





Perform skip tracing to locate hard-to-find individuals using online tools, voter registration records, people search engines, and social media. 





Verify contact information for property owners, heirs, attorneys, and representatives, and compile the data into clear, organized reports.





Collaborate with our acquisitions team, title companies, and attorneys to support title curative strategies.





Maintain confidentiality and ensure data accuracy and compliance with privacy protocols.







? Qualifications

Experience in surplus funds, title research, genealogy research, skip tracing, legal investigations, or real estate data (2+ years required)





Strong ability to interpret legal and property documents: deeds, wills, probate documents, notices, liens, etc.





Familiarity with county clerk portals, tax collector sites, county appraisal district sites, online title search tools, and skip-tracing software





Exceptional attention to detail and high standards for accuracy





Strong analytical, investigative, and documentation skills





Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision





Tech-savvy: proficient with spreadsheets, document organization, and web-based research







???? You’re a Great Fit If You

Love solving complex puzzles through research





Work methodically, stay organized, and never leave a stone unturned.





Enjoy deep, independent work with minimal interruption.





Have excellent follow-through and take pride in accurate results.





Are process-driven and able to replicate your research steps.





???? How to Apply



Please
 your resume or brief description of your background to 
 the subject line below. 



Subject: Curative Title Research Application.

title: Admin & Communications VA
description:
Company Overview

A U.S.-based commercial real estate brokerage and education-focused business with strong brand recognition and national reach. The company leverages thought leadership, high-profile deals, and industry education to drive visibility, listings, and broker recruitment.

About the Role

You will be the right hand to a high-profile U.S.-based commercial real estate broker and educator. He runs a fast-moving operation — deals, content, a large network, and a database of contacts that needs to be organized and activated.

This is not a task-taker role. The person who will thrive here is someone who sees what needs to be done before being asked, communicates with precision, and holds themselves to a professional standard that reflects well on a very visible principal.

Real estate knowledge is not required. Professionalism, initiative, and sharp written communication absolutely are.



Core Responsibilities

 & Inbox Management

Monitor and triage inbound
s daily — prioritizing deal inquiries, client messages, and time-sensitive items

Categorize and flag items clearly: what requires immediate action, what needs follow-up, what is FYI

Respond to inquiry
s promptly using established templates — same shift when possible, next morning at latest

Check all folders including filtered/secondary inboxes to ensure nothing is missed

Log promising leads and property inquiries into a spreadsheet or CRM



Client & Contact Communications

Draft and send correspondence on behalf of the principal — scheduling, confirmations, follow-ups

Maintain a professional tone that reflects the principal's voice accurately

Proofread all outgoing communications before sending — no exceptions

Track open threads and outstanding responses so nothing falls through



CRM & Database Management

Audit and clean up the existing contact database — organize, deduplicate, and categorize contacts

Build and maintain systems for outreach tracking and follow-up

Surface high-value contacts and flag opportunities for re-engagement

Come with ideas: if you see a better way to organize something, say so



Document & Contract Support

Assist with light contract data entry and document formatting

Ensure all documents are proofread, properly formatted, and saved to OneDrive immediately upon completion

Flag any inconsistencies or potential errors before documents go out



LinkedIn Engagement (Strong Plus)

Manage daily LinkedIn activity on the principal's behalf: thoughtful comments, replies to messages, maintaining active conversations

Post content including deal announcements, industry updates, and brand-aligned posts following his voice

Flag qualified leads and engagement opportunities for direct follow-up



End of Day Reporting

Submit a clear, specific end-of-day summary: tasks completed, items actioned, anything pending and why

Reports should be concrete — not vague. "Responded to 3 inquiries, filed leads in CRM, formatted contract for XYZ property" not "handled
s"



What We Are Looking For

Non-Negotiable

Exceptional written English — not just grammatically correct, but structurally clear and professionally polished

Obsessive attention to detail — you proofread before hitting send, every time, without being reminded

Proactive communication — you acknowledge issues the same day, you flag problems early, you do not go quiet

Reliable file management — everything goes to OneDrive immediately. No local saves.

Response discipline — inquiries and forwarded
s are acted on same shift or first thing next morning



Strong Plus

CRM experience — HubSpot, Pipedrive, or similar; bonus if you have done cleanup and build-out work

LinkedIn management experience

Prior EA or executive support background

Commercial real estate familiarity (helpful context, not a filter)

Canva for brochures and property materials

title: Bricks & Bytes - Sales & Operations Manager
description:
If you want to help lead the commercial engine at the most exciting media brand in AEC (Architecture, Engineering & Construction) technology, read on.



What started as a small podcast interviewing tech operators has gotten a little out of hand. Now, we produce videos that hit hundreds of thousands of views, podcasts that shape industry narrative, and content that bleeds influence across the built world.



We're building the biggest media platform that exists in this space — and we're looking for someone who wants to help us monetise every inch of it.



---



## 7 Reasons This Role Is For You



1. You want to grow into, and become, a renowned commercial force within the evolving media landscape

2. You are hungry to sell products and partnerships that shape the minds of our industry

3. You think intuitively, act decisively, and don't need supervision to perform

4. You obsess over both your own performance and the company's growth

5. You're detail-orientated because you know tiny optimisations in a sales pipeline can compound into massive results

6. You nerd out over revenue metrics and work hard to identify which levers move the needle

7. You meticulously study the AEC and media landscape so that we are always one step ahead of our competition



## 6 Reasons This Role Is Not For You



1. You are happy working at a steady 9-5. Nothing about what we do is steady and we have not worked 9-5 since day one. That means maximum flexibility and high expectation on results

2. You don't understand that a media business must make money to exist

3. You are comfortable with your own skill set — we expect continuous self and skill refinement and improvement

4. You can't switch context fast — one hour we're pitching a sponsor, next we're coordinating Fight Night logistics

5. You use LLMs for more than 10% of your work

6. You're sensitive to feedback. We debate hard and move quick. Candid feedback is our love language



## The Bottom Line



We don't care how many hours you work, we care how much you move the needle. We're not here to "sell ads." We're here to own the narrative in AEC tech and build a commercial machine that funds the mission. We prize A-players — people who are sharp, self-accountable, curious, and relentless.



---



## The Role



This is a sales-first role (75% commercial, 25% operations). Your job is simple: sell Bricks & Bytes products to the construction technology ecosystem and make sure the operational side of what you sell runs smoothly.



You'll report directly to the CEO, who handles strategic relationships and high-level closes. Your job is to fill the pipeline, run outreach, pitch, negotiate, and close deals independently — then make sure delivery is seamless.



---



## What You're Selling



You'll be responsible for driving revenue across the full BB product suite:



- **Sponsorships** — podcast ads, newsletter placements, social media shoutouts, blog banners. Packages range from $2,500–$7,500+/quarter. Our sponsor inventory isn't full — your job is to fill it and expand it

- **Event sponsorships & tickets** — London executive dinners, happy hours, the September robotics event, virtual summits. Sell headline and tier sponsorships, fill seats with the right people

- **Fight Night (AEC UFC)** — our debate-format live show. $3,000+ in sponsorship per session. You own this end to end: sell the sponsors, book the guests, run the logistics, hand off content to the editorial team. Target: 1 per month

- **Event live streams** — we get paid to produce live interview content at industry conferences (Paris, Boston, etc.). Sell the sponsorship packages around these streams

- **Branded video productions** — companies like Bedrock Robotics pay us to produce documentary-style content with them. You'll prospect and pitch these opportunities

- **BB Radar product demos** — companies pay to be listed and featured on our ConTech directory. You'll sell demo slots and listing packages



---



## What You'll Do — Sales (75%)



### Pipeline & Outreach



- Build and maintain a prospect list of potential sponsors, advertisers, and partners across the ConTech ecosystem

- Run outbound outreach campaigns — cold
, LinkedIn, warm intros — to sell all BB products

- Target legacy software providers, construction tech startups, SaaS platforms, recruiters, legal firms, and service providers who want access to our audience

- Qualify inbound leads and sponsor enquiries



### Pitch & Close



- Pitch sponsorship packages, event sponsorships, Fight Night deals, and branded video opportunities independently

- Negotiate pricing and terms within agreed frameworks

- Close deals up to an agreed threshold — escalate larger or strategic deals to the CEO

- Prepare proposals, one-pagers, and sponsor collateral as needed



### Account Management



- Own the sponsor register — every active deal, renewal date, open inventory slot, and pricing tier

- Flag renewals 30 days out and proactively upsell or renew

- Maintain sponsor relationships post-sale — make sure they're happy, check in regularly, identify opportunities to expand the relationship

- Report on revenue pipeline weekly: what's sold, what's pending, what's expiring



---



## What You'll Do — Operations (25%)



### Fight Night



- Own the full Fight Night production cycle: guest booking, scheduling, run-of-show, sponsor delivery, post-event wrap-up

- Target: monthly cadence, self-funding through sponsorship revenue you generate



### Sponsor Delivery



- Coordinate with the content team (Head of Content, video editor, scheduling) to make sure sponsor placements go live correctly and on time

- Track deliverables against what was sold — make sure sponsors get what they paid for



### Team Support



- Act as the connective tissue between the CEO, editorial, and operations teams on anything commercial

- Keep Notion, sponsor trackers, and pipeline docs up to date

- Support event logistics where needed — guest confirmations, venue comms, post-event follow-ups



---



## Who You Are



- **You can sell.** Not in theory — you've actually sold something before. Sponsorships, ad space, SaaS, services, whatever. You know how to write a cold
 that gets a reply and how to move a conversation to a close

- **You're organised.** You'll be managing dozens of sponsor relationships, renewal dates, outreach threads, and event timelines simultaneously. Nothing slips

- **You're a self-starter.** You don't wait to be told what to sell or who to
. You find the opportunities and go after them

- **You write well in English.** Your outreach
s sound like a real person, not a template. Your proposals are clean and professional

- **You're comfortable with tools.** Notion, Google Workspace, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, basic CRM or spreadsheet tracking — you pick things up fast

- **You're intermediate level.** You've got 3–5+ years of experience in sales, business development, account management, or a commercial role. You're past the "I need to be told what to do" stage but you're hungry to grow



---



## Bonus Points



- Experience in media, events, or sponsorship sales

- Familiarity with the construction, property, or AEC technology space

- You've used AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to speed up research, outreach, and prospecting

- Experience with Beehiiv, Buffer, podcast platforms, or creator economy tools



---



## What We Offer



- Full-time remote role with flexible hours (some UK timezone overlap needed)

- $2,000–$2,500/month base with commission/bonus on revenue you generate

- Direct line to the CEO — no layers, no bureaucracy

- The chance to build the commercial engine of the fastest-growing media brand in construction technology

- Clear growth path into a Head of Commercial or Revenue Lead role as we scale



---



## How to Apply



Send a short
 with:



1. Your LinkedIn profile

2. A brief note on what you've sold before and how you did it

3. One example of a cold outreach
 you'd send to a construction tech company to sell a $3,000 Fight Night sponsorship



No essays. We want to see if you can sell.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
Who We Are:

At Juris Digital, we help law firms achieve sustainable growth through organic and paid search marketing is not just what Juris Digital delivers — it’s what drives our SEOs daily. Our team is smart and intelligent and knows what it takes to drive real revenue growth, and cares about the bottom-line outcomes. We’re competitive and collaborative, like to have fun, and love adding new tea
mbers. If you are seeking a dynamic workplace and new challenges, we want to hear from you!



Who we’re looking for:

The SEO Specialist is a contractor-only position. You will ensure and implement digital marketing and SEO tasks such as content publishing, keyword research, onsite and offsite SEO, link building, content promotion and outreach, and copywriting. The SEO Specialist is also responsible for helping prepare monthly client reports.



Your day-to-day will be spent conducting data-driven keyword research, support with essential SEO and client management tasks. You’ll have confidence in your SEO knowledge and how to communicate it with your team, and you’ll grow and learn together with your team, holding yourself accountable.



What you will do:

- Publishing and optimizing new content in WordPress.

- Business listing management

- Google Business Profile, Bing Places, and Apple Places management

- Copywriting for non-legal content

- Link-building outreach (scholarships, community initiatives)

- Data wrangling and analysis for advanced content and SEO recommendations

- Responsible for making sure clients stay within budget. Although this will be everyone’s job.



How you’ll do it:

Embody Juris Digital’s core values: Excellence, Fun, Creativity, Empathy, Transparency and Relationships

- Curiosity: Ask really good questions of clients that drive creative solutions. You are compelled by the desire to learn more, ask more, and find new solutions for your partners that haven’t been previously thought of.

- Work Ethic: Come to work to achieve. Use your time wisely to create opportunities, and understand that success results from hard work and diligence.

- Intelligence: You can quickly learn and retain new information, processes, and abilities.

- Coachability: Seek out and implement coaching on personal performance in order to improve. React calmly to criticism and are open to new ideas and changes in the process.

- Self-motivation / Drive: You are driven to exceed minimum standards by your personal “why.”

- Resilience and Perseverance: This isn’t your first rodeo. You weather your roles’ inevitable ups and downs with grace, professionalism, grit, and determination.



Our ideal candidate will be or have:

- 3+ years of SEO experience

- Proven track record of driving client success in a digital marketing environment.

- Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

- On-Page SEO

- Technical Crawls/Updates

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills – able to simplify complex topics in a friendly and approachable manner

- Please put a * next to your name when applying.

- You have significant knowledge in / experience with

*WordPress 

*Google Analytics 

*Clickup

*Callrail

*SEO competitor research tools (Ahrefs, ScreamingFrog, etc.)

- General knowledge of software applications i.e., Clickup, Google Apps, etc.

- Your unique strengths – if you don’t match everything we’re looking for, tell us why you’d be a great fit.

- Must possess strong English-speaking skills.

- Must be available to work 9 AM – 5 PM Mountain Time (MT)

title: WordPress Content Transfer Specialist
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically skilled WordPress Content Transfer Specialist to assist in migrating, formatting, and organizing website content into WordPress. This role requires strong familiarity with WordPress CMS, page builders (e.g., Gutenberg, Elementor, WPBakery), and a sharp eye for accuracy and consistency across digital content.

You will play a key role in ensuring the integrity and presentation of content during the transition from legacy systems, staging sites, or external sources into a live WordPress environment.



**Key Responsibilities**

- Transfer and format existing content (text, images, videos, metadata) into WordPress pages and posts.

- Maintain consistent layout, styling, and structure during content migration using theme settings or page builders.

- Set up proper categories, tags, featured images, permalinks, and SEO metadata.

- Ensure all internal links, media, and downloadable files are properly linked and functional.

- Identify and resolve content formatting or styling issues post-migration.

- Use plugins like ACF, Carbon Fields, or custom post types where needed to place content properly.



**Required Skills & Qualifications**

- Proven experience working with WordPress, including Gutenberg and popular page builders.

- Strong attention to detail, especially with formatting, design consistency, and content structure.

- Basic understanding of HTML and CSS for troubleshooting content formatting issues.

- Familiarity with SEO best practices in content formatting and metadata setup.

- Experience working with media libraries and optimizing images for web use.

- Ability to follow structured processes and naming conventions.

- Excellent time management and organizational skills.

- Strong written and verbal communication.

- Must be available to work 9 AM – 5 PM Mountain Time (MT)



**Preferred Qualifications**

- Experience with content migration tools or plugins.

- Familiarity with WPML, Polylang, or multilingual content management.

- Understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG) and mobile-first formatting.

- Knowledge of custom fields (ACF, Carbon Fields) and custom post types.

- To confirm you've read the full job post, please put an asterisk (*) next to your name when applying.



**How to Apply**

Please submit your resume and briefly highlight your hands-on experience with WordPress content management, including any work using page builders like Elementor, Gutenberg, or WPBakery.

Be sure to mention your familiarity with formatting standards, SEO metadata, and content migration tools or plugins if applicable.

title: Google Ads - Tracking Implementation Specialist
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically proficient Tracking Implementation Specialist to support our paid media efforts by ensuring precise and comprehensive conversion tracking. This role requires deep knowledge of Google Tag Manager (GTM), Google Ads conversion tracking, and CallRail integration. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience configuring form submission and phone call goals for PPC campaigns and will be crucial in aligning tracking infrastructure with campaign objectives.



**Key Responsibilities**

Tag Management and Configuration

- Set up, audit, and manage tags, triggers, and variables in Google Tag Manager (GTM)

- Implement conversion tracking for form submissions and phone calls through GTM

- Collaborate with developers or use GTM tools (e.g., data layer) to ensure accurate firing of tags



Google Ads Conversion Tracking

- Configure and verify Google Ads goals for both lead forms and phone calls

- Ensure goals are properly attributed and feeding into Google Ads reporting for optimization

- Regularly test and troubleshoot conversion tags to maintain data accuracy



Call Tracking Integration

- Fully set up and integrate CallRail with Google Ads and GTM

- Ensure dynamic number insertion (DNI) is functioning correctly across ad campaigns

- Track and report on call conversion events in both Google Ads and Google Analytics



Audit & Quality Control

- Perform ongoing audits of tracking setups across accounts to ensure reliability

- Identify discrepancies or tracking failures and resolve them promptly

- Maintain detailed documentation of tracking implementations and changes



Collaboration

- Work with PPC strategists and campaign managers to align tracking goals with KPIs

- Communicate technical tracking concepts in a way that is understandable to non-technical tea
mbers and clients



**Qualifications**

- 2–4+ years of experience in digital marketing or technical implementation roles

- Proven experience setting up Google Ads goals (calls and form submissions)

- Strong proficiency with Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, and Google Analytics

- Experience with CallRail implementation and tracking setup

- Ability to read and work with basic HTML and JavaScript is a plus

- Familiarity with using browser dev tools and tag debugging tools (e.g., Tag Assistant, GTM preview)

- Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail

- Strong communication skills and ability to manage multiple tracking tasks across projects

- Must be available to work 9 AM – 5 PM Mountain Time (MT)

- To confirm you've read the full job post, please put an asterisk (*) next to your name when applying.



**How to Apply**

Please submit your resume and highlight any hands-on experience you have with GTM, Google Ads tracking, and CallRail integration.

As an Onboarding Specialist, you will play a critical role in setting up new clients on various software platforms, creating automations, and ensuring a seamless onboarding process. Your work will lay the foundation for our team to effectively manage and optimize client accounts.

How you’ll do it:

Curiosity – Ask really good questions of clients that drive creative solutions. You are compelled by the desire to learn more, ask more, and find new solutions for your partners that haven’t been previously thought of.

Work Ethic – Come to work to achieve. Use your time wisely to create opportunities, and understand that success results from hard work and diligence.

Intelligence – You can quickly learn and retain new information, processes, and abilities.

Coachability – Seek out and implement coaching on personal performance in order to improve. React calmly to criticism and are open to new ideas and changes in the process.

Self-motivation / Drive – You are driven to exceed minimum standards by your personal “why.”

Resilience and Perseverance – This isn’t your first rodeo. You weather your roles’ inevitable ups and downs with grace, professionalism, grit, and determination.



Our ideal candidate will be or have:

- Proficiency with Google Suite and social media platforms.

- Familiarity with the software listed above is essential; specific knowledge of Agency Analytics, BrightLocal, and Local Falcon is a plus.

- Please put a * next to your name when applying to ensure you read this whole post.

- Excellent communication skills, capable of simplifying complex topics for clients.

- A proactive approach to problem-solving and client engagement.

- Willing to work during US Mountain Time hours.

title: Commercial Real Estate Appraisal Analyst
description:
**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link:





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Location: Remote (US hours)    



Type: Full-Time



Hours: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday



Salary: PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 (PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for MAI candidacy or proven US CRE track record)



 



About Pahroo



Pahroo Appraisal and Consultancy delivers commercial real estate valuations and advisory services across US markets, with a focus on assets underlying debt and equity investments. We work across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, and retail. The team is small, the work is rigorous, and the standards are high.



Working Hours — Please Read Before Applying

This role operates on US Central Standard Time: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday. If you are based outside the US, please confirm this works for your circumstances before applying. It is a firm requirement.



The Role



You will sit within the valuation team, producing and supporting appraisal reports across a mixed commercial portfolio. The work is analytical, deadline-driven, and detail-critical. Once onboarded, you will be expected to work with a real degree of independence, drawing on sound US market knowledge to produce defensible value conclusions.



This is not an entry-level position. We need someone who understands why a number is what it is, not just how to arrive at it.



What You Will Do



 - Conduct research using industry databases — CoStar, REIS, RCA, PwC Real Estate Investor Survey, and broker market reports — to gather and interrogate comparable market evidence

 - Analyse property-level financial data including income statements, rent rolls, reimbursement schedules, and occupancy statistics to develop well-supported value indicators

 - Prepare collateral monitoring reports for assets underlying debt and equity investments across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, retail, and other property types

 - Produce USPAP-compliant appraisal reports ready for lender, investor, or regulatory review

 - Identify data gaps and market anomalies; flag assumptions that materially affect value conclusions

 - Manage competing report deadlines accurately without compromising on quality

 



What We Need



Required



 - Minimum 5 years of commercial real estate appraisal or valuation experience

 - Demonstrated, hands-on experience in the US property market — no learning curve on market fundamentals

 - Proficiency in ANOW, Total, and Excel-based valuation modelling

 - Working knowledge of USPAP requirements and their practical application in report preparation

 - Bachelor’s degree in Real Estate, Finance, Economics, or a closely related field

 - Strong written English — reports require clear, accurate, and defensible reasoning

 



Advantageous



 - MAI designation (Appraisal Institute) or active candidacy

 - RICS membership — relevant for internationally-based candidates with demonstrable US market exposure

 - Familiarity with CoStar, REIS, or RCA analytics platforms

 - Experience across two or more distinct asset classes

 



What We Offer



 - Base salary PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 per month

 - PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for candidates with MAI candidacy or a demonstrable US CRE track record across multiple asset classes — we pay up for the right experience

 - Fully remote position

 - Clear onboarding with defined expectations from day one



**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link: 





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

About the role



We’re hiring a Brand Outreach & CRM Specialist to help manage outbound brand outreach for MrYouWho, a YouTube-led creator media business.



This role is focused on creator-side outreach. You will help us research relevant brands, send outreach
s, run follow-ups, keep the CRM organised, and make sure warm leads do not get lost.



This is not just passive admin, but it is also not a pure “closer” role. We are looking for someone strong on outreach, follow-up, organisation, and pipeline management who can help move opportunities forward consistently.



What you’ll be doing



Research and add relevant brand leads across tech, audio, lifestyle, Amazon, and creator-fit categories. Send outbound
s using our templates with smart personalisation. Run follow-ups so warm leads do not go cold. Keep the CRM up to date with stages, reminders, notes, and lead status. Help manage replies and keep conversations moving toward next steps. Track opportunities across YouTube, Shorts, social, Amazon, and broader campaigns. Provide a simple weekly report covering outreach sent, replies, positive responses, and pipeline progress.



What we need



Real experience with outreach, follow-ups, and pipeline management. Strong written English. Good organisational skills and attention to detail. Confidence using spreadsheets or CRM tools to track leads and follow-ups. Comfortable working in a structured outreach process and moving opportunities forward.



Strongly preferred



Experience with influencer, creator, media, or brand outreach. Experience with CRM tools such as Zoho, HubSpot, ClickUp, Trello, or similar systems. Experience supporting paid collaborations, sponsorships, or campaign outreach. Experience working with a content creator, ecommerce brand, or digital business is a plus.



About MrYouWho



MrYouWho is a global tech and lifestyle creator media business with 16 YouTube channels, 14 Amazon storefronts, social accounts across major platforms, and over $1.25M in Amazon sales last year.



Primary channel: 
/mryouwho



How to apply



Quick Apply or CV-only applications will not be reviewed.

description:
Title: Virtual Assistant — Healthcare Outreach Specialist (Part-Time, US Business Hours)



Hours: 20 hours/week, Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM Eastern Time (US)



Pay: $3.00 to $4.00/hour USD depending on experience, paid weekly via Wise



About the Company:

We are a HIPAA-compliant healthcare logistics and medical courier company based in Virginia, USA. We specialize in specimen transport, prescription delivery, and time-sensitive medical logistics for healthcare facilities and government health agencies. We are building our client and partner network and need a dedicated outreach specialist to drive that growth on both the government and commercial side.



What You Will Do:

- Make 20 to 30 outbound calls per day to US-based healthcare facilities, hospitals, reference laboratories, specialty pharmacies, and home health agencies

- Conduct government outreach to federal health agencies for logistics and courier contract opportunities

- Monitor 
 daily for new federal opportunities matching our NAICS codes

- Follow up on all outreach via
, send service information, and track interest in our pipeline

- Log every call, contact, and outcome in our tracker and Google Sheets immediately after each interaction

- Build and maintain a contact database of healthcare decision makers and procurement officers

- Send a daily end-of-day summary report via Slack covering all outreach activity



Requirements:

- Proven experience making outbound calls to US businesses — 20 or more calls per day

- Comfortable calling hospitals, clinics, labs, and pharmacies and speaking with administrators and procurement staff

- Tech savvy — comfortable navigating multiple digital tools simultaneously and learning new platforms quickly. This is non-negotiable. Our operation runs on technology and you need to keep up.

- Proficient with Google Workspace — Gmail, Google Sheets, Google Drive

- Comfortable with Slack, Notion, DocuSign, and pipeline management tools

- Able to navigate 
 and 
 for government opportunity research

- Familiar with or able to quickly learn HIPAA compliance basics as they relate to healthcare vendor communications

- Fluent English — written and spoken. Professional, calm, and compliance-aware phone manner. Healthcare clients take vendor credibility seriously.

- Reliable internet connection of 50 Mbps or higher and a quiet dedicated workspace for calls

- Available to work 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM Eastern Time, Monday through Friday — no exceptions

- Organized and detail-oriented — every call logged, every follow-up tracked, every document filed correctly



Preferred but not required:

- Background in healthcare, medical services, pharmaceutical, or healthcare logistics

- Experience in medical sales, healthcare administration, or pharmaceutical outreach

- Previous work in government contracting or federal procurement

- Knowledge of medical terminology and healthcare facility structures

- Experience with CRM tools or AI research tools



To Apply:

Send a short message answering these three questions:



1. Describe your outbound calling experience. How many calls per day did you make and what was the purpose? Have you called healthcare facilities, hospitals, or medical businesses before?

2. What tools and platforms are you proficient with? List the specific tools you use regularly for communication, research, and data management. Be specific.

3. What is your internet speed? Run a test at speedtest.net and share the result.



Include a voice recording of 30 to 60 seconds introducing yourself in English. You can use Vocaroo (
) or attach an audio file. This is required — healthcare clients expect a professional, clear, and calm voice. Make sure your recording reflects that.



Applications without answers to all three questions and a voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: System Tester (MT4/MT5)
description:
About the Role



ImperiumEQ is looking for a Forex EA Tester to take ownership of the validation, optimization, and monitoring of automated trading systems (Expert Advisors).



This role is focused on ensuring system reliability, performance consistency, and risk control through rigorous testing and analysis. You will work closely with trading systems in backtesting, forward environments, and live conditions, helping refine and maintain high-performing automated strategies.



?



Key Responsibilities



• Execute advanced backtesting using high-quality historical data

• Conduct structured forward testing across demo and live environments

• Optimize EA parameters based on performance metrics and risk profiles

• Monitor live EA performance and proactively identify issues or inefficiencies

• Set up, manage, and maintain VPS environments for uninterrupted EA operation

• Analyze drawdowns, risk exposure, and consistency across multiple systems

• Create detailed performance reports and testing documentation

• Troubleshoot EA issues and coordinate fixes or improvements

• Maintain organized logs of system updates, changes, and test results



?



Requirements



• Proven experience working with Expert Advisors (testing and optimization)

• Strong proficiency in MT4 and/or MT5 platforms

• Solid understanding of forex market behavior and automated trading systems

• Hands-on experience with both backtesting and forward testing workflows

• Experience managing VPS environments for live trading systems

• Strong analytical mindset with attention to performance metrics and risk

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple systems simultaneously



?



Nice to Have



• Working knowledge of MQL4 / MQL5 logic

• Experience with multi-EA portfolio testing and optimization

• Familiarity with prop firm rules and performance benchmarks

• Experience integrating AI tools or automation into testing workflows

title: AI Developer – Build AI Skin Analysis System (Computer Vision / ML)
description:
AI Developer – Build AI Skin Analysis System (Computer Vision / ML)



 Job Description



We are looking for an AI Developer / Machine Learning Engineer  to help build a custom AI skin analysis system  for a technology platform in the skin health and aesthetics industry.



This system will power our upcoming platform Skin United, which connects consumers with trained skin professionals and provides intelligent skin analysis and recommendations.



The goal is to build our own AI infrastructure  rather than relying on third-party AI tools or subscription platforms.



You will work alongside our existing development team  who are building the website and app infrastructure.



The AI system will analyse facial images and skin data to identify skin concerns and support personalised skin insights.



Examples of similar platforms include:



* Haut.AI

* Renude



---



 Responsibilities



You will help design and build the AI engine for skin analysis  including:



• Image-based skin analysis using computer vision

• Detecting skin conditions such as acne, pigmentation, redness, pores, texture, and ageing indicators

• Training and improving machine learning models for skin analysis

• Working with datasets of facial images to train models

• Integrating the AI model into our existing web/app infrastructure via API

• Collaborating with our development team building the platform

• Optimising model performance and accuracy

• Helping design the AI workflow used by the platform







 Required Skills



We are looking for someone experienced in:



• Python

• Machine Learning / AI development

• Computer Vision

• Image processing

• TensorFlow or PyTorch

• OpenCV

• API development

• Working with large datasets for model training



Experience building AI analysis tools or computer vision models  is highly preferred.







# Bonus Skills (Not Required)



Experience with:



• Dermatology or skincare datasets

• AI recommendation engines

• Image segmentation models

• Mobile / web AI integration

• Cloud AI deployment



---



# How You Will Work With Us



You will collaborate with:



• Our internal development team building the platform

• Product leadership defining the AI features

• Marketing and product teams defining the user experience



The AI model will need to integrate with the platform backend via API .



---



# Working Hours



Flexible, but ideally overlapping a few hours with Indian and UK timefor collaboration with the dev team.



---



# Pay



Open depending on experience.



Please include:



• Your expected hourly rate 

• Examples of AI or machine learning projects you have built

• Your experience with computer vision or image analysis



---



# Important



We are specifically looking for someone who can build a custom AI model, not someone who only integrates existing AI APIs.



---



# How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short introduction about your AI / ML experience

2. Examples of relevant projects or GitHub repositories

3. Your hourly rate

4. Confirmation that you are comfortable working with an existing development team.

5. Explain how you would build an AI system that analyses facial images to detect skin conditions.

title: Dating App Profile Manager (Tinder & Hinge)
description:
Type of Employment: Part-time

Job Description:

I'm looking for someone to manage my dating app profiles on Tinder and Hinge. Your job is to swipe, match, and carry conversations with the goal of setting up dates.

You'll be trained on my voice, style, and what to say — so no prior dating coaching experience is needed. You just need to be reliable, responsive, and comfortable chatting naturally on my behalf.

Responsibilities:



Daily swiping and matching on Tinder and Hinge

Initiating and maintaining conversations with matches

Following provided scripts and conversation frameworks

Booking dates and confirming logistics

Reporting match activity and date schedules



Requirements:



Strong written English

Comfortable with casual, natural conversation

Available to check and respond on apps multiple times per day

Reliable internet and a smartphone or device to run the apps

Discreet and trustworthy



This is an ongoing role. You'll get clear training and direction — I just need someone consistent who can execute.

Wage/Salary: $200 AUD/month

Hours per week: 10–15

Business or Contact Name: Cornucopia Capital

Skills: Social Media Management, Communication Skills, Virtual Assistant

mber.

title: Outbound cold caller
description:
COLD CALLER — US HOME SERVICES (EXPERIENCED ONLY)

We are hiring experienced outbound cold callers for a fast-growing US SaaS company. You will be calling business owners in Florida — plumbers, HVAC companies, and garage door operators — and booking them into demo calls.

This is not a customer service role. This is pure outbound cold calling.

What you will do:



Dial
calls per day from a pre-qualified lead list

Call US home service business owners and book them into demo meetings

Log call notes on every connect in CRM immediately after

Work a split shift to hit US business owners at peak hours



Shift hours:

3:00 PM – 6:00 PM Philippine time, 2 hour break, then 8:00 PM – 1:00 AM Philippine time. Total 8 hours worked.

You must have:



At least 1 year of outbound cold calling experience calling US businesses

Strong, clear English with minimal accent

Proven track record hitting daily dial targets

Discipline to work a late shift independently without supervision



What we offer:



Competitive salary based on experience

Pre-built lead lists, scripts, and CRM — everything is ready for you

Clear daily targets — you always know exactly what is expected

Fast-growing company with real room to grow as we scale



To apply, answer these two questions:



How many dials per day did you average in your last cold calling role?

What product or service were you selling and who were you calling?



Then record a 60 second cold call sample.

Pretend you are calling a plumber in Florida named Mike. You are trying to book him into a 10 minute demo. Do not use a script. Do not ask "do you have 30 seconds" or "is this a good time." Just call and sell.

Send the recording with your application. No recording, no response. No answers to both questions, no response.

title: Zoho Automation Specialist (Full-Time | UK Hours | Work with Development Team)
description:
Zoho Automation Specialist (Full-Time | UK Hours | Work with Development Team)



Location: Remote

Hours: Monday – Friday, 9:00am – 5:00pm (UK Time)

Company: The Beauté Group



About Us



The Beauté Group is a fast-growing UK-based aesthetics, wellness and technology company. We operate across multiple brands including clinics, device manufacturing, education platforms and digital health solutions.



As we scale, we are building a fully integrated backend system to support lead generation, sales, customer journeys and automation across the group.



We are now looking for a high-level Zoho Automation Specialist to take ownership of this system and work alongside our internal team and web developers.



The Role



This is a technical and strategic position, not a basic admin role.



You will be responsible for building, structuring and optimising our Zoho ecosystem to support a scalable, multi-brand sales infrastructure.



You must be confident working with both non-technical tea
mbers and developers, ensuring all systems communicate effectively and data flows correctly across platforms.



Key Responsibilities

Build and optimise workflows within Zoho CRM (Leads, Contacts, Deals, Custom Modules)

Create automation rules for lead tagging, segmentation and pipeline progression

Structure and implement
 journeys using Zoho Campaigns

Develop lead scoring systems based on user behaviour and engagement

Map and optimise the full customer journey (Lead ? Nurture ? Close ? Aftercare)

Integrate website forms, landing pages and booking systems into Zoho CRM

Work closely with the web development team to:

Ensure accurate data capture and transfer

Support API integrations and system connections

Prevent duplication, data loss or trigger conflicts

Connect external platforms (WhatsApp, SMS, landing pages, booking tools) via Zoho Flow

Test, troubleshoot and continuously improve automation performance

Provide structured daily updates on progress and system improvements

Requirements (Essential)

Proven, hands-on experience with Zoho CRM (advanced level)

Strong experience using Zoho Campaigns and Zoho Flow

Experience working alongside web developers and handling integrations/APIs

Ability to think in systems, automation logic and customer journeys

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving ability

Clear and confident communication skills

Ability to work independently and take ownership of projects

Working Hours & Structure

Monday to Friday

9:00am – 5:00pm (UK Time)

Daily reporting is required

Long-term opportunity with ongoing system development

Payment Structure

Payment is made bi-weekly (every two weeks)

Payments are based on work completed and delivered within that period

Clear deliverables and expectations will be agreed in advance

Application Requirements



To be considered, you must include:



Examples of Zoho systems you have built (specific details, not general experience)

What modules, automations and workflows you implemented

Any experience working with developers or API integrations

Screenshots or Loom walkthroughs of your work (preferred)

Your hourly or monthly rate

Confirmation of your availability during UK working hours

Important



This is not a beginner or basic setup role.



We are building a scalable, high-performance sales and automation system, and require someone who can take ownership, think strategically, and execute at a high level.



Why Join Us

Work with a fast-growing, ambitious UK brand

Be part of building a multi-brand, scalable system from the ground up

Long-term opportunity with consistent work

Direct collaboration with leadership and development teams



If you are confident in Zoho, experienced in automation systems, and comfortable working with developers — we would love to hear from you.



Apply now with the required information above.

title: AI Video Creator — Facebook Ad Creative
description:
We're a fast-growing digital marketing company running paid social campaigns across the UK and US. We're looking for a creative, tech-savvy video creator who lives and breathes AI tools to join our ad creative team and help us produce scroll-stopping video content at scale.

You'll be responsible for producing short-form video ads for
 — primarily UGC-style content created using AI avatars, voiceovers, and footage. You'll work closely with our creative and marketing team to ideate, produce, and iterate on video ads that drive real results.

This is a hands-on production role — we need someone who can move fast, use the latest AI tools confidently, and deliver polished videos ready for paid traffic.



What you'll do



Create short-form video ads (15–60 seconds) for
 using AI tools

Build UGC-style creatives using AI avatars and realistic voiceovers

Clip together footage, add captions, and produce clean edits optimised for mobile

Generate AI video clips to complement or replace raw footage where needed

Add on-brand captions, text overlays, and SFX/music

Iterate on winning ad formats based on performance feedback from our team

Manage a steady output of creatives — ideally 5–15 videos per week





Tools you'll use

HeyGen (AI avatars) · ElevenLabs (voiceover) · Google Veo / AI video generation · CapCut Pro · Adobe Premiere Pro · Epidemic Sound / free SFX libraries

All tools are provided or reimbursed. You just need to know how to use them well.



You're a great fit if you



Have hands-on experience with HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or similar AI creative tools

Can produce professional-looking videos quickly without hand-holding

Understand what makes a
 video ad actually work (hook, flow, CTA)

Have a portfolio or samples of video ads or UGC-style content you've created

Are comfortable taking feedback and iterating fast

Can communicate clearly in English (written)

Are organised and can manage a consistent weekly output





Bonus points for



Experience running or producing creatives for paid
 / Meta campaigns

Knowledge of direct response ad formats and what hooks perform

Experience with A/B testing ad creatives





What we offer



Fully remote, flexible hours

All tools and software provided

Stable, long-term engagement with room to grow

A team that moves fast and values good creative output





How to apply

Send us a message with:



A short intro about your experience with AI video tools

Links to 2–3 sample videos or a portfolio 
 ads preferred, but any short-form video is fine)

The tools you use most and your skill level with each



Applications without samples will not be reviewed.

title: Ecommerce Executive/Specialist (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN ECOMMERCE



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Oversee day-to-end e-commerce operations (catalog, price checks, campaign execution, inventory management, shipping, logistics, customer service and returns) for the Seller Center Stores and the international House of Hur accounts across Singapore, Malaysia, Taiwan, and Vietnam.

- Manage product listings across online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies within Margin Chart, Platform Ads (Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok Seller Center) and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management with business insights and clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with team and provide ad-hoc support for special events and projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–4 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Bigseller Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.
