title: Senior Business Analyst
description:
Sr Business Analyst 



We are seeking a Senior Business Analyst with strong Lean Six Sigma expertise to support both our DMC Academy offerings and broader firm operations. This hybrid role involves: 



Overseeing day-to-day Academy coordination (e.g., scheduling trainings, managing facilitators, and coordinating with clients) 

Creating and refining internal processes to optimize efficiency across our lean organization 

Supporting general consulting project work 

Drafting proposals for new business opportunities 

Reporting directly to the Director of Business Transformation & Academy Program Director, you will play a key role in sustaining smooth program delivery while leading continuous improvement efforts throughout the firm. 



Shape 



Key Responsibilities 



1. Academy Coordination 



Schedule and organize training sessions, workshops, and events 

Manage facilitator relationships—recruiting, onboarding, and ensuring quality standards 

Oversee participant materials, track training expenses, and handle general logistics 

Serve as a liaison with clients on event details, timelines, and follow-ups 

2. Proposal Writing & Business Development 



Draft and refine proposals for Academy-focused programs and broader consulting projects 

Collaborate with leadership to research potential opportunities and prepare responses to RFPs/RFQs 

Develop and maintain standardized proposal templates, ensuring branding and quality consistency 

3. Lean Six Sigma / Process Improvement 



Improve existing or create new operational processes for both the Academy and broader firm; apply Lean Six Sigma methodologies to optimize workflows 

Develop and document Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for internal operations, from client onboarding to project execution 

Monitor and measure the impact of process changes, making adjustments for continuous improvement 

4. Internal Operations & Analyst Support 



Support active consulting projects with data collection, analysis, client communication, and report preparation 

Ensure alignment between Academy deliverables and overall firm objectives, facilitating cross-functional collaboration 

Provide assistance with general operational tasks—such as vendor management, internal reporting, and technology platform evaluations 

5. Data Tracking & Reporting 



Maintain scorecards to monitor key performance indicators (e.g., training utilization, project profitability, client satisfaction) 

Present insights and recommendations to the Academy Program Director and other senior leaders to guide strategic decisions 

Shape 



Required Qualifications 



Education & Experience 



Bachelor’s degree in Business, Operations, Engineering, or a related field (Master’s degree a plus) 

2–5+ years of experience in operations, project management, or business analysis—ideally in consulting, professional services, or training environments 

Demonstrable experience with Lean Six Sigma (Green Belt or higher preferred) or equivalent process improvement frameworks 

Technical Skills 



Proficiency in project management and collaboration tools (e.g., Asana, Trello, 
, MS Teams) 

Strong command of MS Office or Google Workspace (Excel/Sheets, Word/Docs, PowerPoint/Slides) 

Familiarity with CRM or LMS platforms is a bonus 

Soft Skills & Attributes 



Analytical & Detail-Oriented: Skilled at interpreting data, identifying root causes, and executing improvement plans 

Excellent Communication: Able to draft proposals, SOPs, and reports; adaptable to diverse audiences (clients, trainers, leadership) 

Organized Multi-Tasker: Capable of juggling multiple projects and priorities in a fast-paced, evolving environment 

Collaborative Self-Starter: Proactive in seeking solutions, coordinating with tea
mbers, and driving initiatives to completion 

Client-Focused: Sensitive to client needs and experienced in building professional relationships

title: Ad Editor & Scraper (Part-Time ? Full-Time Potential)
description:
Ad Editor & Scraper (Part-Time ? Full-Time Potential)



You’ll be responsible for sourcing, cleaning, and organizing competitor ads across multiple platforms. Your work ensures we have a steady pipeline of ad creatives ready to launch—organized, edited, and free of errors or duplicates.



What You’ll Do



Scrape competitor ads:



- Platforms: Kalodata, TikTok, Instagram,
 Ad Library

- Use keywords to find ads related to our products

- Keep a clean log of what’s already scraped and used (no duplicates)



Edit and sanitize ads:



- Remove mentions like “TikTok Shop”

- Fix wrong offers that don’t match ours

- Replace off-brand visual CTAs with ours

- Remove watermarks and off-brand elements

- Basic video editing (trim, captions, light retouching)



Stay organized:



- Maintain a clear record of all ads scraped, edited, and queued

- Ensure all assets are labeled correctly and stored in the right place

- Double-check for consistency so no mismatched offers or visuals go live



Requirements (Must-Have):



- Strong attention to detail and organization (no sloppy work, no duplicates)

- Skilled in ad scraping and keyword-based searches across platforms

- Basic video editing skills (cuts, overlays, removing elements, captions)

- Data entry discipline (clean tracking and labeling of ads)



Nice to Have:



- Experience with Meta/TikTok ad ecosystems

- Familiarity with Kalodata or other ad spy tools

- Understanding of what makes an ad compliant and effective



Schedule & Growth:



- Part-time to start; must respond quickly to scraping/editing requests

- Potential to grow into a full-time role with bonuses if you deliver consistently



How to Apply (Show, Don’t Tell):



Submit with your application



- 5 ads you scraped (files + log showing source and keywords used)?

- 3 ads you edited (before/after files, with one line on what you changed)?

- Your timezone and same-day response window?

title: Shopify Store Builder (Basic Video Editing Experience)
description:
Shopify Store Manager & Ad Prep (PT to FT)



Mission

Take a product brief and ship a launch-ready Shopify store. When there’s no launch, improve conversion and fix technical issues.



Inputs You Get

• Product info (name, use case, target price/AOV, assets, angles)

• Competitors + creatives

• Policy notes (claims to avoid, compliance)



Deliverables



Build the store end-to-end

• Theme, header/footer/nav, favicon, brand basics

• Pages: Home, PDP, Collections (if needed), About, Contact, FAQ, Privacy/TOS/Refund/Shipping

• Checkout & settings: payments, shipping, markets/currencies, domain, Meta Pixel

• PDP must-haves: benefits, ingredients/specs (if supplements), trust badges, guarantee, FAQs, reviews app, sticky ATC, clear above-the-fold offer

• Mobile-first, speed, no broken links, ATC works, discounts/tax/shipping logic correct, pixel fires, test order completed



Create and wire the offers

• Types: BOGO, tiered quantity, bundles, Mystery Gift, free-shipping threshold, etc

• Implementation: Shopify Discounts or app logic

• Copy placement: announcement bar, PDP, cart, checkout

• Price accuracy everywhere (PDP, cart, checkout, banners). No mismatches. Ever.



Prep an ad-ready creative pack (30–50)

• Research: pull 30–50 competitor ads

• Light production using our assets: cut, sequence, add captions, export ready to publish

• Sanitization (non-negotiable): remove “TikTok Shop,” competitor names, wrong prices; replace off-brand CTAs/watermarks; no copyrighted competitor footage (Basic video editing skill)



Final Green-Light package

• Store checklist: all PASS (pages, offers, checkout, apps, pixel, test order, mobile, links)

• Ad pack: 30–50 files, correct specs, clean filenames



When there’s no launch (We give you other tasks)

• Enable/optimize post-purchase upsells (pick SKUs, write micro-copy)

• Improve landing pages (structure, offer, social proof)

• Maintain key apps (reviews, upsell, tracking, speed)

• Handle Shopify technical issues



Tools

• ATLAS AI to build a base; you finish the rest

• Shopify Admin + Theme Customizer

• Lightweight video editor (cuts/overlays/captions)



Requirements (must-have)

• Shopify: build, configure, troubleshoot, launch

• Offer building (BOGO, tiers, bundles, gifts) + clean PDP structure

• Extreme detail discipline: prices/copy/visuals align everywhere

• Fast, clean editing (owned/licensed assets only)

• Strong Shopify knowledge



Nice to have

• CRO mindset, Meta policy sense, UTMs, post-purchase flows, light copy polish



Availability & Growth

• Part
-call to start; time-sensitive—respond fast

• Path to full-time with bonuses and possible manager role if you deliver



How to apply (show, don’t tell)

Send one
/folder with:

• 2–3 Shopify stores you built (live links or short walkthroughs)

• 5 ad creatives you edited (your files)

• Your timezone + typical same-day response window

If you miss details, you’re not a fit.



Note: No prior developer background required; tasks are handled in user-friendly apps. Basic Liquid familiarity is still expected.

title: DROPSHIPPING PRODUCT RESEARCHER (HIGHLY EXPERIENCED)
description:
Product Researcher (Health & Supplements) — Meta Ads Focus



Role: Find high-potential, legally compliant product opportunities in the health/supplements space and keep a living priority list our launch team can act on daily.



What you’ll do:



- Source daily: Identify new consumable health products (supplements + adjacent) with Meta Ads potential. Quality > quantity, but you can surface up to 3/day when they truly meet the bar.

- Validate fast: For each product, complete a tracking sheet with:

- Core product summary and target use case

- Competitor scan on Meta Ad Library (who’s running, ad count, first-seen date, creative quality, follower/base signals)

- Presence/size on other platforms (TikTok Shop, Amazon, etc.)

- Trademark/IP status (is the brand/product name protectable, restricted, or clear for our own branding?)

- Recency (new to market vs. rerun), trend signals (Exploding Topics, Google Trends)

- Score & prioritize: Rank opportunities by launch priority and update the list daily as new products come in.

- Cross-check competition: Confirm if the original brand is advertising on Meta and judge execution quality (low ad volume, weak creatives, very new, small following = opportunity).

- Hand off for testing: Coordinate with the launch team so your top items gets launched every day.



Tools you’ll use:



- Kalodata (to spot winning TikTok Shop products to port to Meta)

- Meta Ad Library (verification + competitor mapping)

- Exploding Topics & Google Trends (demand trajectory)

- Our internal revenue/spy tool (we’ll give you access)



What “high-opportunity” looks like:



- New or early in the market

- Little to no serious competition on Meta

- The originating brand isn’t running Meta or is doing it poorly

- Broad, mainstream appeal (not niche-locked)

- Trademark-clear for us to brand and market ethically

Important: We do not copy, impersonate, or use others’ protected names. We only pursue products we can legally sell under our own branding.



Must-have experience:



- Deep familiarity with the health/supplement space and what actually converts on paid social

- Strong pattern recognition around past winners (e.g., ashwagandha, GLP-1-themed trends, etc.) and the ability to spot the next wave, not yesterday’s news

- Hands-on with Meta Ad Library, trend tools, and competitive research

- Sharp judgment on IP/trademark basics and platform policy risks

- Excel/Sheets discipline; you keep a clean, decision-ready tracker



Nice to have:



- Experience moving products from TikTok ? Meta successfully

- Understanding of compliance-safe positioning in health

- Basic knowledge of funnel metrics (AOV, CPA, CTR) to sanity-check potential



Success metrics:



- Consistent pipeline of launch-worthy products (not noise)

- Accurate competitor/intel snapshots (ad count, first-seen, revenue estimate)

- Daily, priority list that our team can act on immediately

- Hit rate of products that make it to test and show promising early metrics

- Schedule: Full-time. Daily coordination with the launch team.



How to apply: Send 2 product picks you believe are Meta-ready, with an explanation for each (your sheet). Include your reasoning as to why you believe this is an high opportunity with as much details as possible and resources, provide links if necessary.

title: Marketing and Communications Manager
description:
About Us: At Dillon Morgan Consulting, we are passionate about driving innovation and delivering exceptional results for our clients. Our dynamic team thrives on creativity, collaboration, and a commitment to excellence. We believe in fostering a supportive and inclusive work environment where every tea
mber can grow and succeed. Join us and be part of a company that values your ideas and contributions!



Job Description: Are you a creative and strategic thinker with a passion for marketing and communications? Do you thrive in a fast-paced environment and love the challenge of building brand awareness and engagement? If so, we want you to join our team as a Marketing and Communications Manager!



Key Responsibilities:



Develop and implement comprehensive marketing and communication strategies to enhance brand visibility and drive business growth.

Create and manage engaging content for various channels, including social media, website,
 campaigns, and press releases.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure consistent messaging and branding across all platforms.

Monitor and analyze market trends, competitor activities, and customer insights to inform marketing strategies.

Plan and execute successful marketing campaigns and events that resonate with our target audience.

Manage relationships with media, influencers, and other key stakeholders to maximize positive coverage and brand reputation.

Track and report on the effectiveness of marketing initiatives, using data to optimize future campaigns.

Qualifications:



Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.

Proven experience in marketing and communications, preferably in a consulting or professional services environment.

Strong written and verbal communication skills with a keen eye for detail.

Proficiency in digital marketing tools and platforms, including social media management,
 marketing, and analytics.

Creative mindset with the ability to think outside the box and generate innovative ideas.

Excellent organizational and project management skills, with the ability to handle multiple tasks and deadlines.

A team player with a positive attitude and a passion for continuous learning and improvement.

Why Join Us?



Innovative Environment: Be part of a forward-thinking company that values creativity and innovation.

Career Growth: We invest in our employees' professional development and offer opportunities for advancement.

Collaborative Culture: Work with a supportive and talented team that values collaboration and mutual respect.

Impactful Work: Make a difference by contributing to projects that drive real results for our clients.

Competitive Compensation: Enjoy a competitive salary and benefits package that recognizes your hard work and dedication.

title: High converting social media ads
description:
OVERVIEW:



At Blue Zone Pets, we believe the single biggest lever you have over your dog's health is what you put in their bowl. We're a pet nutrition brand built around one mission: their longest life, back in your hands. Our food is 80% real meat, dried below 40°C to lock in maximum nutrients, with zero fillers, zero additives — just ingredients you can actually read and trust. We're building a brand that dog owners genuinely believe in, backed by a 4.6 Trustpilot rating and a growing community of owners who've seen the difference real nutrition makes. We're still early, moving fast, and looking for people who want to build something that matters. Join us as a Graphic Designer and help us become the standard for how dogs should be fed.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Design high-performing creatives, static ads, and branded assets that are on-brand and built to convert — owning the visual output from concept to final file.

2. Use AI generation tools to produce raw assets, then refine them with enhancement tools (Magnific AI, Topaz, Photoshop AI) until quality is indistinguishable from a professional shoot.

3. Proactively pitch new content ideas, visual formats, and workflow improvements — you don't wait for briefs, you spot opportunities and ship.



REQUIREMENTS:

1. A sharp-eyed designer with deep command of layout, typography, colour, and composition — highly proficient in Figma (primary) and Adobe Creative Suite.

2. Skilled at AI-assisted design: you use generative tools to create base assets and enhancement tools to push them to production quality. One render is never your final output.

3. Self-managing, organised, and deadline-driven — you don't need hand-holding. You see what needs doing and do it.

4. A quick learner who adapts fast to new tools and workflows; experience with Notion for project management, WhatsApp for daily communication, and openness to tools like Gather for virtual collaboration as we scale.

5. Genuinely excited about what we're building at Blue Zone — you care about quality, you care about pets, and you want to be part of a brand that's changing how people think about dog nutrition.



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:

- A small, ambitious team where your work has direct impact — no layers, no bureaucracy, just ownership and 
ntum.

- A culture that rewards initiative. If you spot an opportunity and act on it, we'll notice.

- Real growth potential — we're scaling quickly, and the people who join now will shape how this company operates as it grows.

- Founders who are hands-on, transparent, and genuinely invested in your development — not just your output.



COMPENSATION:

- Part-time position. Monthly creative sprints

- Competitive rate based on experience and qualifications. Per project basis, $10 per project ? $300 p/m



APPLICATION PROCESS:

Here's how to apply:



Fill out this form ? Apply here: 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfpKsPzRTlRlBchmQGnBe44Ny5yJKk-vDUbNtUykxA_Ezm2aQ/viewform?usp=header



Only completed applications will be considered.



Once you've submitted, reply here with the subject line: "PAW"



We're looking forward to hearing from you. If you're the right fit, you'll be joining a team that's building something dogs (and their owners) actually deserve.



Best regards,

Dean

Co-founder of Blue Zone Pets

).

title: Shopify Website Growth & SEO Specialist – MrYouWho — Remote PH
description:
Pay: $6–$8 USD/hour (PHP equivalent) depending on experience, with room to grow for strong performers

Hours: 30–38 hrs/week

Location: Remote – Philippines

Start: ASAP



About MrYouWho



MrYouWho is a global tech and lifestyle media network with 16 YouTube channels, 14 Amazon Influencer storefronts, social accounts across major platforms, two affiliate websites, and over $1.25M in Amazon sales last year.



Main channel: 
/mryouwho

Website: 



About the role



We are hiring a Web + SEO Specialist to help refine, optimise, and grow the MrYouWho website.



The site is already live and the new structure is in place, but it has not yet been fully reviewed, refined, or turned into a strong working system. This is not a full rebuild from scratch. Your role is to come in, improve what is already there, work with the current development team where needed, strengthen the structure, and help turn the website into a real growth engine alongside YouTube and Amazon.



The goal is to make the website a stronger hub for affiliate content, reviews, comparisons, blog content, giveaways, brand partnership pages, and long-term business growth.



What you’ll be doing



Review and refine the current live website structure, navigation, page hierarchy, and overall flow. Work with the current development team to finalise and improve the site where needed. Build and manage a practical SEO and content system around reviews, comparisons, affiliate pages, and related content. Create keyword maps and content briefs that can be executed properly. Improve internal linking, page templates, metadata, and site organisation. Help build a rolling content and page pipeline tied to our YouTube channel and broader business growth. Track progress weekly across traffic, rankings, top pages, clicks, and conversions.



What we need



You must have real hands-on experience in website SEO and content systems, not just theory. You must have worked directly with Shopify, ideally Shopify 2.0. You must be comfortable improving an existing live site rather than trying to rebuild everything from zero. You must understand navigation, page structure, internal linking, search intent, and how to build useful content systems. You must be organised, practical, and comfortable taking ownership.



Strongly preferred



Experience with affiliate-style SEO content such as product reviews, comparisons, and “best” pages. Experience working with ecommerce, media, or creator-led businesses. A basic CRO mindset, where you care about clicks, engagement, and conversions, not just rankings. Experience working with a developer or agency to improve a live site.



Important



We are not looking for local SEO only. We are not looking for Amazon listing SEO only. We are looking for someone who can help turn an existing Shopify website into a stronger content and monetisation system.



How to apply



Quick Apply or CV-only applications will not be reviewed.



To be considered, include a short cover letter answering these 3 questions in this exact order:



1) Proof (2–3 examples)

Share 2 or 3 websites you worked on that are relevant to this role. For each one, write one line explaining what you personally did and what improved.



2) Shopify

Have you worked directly on Shopify or Shopify 2.0?

If yes, link 1 store and list exactly what you personally built, fixed, or improved in no more than 5 bullets.

If no, write “NO”.



3) Week 1 plan (5 bullets)

If you started tomorrow, what are the first 5 things you would improve on an existing live site like MrYouWho?



Please add the word DETAILS at the very end of your cover letter.

title: Customer Service Rep (Must have strong English)
description:
Customer Service Representative



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Type: Full-Time

Schedule: U.S. Eastern Time zone business hours



ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are a growing e-commerce and retail fashion brand based in Atlanta, GA. We offer premiu
n's and women's clothing, suits, accessories, and footwear through our online store and physical retail locations. We are a fast-paced, customer-first company that values quality, responsiveness, and attention to detail in everything we do.



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a Customer Service Representative to serve as the primary point of contact for our customers across
, chat, social media, and phone. This is a full-time, remote position based in the Philippines, supporting our U.S.-based operations during Eastern Time business hours.



The ideal candidate has a proven track record of delivering outstanding customer service, communicates with excellent English and proper grammar, and takes pride in representing a brand professionally. You will be trained on all tools and systems, but you must come in ready to communicate clearly, solve problems independently, and go above and beyond for every customer interaction.



RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Respond to customer inquiries via
, live chat, social media (Instagram,
), and phone in a timely, professional, and friendly manner

2. Assist customers with order status, shipping questions, returns, exchanges, and product information

3. Process orders, returns, refunds, and exchanges accurately using the company's e-commerce platform

4. Resolve customer complaints and issues with empathy, patience, and a solutions-oriented approach

5. Maintain and update customer records and order notes in the company's systems

6. Monitor and respond to online reviews, comments, and direct messages across social media platforms

7. Edit and resize product photos for the online store, social media, and marketing materials using photo editing tools (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)

8. Assist with product listing updates, descriptions, and content uploads on the e-commerce platform

9. Escalate complex or unresolved issues to management with clear documentation and context

10. Proactively identify patterns in customer questions or complaints and suggest improvements to processes, FAQs, or product listings

11. Support other administrative and operational tasks as assigned



REQUIREMENTS



Must-Have Qualifications



1. 2+ years of customer service experience, preferably in e-commerce, retail, or fashion

2. Excellent written and verbal English communication skills with proper grammar, spelling, and punctuation

3. Proven track record of delivering exceptional customer service and resolving issues effectively

4. Professional, warm, and brand-appropriate tone in all written and verbal communications

5. Experience editing photos for product listings, social media, or marketing (Canva, Photoshop, Lightroom, or similar tools)

6. Strong attention to detail and ability to maintain accuracy across orders, records, and communications

7. Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

8. Reliable internet connection and quiet, professional home workspace

9. Available to work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours



Preferred Qualifications



10. Experience with Shopify or similar e-commerce platforms

11. Familiarity with social media management and responding to customer engagement on Instagram and

12. Experience with customer service tools such as Zendesk, Freshdesk, Gorgias, or similar

13. Background in fashion, retail, or apparel



KEY TRAITS WE'RE LOOKING FOR



1. Exceptional Communicator: You write and speak with clarity, warmth, and professionalism. Your grammar and tone are consistently polished.

2. Customer-First Mindset: You genuinely care about the customer experience and go the extra mile to make things right.

3. Detail-Oriented: You catch errors before they reach the customer, whether in an
, a product listing, or an order.

4. Problem Solver: You think critically, take initiative, and don't wait to be told what to do when something needs to be fixed.

5. Reliable and Consistent: You show up on time, meet deadlines, and deliver quality work every day.

6. Eager to Learn: You're comfortable being trained on new tools and technology and pick things up quickly.



TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGY



You will be fully trained on all tools and platforms used in this role. Familiarity with any of the following is a plus but not required:



1. E-commerce platform (Shopify or similar)

2. Photo editing tools (Canva, Photoshop, Lightroom)

3.
 and communication tools

4. Social media platforms (Instagram,
)

5. Customer service and ticketing systems



HOW TO APPLY



Interested candidates should submit their resume and a brief cover letter highlighting their customer service experience and English communication skills. Please include a sample of any photo editing work if available.

title: Short-Form Video Editor — Christian Mobile App Ads (TikTok/Meta)
description:
I'm looking for a reliable video editor to help me produce short-form ads (25–35 seconds) for SermonKeep — a Christian mobile app that records and transcribes sermons so believers can stay present during church without losing the message.

This is an ongoing gig role starting with small batches of 5 videos at a time. If the work is good and communication is smooth, there will be consistent work going forward.

What you'll receive for each video:



An AI-generated clip (10–15 seconds) — the hook

A product demo of the app (10–15 seconds) — the payoff. If you own an iPhone and are comfortable recording your own screen demos, that is a big bonus and makes you significantly more valuable on this project. If not, I will provide the b-roll footage for you to work with.

Written instructions per video specifying text overlays, cuts, and anything specific needed



I'll do my best to make the instructions clear, but I want to be upfront — good communication from both sides will be important, especially at the start while we establish a workflow.



What each video needs:

- Clean cut between the AI clip and the app demo

- Captions/subtitles styled for TikTok and Meta (clean, readable, well-timed)

- Subtle background music — nothing loud, dialogue is the focus

- On-screen text overlays where specified

- Minor fixes to hide any AI artifacts or smooth transitions

- Final export: vertical 9:16, optimized for TikTok and Meta



Turnaround: 24–48 hours per video on weekdays. No expectation to work on weekends.



You're a great fit if you:

- Have experience editing short-form content for TikTok or Instagram Reels

- Are comfortable with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or any equivalent editing tool

- Communicate clearly in English

- Are detail-oriented and can follow specific per-video instructions

- Can deliver consistently within the weekday turnaround window



Big bonus if:



- You are an iPhone user — there may be opportunities to record your own product demo footage directly on your device, which would make you significantly more valuable on this project

- You are a Christian and attend church regularly — you will immediately understand the content and the audience without needing extra context



To apply, please send:



- 2–3 samples of short-form videos you have edited

- A brief note about your editing experience and the tools you use

- Let me know if you are an iPhone user

- If you are a Christian, feel free to mention it — it's not a requirement but it's genuinely relevant to this work



We estimate each video will take around 30–45 minutes of work, which is why we pay per video rather than by the hour. Our rate is $6–8 per video depending on complexity. If your work is consistently excellent and volume increases, we are happy to revisit the rate.

title: Video Editor (TikTok / Short-Form)
description:
TYPE OF WORK: Contract (hourly) in the beginning

WAGE / SALARY: $8/hr (depending on experience)

HOURS PER WEEK: 10-20, with path to part-time or full-time



JOB OVERVIEW



We're scaling short-form video across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts for a health and wellness brand. You'll work directly under our Creative Director, who handles strategy, hooks, and content direction. Your job is to take that direction and turn it into scroll-stopping videos, fast.



Day to day, you'll use our internal AI video generation tool to produce base footage, then do the real editing work: adding captions, text overlays, transitions, sound selection, pacing adjustments, and final polish. Minimum 2 videos per day at full scale.



This is a pure execution role. You're not d
 what to post or why. You're making sure every video that goes out looks clean, hits the right pacing, and matches the creative brief you're given.



What we need from you:



You're fast. You can turn around a polished short-form video in under an hour once you have the brief and assets. You know CapCut or equivalent tools inside out. You have a feel for what "good" looks like on TikTok right now: the pacing, the text timing, the sound choices. You can take feedback, apply it immediately, and not need the same note twice. You're comfortable learning new tools quickly (our internal video generation platform has a short learning curve).



Beginners will not be considered.



This starts as an hourly contract. Strong performers move to part-time or full-time based on results. After 3 months working together, we introduce performance incentives for videos that hit view milestones.



How to apply:



Start your message with the letter X. Link one TikTok account you currently edit for, and two of your best final videos from it. We want to see your editing quality and how consistently you follow a content system.



Generic applications will not be considered.



SKILL REQUIREMENT: Video Editing, CapCut, Short-Form Content, TikTok

title: Amazon Catalog Manager & Troubleshooting Expert
description:
Mission

Keep every client catalog on Amazon running at 100%. Listings accurate, issues resolved fast, inventory flowing, and account health green. You are the operational backbone that ensures nothing falls through the cracks so the strategy team can focus on growth.



Outcomes



1. Catalog Accuracy & Listing Management

- Zero listing errors on live client accounts (pricing, images, descriptions, specifications always current and correct)

- All new listings and catalog updates published within 24 hours of receiving approved content

- Flat file uploads executed error-free (or resolved independently)

- SEO-optimized listing copy (titles, bullet points, descriptions, backend search terms) created for all new and updated listings using our AI-powered Claude workflow

- Catalog aligned with Amazon Rufus optimization requirements across all managed accounts



2. Troubleshooting & Issue Resolution

- All open Amazon cases responded to within 24 hours, resolved within 72 hours (or escalated with documented reason)

- Listing suppressions identified and resolved within 24 hours

- Account Health rating maintained at "Good" or above

- FBA inventory discrepancies flagged and reimbursement claims filed within 48 hours of detection with the help of TrueOps

- Zero policy violations caused by catalog errors



3. Inventory Monitoring & Reshipment Support

- Stockout and overstock risks flagged to the Amazon Lead before they become problems

- Bi-Weekly reshipment plans completed on time using our tools (estimated 15 minutes per plan)

- Zero preventable stockouts on any managed account



4. AI Adoption & Process Innovation

- Fully adopt and operate our AI-powered Claude workflows for SEO listing creation, reshipment planning, and other automated tasks

- Proactively identify at least 1 new automation or AI opportunity per month. Tasks you do repeatedly that could be streamlined

- All repeatable workflows documented in SOPs (90% coverage by end of your first quarter)

- Weekly status update delivered to the Amazon Lead covering: open cases, listing changes, inventory flags, and blockers

- Respond to team Slack messages within 4 business hours during working hours



Competencies

- Attention to Detail: Every listing element — every bullet point, every image, every price — is checked and correct before going live. You catch the small things before they become big problems.

- Speed & Reliability: Tasks get done on time, every time. You don't drop balls. When you say something will be done by Tuesday, it's done by Tuesday.

- Resourcefulness with Amazon: You know how to navigate Seller Central, open the right cases, find the right category, and -push through Amazon's bureaucracy without needing hand-holding.

- Follow-Through: You see every task and case through to resolution. Nothing sits in "pending" forgotten. You track what's open and close it.

- Calm Under Pressure: When a listing gets suppressed or an account health alert fires, you stay level-headed, diagnose the problem, and fix it. No drama.

- AI-Curious & Growth-Minded: You're genuinely interested in AI tools and automation. You don't just use the workflows we hand you. You ask "what else could we automate?" and actively look for ways to work smarter.



Why Work Here

- Trusted Like an Adult: Work from where you want and when you're most productive, not 9-5 for appearances. Own your outcomes without micromanagement.

- Constantly Challenged: We challenge everybody to be 1?tter every day by doing work that moves the needle, not busywork.

- Radically Honest Environment: Direct feedback that helps you improve. Zero corporate doubletalk.

- Speed Over Bureaucracy: Fast decisions without approval layers. Your impact is visible and recognized.

- High-Caliber Team: Work alongside A-players who take ownership. Everybody in the team wants you to win.

- AI-Powered Workflow: We run automated Claude workflows for SEO, reshipment planning, and more. You'll work with tools most agencies don't even know exist — and you'll help us build the next ones.



Our team said it best: "I believe the company will achieve its long-term goals, and I want to be there when that happens."



Requirements

- 2+ years in e-commerce operations and Seller Central

- Proven experience with Inventory Flat Files (creation, editing, bulk uploads)

- Working knowledge of Amazon case management and policy compliance

- Understanding of SEO and keyword optimization for Amazon listings

- Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar). You don't need to be an expert, but you should be genuinely interested in learning and adopting AI-powered workflows

- Fluent English communication

- Reliable internet

- Zero conflicting commitments or side projects during agreed working hours





This Role Is Not For You If You…

- Prefer strategic planning over hands-on execution

- Get bored by detail-oriented, repetitive work

- Need someone to check on you to stay on track

- Are uncomfortable working in Amazon Seller Central daily

- Want a role where you set the strategy rather than execute it



Hiring Process

1. Application: Start your message with "WizardCatalog" to confirm you read this post

2. Short Questionnaire: A few targeted questions to assess your experience and fit

3. 15-Minute Interview: Quick conversation to understand your background and working style

4. Test Task: A real-world catalog/troubleshooting task to see how you work

5. Final Interview: Deeper conversation about your experience and culture fit

title: Research & Design Assistant
description:
**Role Overview**



The Research & Design Assistant supports the visual pipeline for new sculptures. You will research mountains and identify ideal viewpoints using online tools, source and license reference photography from stock platforms, and use Photoshop, Lightroom, and AI image generation tools to prepare design mock-ups and product variant images for the website.



You will work directly with our in-house graphic designer and our Ecommerce Merchandising Coordinator, integrating into existing workflows for new product development and page preparation.



---



**Key Responsibilities**



Mountain Research & Image Sourcing



- Research specific mountains and identify photographically strong viewpoints using Google Earth, Google Maps, and public reference sources

- Search stock photography platforms (Adobe Stock, Getty, Shutterstock, etc.) for licensable images from target viewpoints

- Evaluate image quality, angle, and licensing terms and flag best candidates for team review

- Track sourcing status and licensing details in Notion



Design & Mock-up Production



- Edit and prepare reference images using Photoshop and Lightroom

- Build and update product design mock-ups for new sculptures and product variants

- Use AI image generation tools (including Weevy) to produce multivariate product images showcasing alternate finishes, colors, and presentations

- Maintain organized asset libraries in Dropbox with consistent naming conventions



Workflow Integration



- Follow existing SOPs for new product visual pipeline

- Coordinate with the in-house designer on design quality and asset handoff

- Collaborate with the Ecommerce Merchandising Coordinator to ensure assets are ready for product page builds

- Keep Notion updated on research status, image sourcing, and asset readiness



---



**Qualifications**



- Strong working knowledge of Photoshop and Lightroom (required)

- Experience with AI image generation tools is a strong plus

- Skilled at web research, cross-referencing multiple sources, and identifying the best photographic viewpoints of geographic subjects

- Comfortable navigating stock photography platforms and understanding licensing structures

- High attention to detail and strong visual judgment

- Experience with Notion, Slack, Google Workspace, and Dropbox

- Ability to work independently and manage your own task queue

- A genuine interest in mountains, geography, or landscape photography is a bonus

title: A+ Social Media Manager
description:
Salon Marketing Solutions is an Australian-based marketing education company supporting beauty salons, skin clinics, and aesthetic businesses across Australia and New Zealand. We provide done-for-you campaigns, strategic mentoring, and practical tools to help clinic owners grow consistently and confidently.



Please ONLY apply if you have experience in the ff:
 Marketing, Meta Ads, Canva Pro, Meta Business Suite



Recruited and Trained by Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™ Service

Installed™ builds in-house marketing capability for beauty and skin clinics.

This role is a 4–6 week training and placement pathway, preparing you to run the full social media marketing function inside a clinic — not as an agency, but as an embedded tea
mber.



Purpose:



To lead and execute a clinic’s social media marketing strategy, design, content, engagement, and paid ads — with the goal of growing visibility, followers, and lead lists. You will be placed with a growing clinic business (to be advised at the second interview) and work directly with the clinic owner following installation.

 marketing will be required on an ad-hoc basis to complement social strategy.

This is an incredible opportunity to learn directly from Vanessa McDonald — one of Australia’s most respected marketing strategists in the professional beauty and skincare industry, with 24 years of experience guiding clinics to build sustainable, high-performing marketing systems.



You’ll be trained in:



The beauty, skin, and aesthetics industry — treatments, terminology, and client psychology.

The specific clinic’s business, brand, and product range.

 marketing systems used within the industry, including Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these only if the clinic you are placed with uses these particular platforms).



Core Responsibilities:



- Develop and implement Instagram and
 strategies that drive engagement, growth, and qualified new client leads.

- Manage Meta Ads end-to-end: strategy, creative, setup, optimisation, and reporting.

- Confidently operate within the Meta Business Suite and Ads Manager, keeping up to date with current Meta tools and best practices.

- Design high-quality, on-brand content in Canva Pro, following the clinic’s brand style guide.

- Create and edit reels and short-form videos using apps such as CapCut or similar.

- Write fluent, polished UK English captions and campaign copy that reflect the clinic’s tone of voice.

- Manage DMs and engagement daily — responding to enquiries, nurturing prospective clients, and connecting with local influencers and aligned businesses for collaboration opportunities.

- Build and send
 campaigns using Mailchimp or the clinic’s in-house marketing system (Mailchimp expertise is essential).

- Utilise AI tools to enhance efficiency while preserving human judgment and creative quality.

- Prepare concise monthly reports covering organic performance, ads, and
 activity.

- Once Installed, you’ll work directly with the clinic owner using a clear communication and project management system that sets expectations, deadlines, and approvals.



Required Experience & Skills



- Minimum 3 years’ proven experience in social media strategy and Meta Ads management.

- Demonstrated results in organic audience growth and engagement.

- Strong proficiency with Meta Business Suite, Ads Manager, data analysis, and reporting.

- Advanced Canva Pro design capability with excellent attention to detail. We’re seeking candidates who can create clean, professional artwork and design aligned to brand standards.

- Confident in photo editing and basic retouching to ensure all visual content is polished, consistent, and on-brand.

- Skilled in reel creation and short-form video editing (CapCut preferred).

- Expert in Mailchimp, including automation, segmentation, and reporting.

- Adaptable to other industry platforms such as Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these systems only).

- Familiar with ManyChat or similar tools for automated lead capture.

- Excellent written and spoken UK English for an Australian audience (10/10 fluency).

- Reliable, responsive, and professional in remote settings.

- Must successfully complete a test task before onboarding.



Work Structure & Conditions

Part-time: 20 hours per week (remote, flexible)

Training rate: $175 AUD/week (6-8 weeks)

Probation (3 months): $200 AUD/week

After 12 months: $240 AUD/week

12months +: 280AUD per week

Performance bonuses apply for meeting or exceeding campaign KPIs and results benchmarks.

If you prefer full-time work, you may be placed with two clinics instead of one.

All recruitment, training, and placement are managed through Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™.



Only applicants who will fill out the form below will be screened:

-
 Customer Service & Inbox Management

title: Full-Time Video Editor (IG & TikTok Reels – Restaurant Content)
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term | Philippines Only



We are a fast-growing digital marketing agency working with restaurants and hospitality brands. We shoot high-quality content (Sony S-Log3 .mxf files) and are looking for a full-time video editor who specializes in viral short-form editing for Instagram Reels and TikTok.



You’ll be working inside Adobe Premiere Pro using our custom LUTs, compensation LUTs, and structured editing workflow to produce polished, high-performing Reels for multiple restaurant clients.



If you love fast-paced edits, viral hooks, TikTok-style pacing, and making food content look incredible — this is for you.



???? Responsibilities



You will work inside a proven, efficient system:



Daily Editing Tasks



Edit short-form vertical videos for Instagram Reels and TikTok



Work with Sony S-Log3 .mxf footage



Apply our custom Adobe Premiere LUTs and S-Log3 compensation LUTs



Follow our structured flow for pacing, hooks, transitions, and rhythm



Create viral-friendly edits (fast hooks, dynamic pacing, scroll-stopping style)



Add simple effects based on our in-house tutorial videos



Add text overlays and captions/subtitles when needed



Maintain brand consistency across multiple restaurant clients



Organize and properly label footage, timelines, and exports



Deliver edits quickly and handle revisions as needed



???? Our Editing System (Your Advantage)



We provide:



Premiere-based Preset LUTs



S-Log3 compensation LUTs



A clear step-by-step editing structure



Tutorials showing how to apply simple effects



Consistent weekly footage from ongoing shoots



Brand guides for each restaurant



A workflow designed for SPEED + CONSISTENCY



This makes your job faster, easier, and repeatable.



???? Requirements



Strong experience editing IG Reels and TikToks



Skilled in creating viral-style short-form videos



Must be proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro



Must have experience working with Sony footage + S-Log3



Ability to color-correct LOG footage using LUTs



Excellent sense of pacing, hooks, and engaging storytelling



Strong organizational skills



Fast turnaround time



Reliable internet + backup



Available full-time



Consistent with deadlines and revisions



? Bonus Skills (Not required but valuable)



Experience editing food/restaurant or lifestyle content



Familiarity with TikTok and IG trend formats



Experience with sound syncing, beat matching, light motion



DaVinci Resolve exposure (not required)



Basic CapCut knowledge



Good sense of modern aesthetics



???? Compensation



$600–$900 USD per month, depending on experience



Long-term full-time position



Consistent weekly workload



Growth and raise opportunities



???? How to Apply



Please send:



Your resume



Portfolio with Reels/TikTok examples (required)



Expected monthly salary



Short answers to:



Do you have experience editing S-Log3 or LOG footage?



What editing software do you use?



How fast can you complete a 10–15 second Reel?



Have you edited restaurant/food content before?



Have you used LUTs and color correction workflows?



Internet speed?

title: Remote Sales Service Executive (Online Lead Specialist)
description:
We are a fast-growing aesthetic clinic group based in Singapore, focused on delivering high-quality, doctor-led treatments. As we expand, we are building a dedicated online sales team to handle patient enquiries and convert them into clinic visits.



Role Overview

We are looking for a sales-driven, customer-focused individual to manage incoming WhatsApp/Social Media/other online enquiries and convert them into consultation bookings. You will be using our centralised CRM system to handle all incoming leads, and training will be provided.



Your main goal is to engage, follow up, and convert leads into paying patients. If you enjoy chatting with customers, closing sales, and being rewarded for performance, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

1. Lead Engagement

- Respond to Whatsapp and other online enquiries promptly (within 5–15 minutes)

- Understand customer concerns and recommend suitable solutions

2. Sales Conversion

- Guide potential patients toward booking a consultation

- Handle objections (pricing, concerns, hesitation) confidently

- Follow structured sales scripts and frameworks

3. Follow-Up & Nurturing

- Proactively follow up with leads (Day 1, Day 3, Day 7, Day 14, etc.)

- Maintain consistent communication until conversion or closure

4. Appointment Booking

- Offer and secure consultation slots

- Coordinate with clinic schedules

5. Lead Tracking

- Update lead status in CRM or tracking sheets

- Ensure proper tagging and documentation



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

- Strong communication skills (clear, friendly, persuasive)

- Sales-driven mindset (comfortable closing conversations)

- Fast typing and ability to handle multiple chats

- Responsible, disciplined, and able to work remotely



Good to Have

- Experience in sales, customer service, or aesthetics industry

- Experience handling WhatsApp / online enquiries

- Familiarity with beauty or aesthetic treatments



Key Traits for Success

- Proactive (you follow up, not wait)

- Persuasive but not pushy

- Organised and detail-oriented

- Comfortable working with targets and KPIs



Compensation & Benefits:  

- Competitive base salary of 550USD - 650USD

- Performance-based incentives of 10 USD per lead that attend clinic session



Remote working flexibility

- Training and structured scripts provided



Performance Expectations

You will be measured on:

- Response time

- Booking conversion rate

- Show-up rate

- Revenue generated from leads



Why Join Us?

- Be part of a growing aesthetic clinic group

- Clear system and training provided

- High earning potential with incentives

- Opportunity to grow into senior sales or team lead roles



How to Apply

Please submit your resume along with a short message explaining why you are suitable for this role.



Note:

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Candidates with strong sales ability will be prioritised.

title: Finance Loan Processor
description:

This is a full time, long term, work from home role for a highly organised finance professional based in the Philippines who has strong experience supporting mortgage brokers, lenders, or finance teams in Australian or international markets.



This role focuses on end to end loan processing, application tracking, lender and solicitor coordination, client updates, and settlement support. The role also plays a key part in liaising with brokers, referral partners, lenders, and clients to ensure smooth progress of applications, clear communication, and on time settlements across all files.



Working Hours and Setup:

-Full time role

-8.30 am to 5.30 pm AEST with a one hour break

-Work from home

-Two monitors required

-Stable high speed internet required



Key Responsibilities:

-Provide updates for clients every 2-3 days on their home loan application  

-Contact lenders to make sure the application is processed as promptly  

-Request any additional documents from clients upon request from lender  

-Make sure deposits are available and paid promptly  

-Ensure outgoing and incoming lenders are aligned to ensure settlements take place when due  

-Keep referral partners informed on the progress of loan application  

-Inform solicitor & RM of formal approval of any purchases  

-Confirm with lender that the approval is correct (interest rate and loan amount)

-Likes to be part of team, though can work autonomously 

-High level of attention to detail 

-Motivated self-starter with proven initiative 

-Strong written, presentation, verbal and interpersonal communication skills 

-High level of problem solving  

-Evidence of the practice of a high level of confidentiality 

-Ability to provide support to other tea
mbers, when required.

title: Client Call Coordinator
description:
We are a fast-growing structural engineering firm based in Australia and is currently looking for a confident and composed Client Call Coordinator with a strong direct background in client calls and client meetings and has worked in a coordinator project management before. A full-time role from 7:00 AM to 3:30 pm Philippines time, weekdays only.



This role involves direct communication with clients— particularly those related to project delays, drawing status, or technical concerns. Your key responsibility is to act as the first point of contact on the phone, provide a warm and professional experience for the client, and coordinate internally with our design team to ensure timely resolutions.



We are ideally looking for someone who is comfortable under pressure, has excellent communication skills, and enjoys solving  in a fast-paced environment.

mbers.

title: PARABROKER / LOANS PROCESSOR — AUSTRALIAN MORTGAGE BROKING
description:
PARABROKER / LOANS PROCESSOR — AUSTRALIAN MORTGAGE BROKING

Full-Time | Remote | AEST Hours | PHP 65,000 – 80,000/month



---



WE'RE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO OWNS THEIR FILES.



We're a boutique mortgage brokerage based in Melbourne, Australia. We've been in business for over seven years, we have a strong and growing client book, and we write residential, investment, construction, and SMSF lending.



We need an experienced parabroker or loans processor to join us full-time and permanently. This is a direct hire — you work for us, not an agency, not a BPO. You'll have a direct relationship with the business owners, real responsibility, and a genuine long-term career path.



If you've spent years being one of fifty processors in a call centre environment and you're ready for something different — this is worth your time.



---



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Once our broker has met with the client and made their recommendation, you take over. Your job is to get the loan to settlement — cleanly, completely, and without the broker having to follow up.



That means:



• Reviewing files before lodgement — checking docs, serviceability, and lender policy so nothing gets bounced back

• Submitting applications via NextGen/ApplyOnline and Simpology

• Managing MIRs — chasing docs, responding to lenders, keeping files moving

• Coordinating settlement with solicitors, conveyancers, and lenders

• Keeping clients updated so they never have to wonder what's happening

• Maintaining MyCRM accurately at every stage

• Supporting brokers with lender policy research and Quickli serviceability scenarios when capacity allows



You won't be micromanaged. We need someone who sees what needs to be done and does it.



---



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU



• At least 3 years working on Australian mortgage files end-to-end — application through to settlement

• Real experience handling MIR responses independently

• Hands-on with NextGen/ApplyOnline or Simpology (both is a big plus)

• Solid understanding of Australian lender policy and NCCP

• Excellent written English — you'll be communicating directly with clients and lenders

• Highly organised and proactive — you manage the pipeline, not the other way around

• Available to work Australian Eastern Standard Time hours



Bonus points if you have experience with SMSF loans, construction files, or complex structures like trusts and guarantors.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



• PHP 65,000 – 80,000/month based on experience

• Full equipment setup — workstation, dual monitors, peripherals, UPS

• Monthly internet allowance

• HMO with dependants covered

• 13th month pay

• Direct working relationship with the business owners

HOW TO APPLY

We look forward to hearing from you.

title: E-Commerce Marketing Coordinator
description:
Role

We arere hiring an E-Commerce Marketing Director to own the full marketing execution of a growing Asian American art and lifestyle brand with 100,000+ social media followers. 



This brand was built on cultural storytelling and founder authenticity. We sell original watercolor art-printed products — tote bags, tea towels, Swedish dish cloths, art prints — and our flagship product, the Ultimate Journal Bag. The founder creates the content and the products. Your job is to make sure every marketing channel is running, optimized, and generating revenue without her involvement.



We are looking for someone who has run
 programs, managed paid ads, built affiliate pipelines, and handled wholesale outreach — and can point to specific, measurable results from each.



If you need to be told what to do every week, this is not the right role. If you see a gap and fill it before anyone asks — keep reading!



Responsibilities

- Own the full Klaviyo
 marketing program — planning, writing, designing, scheduling, and reporting. Send 2–3 campaigns per week. 

- Monitor and respond to all customer DMs and
s within 24 hours. Resolve shipping issues, coordinate warehouse replacements, and file insurance claims for lost packages.

- Set up, manage, and optimize paid ad campaigns on Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager. Monitor ROAS, CPC, and CTR daily.

- Research, identify, and contact micro-influencers across art, journaling, home decor, Asian American lifestyle, and stationery niches. 

- Research independent retail stores and initiate personalized wholesale outreach via DM and
. 

- Manage ManyChat automations on Instagram and TikTok. Schedule content using the provided content calendar. Respond to post comments in the founder's voice. Manage affiliate applications, approvals, and discount codes.



Requirements

- Minimum 2 years of hands-on Klaviyo experience — flows built from scratch, not just campaigns sent. You can point to a flow you built and tell us what revenue it generated.

- Minimum 2 years of Meta Ads Manager experience — full campaign structures, not boosted posts. You have managed budgets over $300/day.

- Experience with influencer or affiliate outreach. You know the difference between a gifting campaign that converts and one that doesn't.

- Experience with wholesale outreach or B2B sales communications is a strong advantage.

- Excellent written English. You write in a way that is warm, clear, and on-brand — whether it's an
 subject line, a customer DM, or an influencer pitch.

- Actively uses AI tools — Claude, ChatGPT, or similar — as a core part of daily work.

- Highly organized. You manage your own deadlines, update your own trackers, and never let a follow-up fall through the cracks.



Tools

- Klaviyo, Meta Ads Manager, Instagram,  TikTok Ads Manager, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, 
, ManyChat, Shopify, Faire, Google Docs and Sheets, Claude or ChatGPT.



Results

-
 revenue contributing 25%+ of monthly DTC revenue within 90 days.

- All core Klaviyo automated flows built, tested, and live within 60 days.

- Meta Ads maintaining 3.0x+ ROAS at scaled daily spend.

- TikTok Ads generating measurable attributed revenue within 90 days.

- 5+ wholesale accounts opened or in active negotiation within 90 days.

 - 15–20 active influencer relationships in the pipeline within 90 days.

- Founder fully removed from day-to-day marketing execution within 90 days.



Compensation

$10-$15/hour. 20-25  hours per week to start. Strong potential to grow into a full-time role as the business scales. Performance-based rate increase available at 90-day review.



Fully remote. Philippines-based candidates strongly encouraged to apply.



Our Values

Ownership over execution. We don't want someone who completes tasks. We want someone who owns outcomes. The difference is whether you're thinking about results or just checking boxes.

Community first. Our customers feel like they know us because they do. We treat that relationship as the most valuable thing we have.

Proactive over reactive. If you wait to be told there's a problem, you're already behind. The right person for this role spots gaps, flags them early, and brings solutions — not just updates.

Quality over volume. Every
, every ad, every customer reply represents this brand. We would rather send fewer things that are excellent than more things that are mediocre.



How to Apply

Send your application to 
 with the subject line: "Marketing Director — [Full-Name]"

Include the following at the top of the
 SUNSET. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1. Introduction: Your name, location in the Philippines, and summary of your marketing background and what makes you the right fit for this role.

2. Klaviyo experience: Describe a flow or campaign you built from scratch. What was the objective, what did you build, and what did it generate in revenue or engagement?

3. Paid ads experience: Describe a Meta or TikTok campaign you managed. What was the budget, what was the ROAS or result, and what would you do differently?

title: Salesforce CRM Workflow & Automation Specialist (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
This role is NOT customer support,
 marketing, or VA work.

Please only apply if you have experience building CRM workflows and automation systems.



We are looking for someone to build and improve our Salesforce CRM system so that our sales and operations processes run smoothly, consistently, and without missed steps.



This is not a basic admin role.



We need someone who understands how businesses actually operate, from lead through to delivery, and can build a system that supports both day-to-day execution and long-term growth.



 



 About the business



We are a promotional products and branded merchandise company.-import some products from China, export to Europe from UK



Our workflow is operational and multi-step, not just a simple sales pipeline.



A typical job includes:



* Lead or enquiry (new or existing customer)

* Quote creation

* Artwork collection

* Visuals and proofing

* Approval (DocuSign)

* Payment (Xero)

* Supplier coordination

* Delivery tracking

* Customer follow-up



Some jobs include multiple products and multiple suppliers, so the system needs to handle complexity clearly.



 Systems and integrations



We use multiple systems and want Salesforce to be the central source of truth:



* Apollo – lead sourcing and enrichment

* WooCommerce – orders and product data

* Klaviyo –
 marketing, customer communication, repeat order flows

* DocuSign – approvals and sign-off

* Dropbox – artwork and file storage

* Xero (via Breadwinner) – invoicing and payments



We want a clean flow from Apollo leads and WooCommerce orders into Salesforce, through to approval, payment, delivery, and ongoing customer communication.



 

 What you will be doing



* Design and improve our Salesforce workflow from enquiry through to delivery

* Structure jobs, products, and suppliers clearly

* Build automation to reduce manual work and prevent errors

* Manage lead flow from Apollo into Salesforce, including deduplication and assignment

* Connect and manage integrations across WooCommerce, Klaviyo, DocuSign, Dropbox, and Xero - some will already be integrated

* Ensure approvals, payments, and production steps are properly controlled

* Build a clear daily working view for the team

* Identify where deals or jobs get stuck and resolve those blockages

* Create simple dashboards showing pipeline health, follow-ups, and bottlenecks





Customer growth and repeat orders



This role is not just about building a system. It is about helping the business grow.



You should understand how to:



* Generate repeat orders from existing customers

* Re-engage past or inactive clients

* Segment customers (new, active, high-value, inactive)

* Support communication and campaigns via Klaviyo

* Align Salesforce data with marketing to drive ongoing revenue



---



## What we are looking for



* Strong workflow and systems thinking

* Understanding of sales team behaviour and where deals get stuck

* Ability to identify and fix process bottlenecks

* Experience building CRM processes  (Salesforce or similar) 

* Comfortable with automation and integrations

* Understanding of customer lifecycle and repeat business

* Ability to simplify complex processes into something usable

* Able to work independently and think logically



---



  Nice to have



* Salesforce administration or configuration experience

* Experience with Apollo, WooCommerce, or Klaviyo

* Experience with APIs, webhooks, or automation tools

* Experience with operational workflows, not just sales pipelines



---



 Not a fit if you are mainly



* A VA focused on data entry

* Focused only on basic CRM administration

* Using tools like Zapier or Make without broader system thinking

* Unfamiliar with how sales teams operate

* Unable to identify process bottlenecks



---



 Details



* Part-time (approximately 15 hours per week)

* Remote

* Rate based on experience

* Initial two-week trial period



---



 To apply, please answer the following:



1. Briefly describe a system or workflow you have built or improved

2. How would you structure a process with quote, artwork, approval, payment, and delivery?

3. How would you handle one job with multiple products and suppliers?

4. Where do sales processes usually break down, and how would you fix that?

5. How would you use Salesforce and Klaviyo to generate repeat business?

6. What would you focus on in your first two weeks?

7. Your hourly rate

 



 Final note



Please do not send a generic application.



We are specifically looking for someone who understands workflow, sales behavior, and how to build systems that improve both operations and revenue.

s from our team. Your job is to call these contacts, confirm they received the

ed. You are following up, having a brief professional conversation, and scheduling a 15-minute introduction call.

s already sent to IT directors, managers, and executives

  - Previous work in IT services, SaaS, or technology-related appointment setting



To Apply:



Send a short voice recording (30-60 seconds) introducing yourself in English, along with your resume. This helps us evaluate your communication style. Tell us about your experience with outbound calling and why you'd be a good fit.

title: Influencer & Partnership Development Specialist (Performance-Based, High-Quality Outreach)
description:
We are a licensed real estate company in Japan working with overseas investors.



This is NOT a VA or admin role.

This is a thinking role focused on outreach and partnerships.



Your job is to identify the RIGHT influencers, brokers, and professionals

and start meaningful conversations that can lead to real business partnerships.



If you rely on copy-paste templates or mass messaging, do NOT apply.



What You Will Do



• Research influencers, brokers, and professionals (US, Singapore, etc.)

• Understand their audience and positioning

• Write personalized outreach messages (Instagram / LinkedIn /
)

• Send only 1 thoughtful follow-up (no spam)

• Track replies and improve message quality



How Performance is Evaluated



We do NOT measure hours.



We evaluate based on:



• Reply rate

• Quality of replies (serious vs low-quality)

• Meaningful conversations started



Trial & Compensation



• 1–2 week paid trial

• Performance-based compensation (no hourly pay)

• Long-term opportunity for high performers



### Compensation Structure (Performance-Based)



This role is fully performance-based.



During both the trial and post-trial period, the same unit-based compensation applies:



• Valid collaboration reply: 500 JPY per reply (approx. 190 PHP)  

• Confirmed meeting booked: 3,000 JPY per meeting (approx. 1,140 PHP)  



 A reply only counts if it shows real interest in collaboration  

 Meeting payment applies only when a call is actually scheduled  



There is no fixed salary or hourly pay.



After the trial period:

• No monthly cap on earnings  

• Compensation increases based on output and quality  

• Additional incentives or bonuses may be added over time for strong performers  



Top performers can generate significant monthly income depending on performance.





 IMPORTANT – DO NOT APPLY IF



• You use copy-paste templates

• You send mass messages without thinking

• You cannot explain your strategy



 REQUIRED TO APPLY (MANDATORY)



To apply, you MUST complete the following task:



 Task: Write a REAL outreach message



Choose ONE of the following:



• A US-based real estate influencer

• A broker with international clients



Then submit:



 Cold DM

 A personalized outreach message (no templates)



 Follow-up message

 Only ONE follow-up



 Strategy explanation

 Why this message would get a reply

 What response you are trying to get



 Target link

 Instagram / LinkedIn / Website of the person you chose



 Applications will be rejected if:



• Messages look generic

• No personalization

• No explanation

• Target is not relevant



After the trial, compensation will be fully performance-based, 

linked to qualified conversations and partnership outcomes.

title: YouTube Video Editor (Faceless Content, Cash Cow | High Retention | Long-Term)
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a skilled YouTube video editor to join our team.



Your main responsibility is to turn scripts and voiceovers into engaging, high-retention videos by selecting the right clips and editing them in a way that keeps viewers watching.



This is NOT high-end animation work or anything crazy advanced.

We are looking for someone who understands:



- pacing

- storytelling

- flow

- and how to keep videos interesting



Your Goal



Create videos that:



- are fast-paced and never boring

- match the script perfectly

- use the right clips at the right time

- maximize viewer retention and watch time





What You’ll Get



- Script

- Voiceover

- Clear SOP / guidelines

- Reference videos



Your Tasks



- Source and select relevant clips (stock / YouTube / movie clips etc.)

- Edit videos according to script and voiceover

- Maintain fast pacing and strong flow

- Add simple zooms, cuts, and visual changes

- Ensure smooth and clean editing



Important



This role is NOT about fancy effects.



It is about:



- choosing the right clips

- understanding timing

- keeping viewers engaged



Content & Copyright Awareness (VERY IMPORTANT)



You must understand how "YouTube reused content rules" work.



- Do NOT copy or reuse long clips

- All footage must be transformed and edited

- Clips are only used as supporting visuals, not as main content

- Videos must feel original and unique



We will provide SOPs for this, but you should already understand the basics.



Output Expectation



- 3 videos per day (on average), 20-30 min long each

- Consistent quality

- Fast turnaround



Requirements



- Proven experience in video editing (YouTube preferred)

- Strong understanding of pacing and storytelling

- Ability to match visuals to voiceover

- Good sense for engaging content (not boring)

- Understanding of YouTube reused content / copyright basics

- Ability to follow SOPs AND make your own decisions

- Reliable and consistent



Not a Fit If



- You are a beginner with 0 experience

- You rely heavily on templates

- You don’t understand pacing or retention

- You copy clips without transforming them

- You are not aware of YouTube content policies



Ideal Candidate



- Has edited YouTube videos before (faceless content, cash cow videos)

- Understands how to keep viewers watching

- Can work fast without losing quality

- Thinks like a content creator, not just an editor



Compensation



- To be discussed (based on experience)

- Opportunity for long-term work

- Potential for increased workload

- Bonuses for high performing videos with high retention!



How to Apply



Please include:



1. 2–3 examples of videos you edited

2. Brief explanation of your editing style

3. Your availability (hours per week)

4. Your expected rate



Final Note



We are building a long-term team.



If you understand how to create engaging, high-retention videos, this can turn into a long-term position with very lucrative incentives.



Please write “RETENTION” at the top of your application so we know you read everything.

title: Partnerships & Growth Manager (Short-Term Rentals & B2B)
description:
Location: Remote

Type: Full-Time / Part-Time (Flexible)

Compensation: Commission + Retention Bonuses (Base to be discussed)



Role Overview

We are a UK-based short-term rental operator managing a growing portfolio of serviced accommodation. We are seeking a proactive and commercially driven Partnerships & Growth Manager to increase occupancy, secure repeat long-stay bookings, and build strong B2B relationships.



This role is focused on reducing reliance on Airbnb by developing consistent, direct booking channels through corporate and contractor partnerships.



Key Responsibilities

1. Corporate & Contractor Booking Acquisition (Primary Focus)

Identify and target construction companies, contractors, relocation agencies, insurance housing providers, and event/film crews

Secure weekly and monthly bookings across multiple units

Build a pipeline of repeat, high-value clients

2. Outbound Sales & Lead Generation

Conduct daily outreach via phone,
, and LinkedIn

Proactively source companies requiring regular accommodation

Develop consistent deal flow

3. Relationship Management

Maintain ongoing relationships with clients

Encourage repeat bookings and long-term partnerships

Shift clients toward direct booking channels

4. Direct Booking Growth

Promote direct booking incentives

Reduce reliance on third-party platforms

5. Deal Negotiation

Structure weekly/monthly rates, bulk discounts, and minimum stays

Focus on occupancy consistency over short-term pricing peaks

6. Pipeline & CRM Management

Track leads, deals, and repeat clients

Maintain accurate records using CRM tools (e.g., HubSpot, Zoho, or Google Sheets)



Ideal Candidate



Must Have:

Strong sales or business development experience

Confidence in phone-based outreach

Fluent English (spoken and written)

Ability to build long-term relationships



Bonus:

B2B or corporate sales experience

Property or serviced accommodation experience

LinkedIn outreach and CRM familiarity



Personality Fit

Relationship-focused (not just transactional)

Persistent and resilient

Commercially aware

Long-term thinker



Compensation

Commission: £50–£150 per booking

OR

5–10% of first month’s booking value



Retention Bonus:

Additional bonus for repeat bookings within 60–90 days



Base salary:

To be discussed during the interview process



What Success Looks Like

Month 1–2:

Active outreach and pipeline development



Month 3:

First repeat clients and direct bookings



Month 6:

Consistent non-Airbnb revenue stream

Reduced platform dependency



Important

This is not a virtual assistant role or a passive admin position.

This is a revenue-generating role focused on building long-term business stability.



How to Apply

Please submit:

A short introduction

Relevant experience in sales or partnerships

A voice note or short video demonstrating your communication skills

Examples of past deals or outreach experience (if available)



We are looking for someone who is confident, proactive, and motivated by performance-based rewards.
