title: Finance Loan Processor
description:
We are an Australian based company seeking an experienced Finance Loan Processor to support our Finance Broking Operations team.



This is a full time, long term, work from home role for a highly organised finance professional based in the Philippines who has strong experience supporting mortgage brokers, lenders, or finance teams in Australian or international markets.



This role focuses on end to end loan processing, application tracking, lender and solicitor coordination, client updates, and settlement support. The role also plays a key part in liaising with brokers, referral partners, lenders, and clients to ensure smooth progress of applications, clear communication, and on time settlements across all files.



Working Hours and Setup:

-Full time role

-8.30 am to 5.30 pm AEST with a one hour break

-Work from home

-Two monitors required

-Stable high speed internet required



Key Responsibilities:

-Provide updates for clients every 2-3 days on their home loan application

-Contact lenders to make sure the application is processed as promptly

-Request any additional documents from clients upon request from lender

-Make sure deposits are available and paid promptly

-Ensure outgoing and incoming lenders are aligned to ensure settlements take place when due

-Keep referral partners informed on the progress of loan application

-Inform solicitor & RM of formal approval of any purchases

-Confirm with lender that the approval is correct (interest rate and loan amount)



Required Experience and Skills:

-2 years' Experience working in a similar role

-Ability to prioritise and meet critical deadlines

-Likes to be part of team, though can work autonomously

-High level of attention to detail

-Motivated self-starter with proven initiative

-Strong written, presentation, verbal and interpersonal communication skills

-High level of problem solving

-Evidence of the practice of a high level of confidentiality

-Ability to provide support to other tea
mbers, when required.



Salary and Benefits:

-Opportunity to balance your career and lifestyle - and WORK FROM HOME!

- Government-Mandated Benefits

- Paid Philippine Public Holiday

-Competitive monthly salary based on experience (inclusive of 7500 non-taxable allowance)

-HMO coverage after six month probation

- 13 days of annual vacation leave per calendar year

- 6 days of annual sick leave

-13th month pay

-Long term role with an Australian company

title: Top notch ecommerce direct reponse video editor
description:
**Video Editor Wanted — Skincare E-Commerce Brand (Direct Response)**



We're a multiple 7-figure skincare brand looking for a video editor who is obsessive about detail, fluent in English, and only delivers work when it's truly ready. No rushing, no cutting corners.



Here's what the opportunity looks like:



We start with an hourly rate of $10/hr while we get to know each other. After a few weeks, if the fit is right, we move to a $1,200/month retainer — plus heavy performance bonuses for every winning ad you edit. There's also real salary growth on the table as you prove yourself.



**What we need from you:**



- Proven experience in e-commerce direct response video editing

- Strong eye for what makes an ad convert, not just look good

- Able to handle around 8–10 concepts per week, ranging from 1 to 5 minutes in length

- Comfortable with AI tools (we'll provide a full SOP — we primarily use Heygen)

- Experienced in sourcing b-roll from TikTok, YouTube, Google, and beyond

- Someone who is self-directed, driven, and takes ownership



When you apply, include your proven portfolio — we want to see real work, ideally direct response or e-commerce ads you've edited. Qualified applicants will receive a paid trial task before anything is made official.



We're not looking for someone who does "good enough." We're looking for someone who can't submit work they're not proud of.



To apply, start your message with: *"I am ready to take this to the next level."*



Only apply if you have real experience in e-commerce direct response editing and are genuinely hungry to grow.

Job description:



About the Role

We are looking for highly experience in Executive Assistant with a minimum of 5 years work experience. This is a mid-level hybrid role sitting at the intersection of creator acquisition and operational excellence. You will be the engine that keeps a steady flow of qualified creators moving into our sales pipeline, and the safeguard that ensures nothing falls through the cracks once a deal is closed.



You will not be running sales calls — our partner handles those. What you will own is everything that happens before and after: sourcing and engaging creators across platforms, filling the partner's calendar with qualified prospects, and then taking full ownership of the contract, onboarding, and setup process from signature through to kickoff.



This role is well suited to someone who has spent two or more years in outreach, partnerships, operations, or a similar function and is ready to take on broader ownership across a full creator lifecycle. You bring structure, initiative, and a closer's mentality to everything you do.



What You Will Be Doing Lead Generation & Outreach



- Proactively source and qualify creators across
, Instagram, and other relevant platforms

- Identify and obtain personal contact information using a combination of manual research techniques and specialist tooling

- Execute outreach via direct messaging and
, with a strong focus on conversion

- Develop and bring your own lead generation ideas and angles alongside established playbooks — we want your thinking, not just your execution

- Build and maintain clean, accurate lead and pipeline records in Airtable with rigorous data hygiene

- Book qualified prospects directly into the partner's calendar for closing calls



Contract Management & Creator Onboarding

- Upon deal closure, assume full ownership of the post-sale process

- Issue contracts reflecting each creator's specific commercial terms — precision here is non-negotiable, as we are legally bound by what is documented

- Manage signature collection and all back-and-forth on amendment requests, including drafting redlines with AI assistance and routing documents through DocuSign

- Set up each signed creator in Google Chat and Notion in accordance with our standard operating procedures

- Schedule kickoff calls with our Head of Client Success to ensure a seamless handover



What We Are Looking ForExperience & Track Record

- 2+ years of experience in a role involving outreach, business development, partnerships, operations, or a closely related function

- Some exposure to cold outreach with measurable results — you do not need an extensive track record, but you should be able to speak to what worked and why

- Experience maintaining records in Airtable, a CRM, or a comparable project management tool

- Prior exposure to contracts or commercial documentation is advantageous but not required



Skills & Attributes

- Closer mentality. You own outcomes, not tasks. If a signed contract is the goal and a creator goes quiet, you follow up — at 48 hours, and again, and again — until it is done. You do not mark something complete until it actually is.

- Highly organised. You maintain clean systems, think in processes, and understand that good records are a business-critical function, not an administrative afterthought.

- Detail-oriented. Particularly around contracts, commercial terms, and data integrity. Errors in these areas have real consequences, and you treat them accordingly.

- Self-starter. You generate your own ideas for lead generation and process improvement rather than waiting to be directed. You see gaps and fill them.

- Clear, professional written English. You write concisely and persuasively — whether drafting a cold outreach message or following up on a contract signature.

- Confident AI user. You actively use tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini for problem-solving, drafting, and contract work. This is not optional — it is part of how we operate.



Practical Requirements

- Reliable equipment and a stable, high-speed internet connection — this is a hard requirement

- Availability across a broad working window; our creators and partners operate across multiple time zones, and flexibility is more important than fixed hours

- preferably from top universities in the Philippines (UP, Ateneo, La Salle, UST)



Why This Role

This is a role with genuine ownership from day one. You will not be executing a narrow set of tasks — you will be responsible for two critical functions of the business and will have the latitude to improve the systems and processes you work within. For the right candidate, it is an opportunity to grow quickly, take on commercially significant responsibilities, and make a visible impact on creator growth.

Send a Loom video explaining:



Your credit repair process from start to finish

How you handle different negative items

An example of a result you have achieved

Speak clearly so we can evaluate your communication skills

title: Compliance  and Enterprise Operations Associate
description:
We're looking for a sharp, organized associate to help us manage our compliance programs and enterprise operations. You'll be joining as our first dedicated compliance hire, which means you'll get real exposure to the full compliance lifecycle, from evidence collection and policy documentation to vendor assessments and customer security questionnaires.



We currently hold SOC 2 Type II certification and are actively working toward ISO 27001 and HIPAA compliance. Looking further ahead, we're planning to pursue FedRAMP and NIST authorizations, and tracking our obligations under the EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA). You won't be expected to own these programs independently on day one, but you'll be a key part of making them run.



What You'll Do:



Compliance Operations & Evidence Management

* Help maintain our SOC 2 program by collecting evidence, organizing documentation, and keeping the compliance calendar up to date, including audits, renewals, assessments, and training.

* Support our ISO 27001 and HIPAA programs as we work toward certification, including helping track gap remediation and keeping records audit-ready.

* Keep our GRC tooling (e.g., Vanta or Drata) organized and well-maintained so evidence is always easy to find and current

* Help monitor upcoming obligations under frameworks like FedRAMP and the EU Cyber Resilience Act by tracking deadlines, documentation requirements, and open action items



Policies, Controls & Risk

* Help write, update, and maintain compliance-related policies and procedures.

* Track remediation of identified risks and gaps, and follow up with internal owners to keep things moving

* Flag areas that look inconsistent, outdated, or unclear, and propose practical improvements



Vendor & Third-Party Management

* Help manage the vendor risk assessment process, filling out and reviewing security questionnaires, coordinating BAAs and DPAs, and keeping the vendor inventory current

* Follow up with internal stakeholders to collect the information needed to complete third-party reviews



Cross-Functional Support

* Serve as a point of contact for customer security questionnaires and trust-related inquiries, with support from leadership on complex items

* Coordinate internally to get the right information into the right forms without needing to be chased

* Help run annual security awareness training logistics and keep internal compliance documentation clean and usable



What We're Looking For

* 2–3 years of experience in a SaaS or tech environment - We're open to a range of backgrounds, whether that's operations, legal, IT, or something adjacent, as long as you're comfortable in fast-moving software companies. Familiarity with digital signage or cybersecurity is a bonus but far from required.

* Fluent written and spoken English - you can write clearly, structure information well, and communicate professionally with customers and vendors

* Good judgment and initiative: this isn't a narrow, scripted role, so we need someone who can think, ask sensible questions, and help solve problems rather than wait for instructions

* Comfortable working in Google Docs, spreadsheets, and similar tools; quick to learn new platforms

* Some exposure to compliance, security, legal operations, or enterprise paperwork is a plus — but we're happy to teach the right person



Nice to Have:

* Familiarity with GRC tools like Vanta, Drata, or similar

* Any prior exposure to SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, or related frameworks, even if just from coursework or adjacent roles

* Interest in cloud security, privacy regulations (GDPR, CCPA), or enterprise SaaS operations

* Relevant certifications or coursework in information security or compliance



What to Expect:

This is a foundational role with a short path from learning to impact. You'll work directly with senior leadership, see how compliance decisions get made, and build practical experience in an area that's becoming more important every year in enterprise software.

We're not looking for someone to just check boxes — we're looking for someone who is genuinely curious, takes ownership of their work, and wants to grow into a compliance professional over time.

We're committed to flexible, remote-friendly work. You'll be expected to have some overlap with US business hours, but we trust you to manage your time like the professional you are.



Please send your cover letter, CV, and qualifications for the role when applying.

title: Inside Sales Agent Real Estate/ Cold Caller / Full time
description:
We are looking for a motivated and results-driven Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to join our growing real estate team. The Inside Sales Agent will be responsible for managing inbound and outbound leads, nurturing prospects, and setting qualified appointments for our real estate agents.



The ideal candidate is confident on the phone, highly organized, and skilled at building rapport with homeowners and buyers. This role focuses on lead conversion, appointment setting, and CRM management to help drive sales growth for the team.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead Management



Respond to and manage inbound leads from online sources, marketing campaigns, and referrals.



Make outbound calls to nurture leads, including past clients, sphere of influence, internet leads, FSBOs, expired listings, and cold prospects.



Qualify buyer and seller leads through structured discovery conversations.



Identify client needs, motivation, timeline, and price range.



Appointment Setting



Set qualified buyer and seller appointments for real estate agents.



Confirm appointments and ensure prospects are prepared for meetings.



Follow up with leads until they are ready to buy or sell.



Follow-Up & Nurturing



Execute consistent follow-up via calls, text messages, and
s.



Place leads into appropriate nurture campaigns and maintain consistent communication.



Re-engage cold or long-term leads.



CRM Management



Update and maintain accurate lead records in the company CRM.



Track communication, appointment status, and lead progression.



Tag leads appropriately and ensure proper pipeline management.



Lead Conversion Tracking



Monitor and report key metrics such as:



Calls made



Contacts made



Appointments set



Appointments showed



Maintain accountability for follow-up and conversion activities.

title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (Google + ChatGPT + AI Platforms)
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing digital growth company operating two core brands:



Referwo – an influencer marketing platform helping brands scale through creators and track ROI

Elinix AI – a growth partner for ecommerce brands, focused on website optimisation,
 revenue systems, and AI-driven marketing



We also manage SEO and growth strategies for a portfolio of ecommerce and service-based clients globally.



Role Overview



We are looking for a results-driven SEO & AI Search Specialist to join us on a part-time basis, with a clear pathway to transition into a full-time role based on performance.



You will take ownership of organic growth across:



Google search

AI search platforms such as ChatGPT and emerging AI discovery engines

Content-driven SEO across websites and landing pages



This role goes beyond traditional SEO. You will play a key role in positioning our brands and clients for the future of search.



Key Responsibilities



1. Google SEO Strategy & Execution

Develop and execute SEO strategies for Referwo, Elinix AI, and client websites

Perform keyword research, competitor analysis, and search intent mapping

Optimise on-page SEO including metadata, internal linking, content structure, and technical SEO

Drive organic traffic, rankings, and conversions



2. AI SEO (ChatGPT & AI Search Optimisation)

Optimise content to be discoverable in AI tools like ChatGPT and other AI search platforms

Structure content for AI retrieval, summarisation, and citation

Implement strategies for entity recognition, topical authority, and semantic SEO

Monitor and improve how brands appear in AI-generated responses



3. Content Strategy & Execution

Plan and manage SEO content calendars (blogs, landing pages, guides)

Create or collaborate on content aligned with both ranking and conversion

Ensure content supports both Google SEO and AI discoverability



4. Technical & Performance SEO

Conduct site audits and resolve technical SEO issues (site speed, indexing, schema, etc.)

Implement structured data and best practices for modern search

Track and analyse performance using tools like Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs, SEMrush



5. Client SEO Management

Manage SEO strategies across multiple client accounts

Provide clear reporting on rankings, traffic, and ROI

Continuously identify growth opportunities and optimisation strategies



Requirements



Proven experience in SEO (agency or in-house)

Strong understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

Experience with SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, SurferSEO, etc.)

Understanding of AI search trends and how LLMs retrieve and rank content

Ability to think strategically and execute hands-on



Bonus Points



Experience optimising for AI tools such as ChatGPT or Perplexity

Knowledge of semantic SEO and entity-based optimisation

Experience in ecommerce SEO (Shopify preferred)

Understanding of conversion optimisation and content funnels



Role Structure



Part-time role (flexible hours)

Opportunity to transition into a full-time position based on performance and results

Exposure to multiple brands and industries

Direct impact on growth and strategy



What We’re Looking For



Someone who understands that search is evolving beyond Google

A proactive problem-solver who can test, learn, and iterate quickly

A results-focused individual who cares about impact, not just rankings



What You’ll Be Working On



Scaling Referwo’s organic acquisition and brand visibility

Growing Elinix AI’s inbound leads through SEO and AI search

Improving SEO performance across a portfolio of client brands



How to Apply



Please include:



Your portfolio or case studies

Examples of SEO results you’ve achieved

Any experience with AI search optimisation

title: Video Editor for High Retention Direct Response Ads
description:
We’re looking for a video editor who knows how to create fast-paced, high-retention ad creatives for both short-form and longer-form videos up to 3 minutes.



Ideally, you’ve worked on direct response ads before and understand what actually matters in ad creative editing like building strong hooks, keeping attention, and helping move the viewer towards clicking through.



We’re also looking for someone who is comfortable using AI tools as part of the creative process, including things like AI avatars, AI-generated b-roll, and other AI-assisted workflows that can help improve speed and creative output.



You’d be a great fit if you:



* Have experience editing short-form ad videos

* Can also edit longer-form ads up to around 3 minutes

* Understand direct response marketing

* Know how to structure videos for retention

* Can make videos feel dynamic with quick cuts, captions, b-roll, callouts, zooms, and pattern interrupts

* Understand how the first few seconds can make or break a video

* Are comfortable using AI tools to support the editing and creative process



Bonus points if you have experience with:



* AI avatars

* Creating AI-generated b-roll

* AI-assisted video workflows

* UGC ads

* Ecommerce ads

* VSL-style creatives

* Health, beauty, or direct response offers



What we need:



* Someone who can take raw footage or existing assets and turn them into compelling ad creatives

* Someone who understands hooks, pacing, and how to keep viewers engaged

* Someone who can produce multiple variations and test different angles when needed

* Someone who can bring new ideas to the table using both traditional editing and AI-assisted creative workflows



Compensation:

We’re willing to pay well for the right person, especially if you have strong direct response experience and can consistently deliver high quality work. We also offer performance-based bonuses for creatives that perform well.



To apply, please send:



* A short intro

* Your portfolio

* Samples of ad creatives you’ve edited

* Any examples of direct response work

* Examples of any AI avatar, AI b-roll, or AI-assisted creative work you’ve done

* A few sentences on how you approach hooks and retention

* Your preferred editing software and AI tools

* Your availability



Please start your application with the word "DR". Applications that do not include this may not be reviewed.



We’re looking for someone who really understands ad creative and performance, not just basic video editing.

title: Associate Project Manager (Remote - Night shift)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.







----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Are you a process-driven IT graduate who takes pride in making complex tech transitions feel effortless for clients?



At itGenius, we need an Associate Project Manager who acts as the engine room behind our promise to deliver “Tech Done” seamlessly, every time. Reporting to the Head of Projects, you’ll manage end-to-end Google Workspace migrations, keep clients informed at every step, and build the kind of delivery experience that makes itGenius the most reliable partner a small business can have.



itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 40+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here's what you’ll get:



Competitive Compensation & Bonuses:

December Bonus

Performance Incentive Bonus

Regular Annual Salary Increases as you grow with us



Time Off That Matters:

Paid Leaves after regularization

Paid National/Local Holidays



Work & Life Experiences You’ll Remember:

Annual Team Conferences & Events – Travel, food and accommodations on us!



Investing in Your Growth:

Budget for Training & Development

Career Growth Pathways



Support to Help You Thrive:

HMO Allowance – Your health is our priority

Government-Mandated Benefits – SSS, PAGIBIG, PhilHealth

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Job Overview:

As an Associate Project Manager, you are the engine room of our “Tech Done” promise. You aren’t just managing tasks you’re building the pipes that allow our customers to scale. You’ll bridge the gap between complex technical migrations and the human experience, embodying our goal to be the “Amazon Prime of IT”: highly responsive and more convenient than anyone else in the market.



This is an entry-level role designed for a process-oriented IT graduate who loves order and efficiency. Reporting to the Head of Projects, you will manage end-to-end Google Workspace migrations and technical setups making every client transition seamless, frictionless, and world-class.





Core Accountabilities:

The Associate Project Manager is held accountable for the following objectives:



1. On-Time Delivery: Ensure all assigned projects (Migrations, DNS fixes, Blueprints) are completed within the agreed-upon SLA.

2. Data Integrity: Maintain 100?curacy of project data within our CRM and PM tools, ensuring the “lake” of fish is correctly cataloged.

3. Process Adherence: Strictly follow itGenius SOPs to ensure every delivery is repeatable and scalable, minimizing custom “rain cloud” work.

4. Communication Excellence: Proactively manage customer expectations so they feel “Trusted” and supported throughout their journey.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Project Coordination: Execute the day-to-day administrative tasks required for Google Workspace migrations and technical setups.

2. Client Onboarding: Act as the primary point of contact across the entire project, guiding clients through their technical prerequisites, until project completion.

3. Technical Support Synergy: Leverage your 2 years of support experience to troubleshoot basic deployment issues before escalating to senior engineers.

4. Documentation: Update and maintain internal knowledge base articles as processes evolve, particularly regarding AI-assisted workflows.

5. Triage & Reporting: Monitor project health dashboards and provide daily updates to the Project Manager on roadblocks or delays.

6. Stakeholder Updates: Send “Seamless” status updates to clients, ensuring they never have to ask “where are we at?”







Required Qualifications:

- Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology or a related field.

- Experience: Minimum of 1-2 years in an IT Support or Technical Customer Service role.

- Communication: Exceptional written and verbal communication — you bring solutions, not just problems.

- Process Mindset: Deeply process-oriented (you genuinely love checklists and SOPs).

- Technical Literacy: Basic understanding of DNS, cloud environments, and SaaS platforms.



Bonus Points:

- Hands-on experience with Google Workspace Admin or project management tools (Asana, L
) — not required, but a definite plus.





Work Schedule

8-hour shift

Night shift

Monday to Friday

Weekends off

Observance of Philippine holiday

Permanent Work Form Home





You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

If that’s you — show it.

title: Customer Service Specialist (Freight & Logistics)
description:
Location: Australia (Remote)

Hours: 9:00am – 5:00pm (Sydney time)

Type: Full-Time



About InXpress



InXpress provides a powerful, multi-carrier shipping platform that simplifies and optimises logistics for businesses. We give our clients access to leading domestic and international carriers, helping them save time, reduce costs, and streamline their freight operations.



About the Role



We are looking for an experienced Customer Service Specialist with a background in freight/logistics to join our growing team.



This role is critical in supporting our B2B clients with their day to day shipping needs, ensuring a high level of service, fast problem resolution, and proactive communication.



You’ll be the front line for our customers, helping manage shipments, resolve issues, and deliver a best-in-class service experience.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage customer enquiries via phone and
 

• Track and monitor shipments across multiple carriers 

• Proactively resolve delivery issues, delays, and exceptions 

• Liaise with carriers (TNT, StarTrack, DHL, FedEx, etc.) 

• Provide quotes and basic shipping advice to clients 

• Maintain accurate records in CRM and internal systems 

• Build strong, long-term relationships with B2B customers



What We’re Looking For

• Previous experience in freight/logistics (ESSENTIAL) 

• Strong understanding of domestic and/or international shipping 

• Excellent communication and problem-solving skills 

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment 

• High attention to detail and strong organisational skills 

• Experience with CRM systems and freight platforms is a plus 

• Positive, can-do attitude and ability to handle pressure

title: $13 a hour after 90 day trial
description:
WE ARE HIRING – OPERATIONS MANAGER (Remote | Long-Term | Philippines)



We are a financial services company helping individuals and businesses access funding, credit cards, loans, and lines of credit. We are building a high-performance outreach operation and need two sharp, self-managed Operations Managers to build and run their own teams.



---



WHAT THIS ROLE IS:



This is not a task role. You are a team builder and manager.



Your job is to hire, manage, and hold accountable a small team of 3 people under you. You will oversee their daily output, maintain quality standards, and report results directly to the company owner daily.



You will be managing either:



A) A team of 3 Lead Generation Researchers

Each researcher finds 150 verified finance influencer leads per day — Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
 accounts with 
+ followers, real engagement, and confirmed
 addresses. Your team delivers 450 verified leads per day total.



OR



B) A team of 3
 Setters

Each setter sends 150 outreach
s per day to influencer leads using provided templates, pitching a revenue share partnership opportunity. Your team sends 450 outreach
s per day total.



---



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Hire your 3 tea
mbers using onlinejobs.ph

mber who drops off — immediately

- Send a daily update to ownership — leads delivered,
s sent, issues resolved

---

- Strong written English — you will be communicating with your team and ownership daily

- Self-directed and accountable — we do not micromanage

- Understanding of lead generation or outreach operations

- Long-term minded — this role grows as the operation grows

- Someone who takes ownership seriously and doesn't make excuses



---



PAY STRUCTURE:



- $10/hr base pay

- 30 day milestone: $11/hr

- 90 day milestone: $13/hr

- Paid bi-weekly every Friday via PayPal or Wise



This is a long-term role with real earning growth for someone who performs.



---



WHAT YOUR TEA
MBERS EARN:



Lead Generation Researchers: $8/hr

 Setters: $8/hr

Both paid bi-weekly via PayPal or Wise



---



WHO WE ARE HIRING FOR YOUR TEAM:



LEAD GENERATION RESEARCHERS must:

- Search Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and
 daily

- Find finance and business influencer accounts with 10K+ followers

- Verify real engagement — not bought followers or spam accounts

- Find and confirm the
 address for each account

- Submit 150 verified unique leads per day into a shared Google Sheet

- Use their own tool access — we do not provide tools

- Zero duplicates. Zero unverified
s. Quality is non-negotiable.



 SETTERS must:

- Send 150 outreach
s per day using provided templates

- Maintain professional non-spammy communication at all times

- Use their own
 accounts for sending



---



HOW TO GET HIRED:



We do not do traditional interviews.



This is how you get hired immediately:



Reply to this post with 3 confirmed tea
mbers you have already hired for your team — either 3 researchers or 3 setters depending on which role you are applying for.



Each confirmed hire must include:

- Their full name

- Their role — researcher or setter

The first 2 applicants who reply with 3 confirmed hires get the Operations Manager position immediately at $10/hr.

mbers. No exceptions.

title: Amazon Online Sales Expert (AU & UK Markets | Remote)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Amazon Online Sales Expert who can take full ownership of our Amazon accounts and drive consistent sales growth.



This role is for someone who understands Amazon inside and out—from PPC and listings to inventory and profitability. You will be responsible for improving performance, increasing conversions, and ensuring the account runs smoothly.



Responsibilities:

Sales & Account Growth

- Drive overall sales growth and improve product performance

- Improve Best Seller Rank (BSR) across key products

- Maintain strong account health and performance



Inventory Management

- Monitor inventory levels and turnover

- Work with the Supply Chain team to prevent stockouts and overstocking



Listing Optimization

- Collaborate with the Creative team to improve Product Detail Pages and A+ Content

- Increase conversion rates through continuous optimization



Amazon PPC Management

- Manage and optimize Amazon Ads campaigns (AU & UK)

- Monitor performance metrics: CTR, CPC, CVR, ACOS, ROAS

- Adjust bids, budgets, and targeting to improve results

- Launch and scale new campaigns

- Maintain TACOS within target per product



Data & Strategy

- Analyze sales and traffic data regularly

- Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis

- Identify growth opportunities and implement strategies



Profitability & Reporting

- Manage and monitor P&L

- Ensure profitability targets are met



Team Collaboration

- Work closely with the Gen VA team for account support



Requirements

- Proven experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts

- Strong knowledge of Amazon PPC (ACOS, TACOS, ROAS)

- Experience with product listings and conversion optimization

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

- Experience handling AU and/or UK marketplaces is a plus

- Experience with other e-commerce platforms such as eBay, Walmart, Home Depot, Shopify, and Chewy is highly preferred



Tools Used

- Helium 10 (H10)

- DataDive

- Scale Insights

- SoStocked



Important Note:

We are a fast-paced company. While we work as a team, each member is expected to take ownership of their role and work independently. Please continue your application only if you are confident that you fully understand the responsibilities of this role.



To Apply, Please include the following:

- Your experience managing Amazon accounts

- Sample results (before/after metrics, if available)

- Tools you have used

- Your expected monthly salary

- A short summary of how you improve TACOS and profitability

title: Salesforce Process & Automation Specialist (Part-Time | Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a Salesforce specialist to help structure and improve our sales and operations workflow. This is not a basic admin role — we need someone who can think, design, and implement practical solutions that the team will actually use.



About the Role



Our business is operationally driven, not just sales-focused.



A typical workflow includes:



Lead / enquiry (Apollo, website, WooCommerce, or existing customer)

Quote creation

Artwork collection (sometimes provided upfront)

Visual production and revisions

Approval via DocuSign

Payment handling (Xero via Breadwinner – proforma or account terms)

Supplier coordination (often multiple products and suppliers per job)

Delivery tracking and confirmation

Customer follow-up and Feefo review



We need this entire process structured in Salesforce so nothing gets missed and everything is visible.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Designing and improving our Salesforce pipeline (Lead ? Opportunity ? Order workflow)

Building practical automations (Flows, validation, task triggers)

Ensuring strong follow-up discipline (teleplanner-style process)

Structuring stages across quote, artwork, approval, payment, and delivery

Improving data quality and consistency

Creating clear dashboards and reporting for visibility

Identifying inefficiencies and implementing improvements

Supporting integration thinking (Xero, DocuSign, WooCommerce, GA)

What We’re Looking For

Solid hands-on Salesforce experience (Admin / Consultant / BA level)

Strong experience with Flows and process automation

Ability to design systems, not just maintain them

Clear, structured thinking — able to break down real-world processes

Experience working with sales + operational workflows

Comfortable working independently without constant direction

Nice to Have

Experience with integrations (e.g. Xero, Zapier, Make, APIs)

Understanding of e-commerce flows (WooCommerce)

Experience with quoting, order management, or production workflows

What This Role Is NOT

Not basic data entry

Not just user support

Not a purely theoretical role



We are looking for someone who can take ownership and improve how we work.



Working Setup

Part-time: ~15-20 hours per week

Remote

Flexible working hours

Rate:  depending on experience

How to Apply



Please include:



A brief example of a Salesforce process or automation you have built or improved

How you would approach structuring a workflow that includes:

quote ? artwork ? approval ? payment ? delivery

Your hourly rate

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 355 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: AI AUTOMATION & DEVELOPER — APEX VELOCITY
description:

title: PART-TIME COLD CALLER (HIGH BONUS) - Senior Sales
description:
**YOU MUST SEND A VIDEO OR AUDIO RECORDING OF YOURSELF**



EARN BIG — PERFORMANCE BONUS



This is not a normal calling job.



You are booking meetings for deals worth:



$2,500/month

$5,000/month

$10,000/month



Commission:



5% of 1st month deal value (month-to-month deals)

5% x 3 months (for annual deals)



Example:

Close a $5,000 deal = $250–$750 bonus



Our reps close at least 2 deals per month.



ROLE



We are looking for a sharp, confident part-time cold caller to book qualified meetings.



2–3 hours per day

~10–15 hours per week

~40–60 hours per month



Target:

2 meetings booked per week by Day 45



HOW YOU WILL CALL



You will use:

Calls direct mobile numbers + work lines

Fast, efficient, high connection rates



2. Manual HQ Dialing



Calling main company lines

Navigating to decision-makers



LEADS (IMPORTANT)

All leads are:



Highly targeted (ICP-driven)

Pre-qualified companies

Already likely to need / want our service



This is surgical outreach, not spam calling.



SUPPORT



You will NOT be alone.



You get:



Proven scripts + frameworks

Founder + senior sales coaching

Real-time support from team

Clear positioning and messaging



WHAT WE NEED

Strong English speaking (clear + confident)

Comfortable talking to US business owners

High energy, resilient, not afraid of rejection

Sales mindset (not just “calling”)



NOT FOR YOU IF:

You want easy work

You need constant supervision



PERFECT FOR:

Experienced cold callers

BDRs / appointment setters

Hungry performers who want upside



APPLY



Send:



Short voice recording (1–2 mins introducing yourself)

Your experience with cold calling

Why you want this role

title: Creative Strategist / CMO
description:
We’re looking for a Creative Strategist / CMO to help us scale a fast-growing agency working with local service businesses (painters & window companies) running Meta ads.



?? This role is NOT just about making ads…



The goal is to create high-performing ad concepts, copy, and frameworks that we can PRODUCTIZE and deploy across multiple clients.



This is not a "make ads and see what sticks" role. We need someone who thinks in systems. One winning angle should become 12 variations across 6 clients. If you've never productised creative before, this isn't the right fit.



What you’ll be responsible for:

• Managing our fulfillment team (AI content generation + video editors)

• Creating NEW ad concepts, scripts, and creative angles

• Writing ad copy, hooks, and headlines that convert

• Building repeatable frameworks/templates we can reuse across clients

• Developing scroll-stopping visuals and variations

• Leading creative direction across all accounts

• Turning winning ads into scalable systems



You’re a great fit if you:

• Have experience with Meta ads (especially for local services)

• Understand direct response + performance marketing deeply

• Think in frameworks, not just one-off ideas

• Can turn winning creatives into repeatable systems

• Are organized and can manage a team effectively



What we need from you

• Direct response background. Meta ads experience for local service businesses specifically. You need to understand that a painter's customer is not a SaaS buyer, and the copy should sound nothing like one.

• You think in frameworks and you document them. If your creative process lives in your head, that's a problem here.

• You can manage people without babysitting them. Two editors, one AI specialist. Clear briefs, fast feedback, no drama



Details:

• Remote (US hours: 9AM–5PM)

• Pay: $5–$8/hour (based on experience & results)

• Long-term opportunity with serious upside



To apply:

Comment “APPLE” below and send a Loom video explaining:



Your past experience

Campaigns or results you’ve worked on

How you come up with ad creatives

How you would turn winning ads into repeatable frameworks



We’re looking for someone who can help us build a machine — not just make ads.



Let’s scale. ????

title: Customer Experience & Operations Associate (E-commerce Coffee Company) *Full Time, Remote | Long-Term Growth Opportunity
description:
Are you ready…

To start a role that motivates and excites you?

And a position where we invest in your learning, education, and growth?



Then keep reading, we want to work with you!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS POSITION:

This is not your typical support role — you’ll work directly with our founders, influence company-wide systems, and gain exposure to every part of the business.



Incredible company culture:

• Small, close team with collaborative, friendly and open culture.

• We believe the biggest asset of a company is our people. We focus on helping each tea
mber reach their full potential by investing in their learning, growth, skills, and education. When we grow as individuals, we succeed as a team.

• Not a fan of office politics or drama? We’re on the same page. Instead of wasting time with that, we focus on solving problems and reaching goals

• 100% remote, enjoy the comfort and flexibility of working from home



Pay, benefits, progression, and long-term growth:

• Competitive salary

• Benefits including up to 16 days a year Paid Time off

• Progression as we grow: greater responsibilities, leadership opportunities, and increased pay.

• Feel empowered, make decisions, have an impact

• Grow with the company and live up to your potential!

• Join an exciting, fast-growing company!







ABOUT US:

We’re a young, ambitious, and small (but growing!) company that’s making a massive impact in ecommerce. 



Since 2015 we’ve been obsessed with building award-winning products and awesome brands that people fall in love with. We have 2 primary brands in our portfolio: 

(1) an international award-winning coffee products brand 
 / 
).

(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: Remote Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Follow-Up Specialist, Path to Closer (Web Solutions Company)
description:
Company: A web solutions company

Location: 100% remote (Philippines-based)

Type: Full-time, long-term

Start date: We will contact applicants for interviews and onboarding in 2-4 weeks



About the role:



We are a web solutions company expanding our sales efforts, starting with the Estonian market and later moving into the US and other European countries.



You will primarily work with leads already provided to you. You will manually manage follow-ups using our client portal and your own
. You will also have the opportunity to generate additional leads on your own via LinkedIn outreach and phone calls, which can earn you extra performance pay. Strong performers will have the opportunity to transition into a full closing role a few months later on as we expand, particularly when targeting English-speaking markets.

This is a genuine growth opportunity with clear progression for those who deliver results.



Key responsibilities:



- Follow up on provided leads using our client portal and your own
.

- Nurture leads through consistent
 and phone communication to move them forward in the sales process.

- Generate additional leads via LinkedIn and phone calls to earn extra pay.

- Keep accurate records in our CRM.

- Learn our web solutions offerings thoroughly and represent the company professionally.

- Meet weekly targets for outreach volume, connections made, and leads progressed.



Requirements:



- Near-perfect English — both written and spoken (this is non-negotiable).

- Experience in sales, lead generation, cold calling, or customer service is a big plus.

- Self-motivated, persistent, organized, and comfortable working remotely.

- Reliable laptop, good headset, and stable high-speed internet.

- Willingness to adjust some hours for the Estonian market (some evening availability in Philippine time will be needed).

- Fast learner and coachable.



What we offer:



- Base salary of $600 USD per month for the entry-level position.

- Quick advancement opportunities within 2–3 months for top performers, with higher responsibility and increased earning potential.

- Performance-based pay and commissions on top of the base salary, including extra pay for additional self-generated leads (details will be discussed during the selection process).

- Opportunity to transition into a closing role later on as the company expands into US and EU markets.

- Paid training on our products, sales process, tools, and scripts.

- All necessary tools provided (CRM, client portal access, etc.).

- Long-term stable opportunity with a growing company.



How to apply:

Only serious applicants who follow instructions will be considered.



- Send your updated resume/CV.

- In the first line of your message, write exactly: “I have near-perfect English and am available for voice interviews.”

Record a short voice message (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself, explaining why you are interested in this sales role, and demonstrating your English speaking ability. Attach or link the voice file (WhatsApp voice note or simple audio file is fine).



We will review applications and reach out to selected candidates for voice interviews in the coming weeks. Thank you in advance to those that apply!

title: Junior Ecommerce Operations Specialist
description:
*About the Role*

We are looking for a Junior Ecommerce Operations Specialist to own the day-to-day execution that keeps our selling channels running smoothly. This means handling invoices, reconciliations, vouchers, bundles, pricing checks and basic reporting accurately and on time, across Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop and our website.

This is a hands-on execution role suited for someone who is detail-oriented, dependable and takes pride in getting things done properly.



*Key Responsibilities:*

- Key in and reconcile invoices from Shopee, Lazada, TikTok, and our website

- Spot and dispute overcharged shipping fees using our checker tools

- Set up and check vouchers, bundles, and campaigns across platforms

- Ensure pricing is consistent across all channels and flag discrepancies

- Send daily and weekly updates to the manager



*What We Are Looking For:*

- Detail-oriented and dependable to follow through without being chased

- Comfortable with spreadsheets and backend platform dashboards

- Clear written communicator

- Experience with any ecommerce platform (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, or similar) is a plus



*Grow With Us*

We are building a team for the long term. There is a clear progression path here from Junior Specialist all the way to Manager level. This role is for people who show up consistently, take ownership and want to keep growing.



*About Us*

CAARTN is a Singapore-based food and gift packaging wholesaler serving home bakers, small F&B businesses, and personal shoppers across Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and our own website. We started in 2020 and have grown steadily by staying focused on quality, accessibility, and keeping our operations tight.

We are a small but structured team and we take operations seriously. Everything we do is built around clear SOPs, honest communication, and doing things right the first time.

title: Experienced Amazon PPC Manager
description:
We move fast. We're obsessed with skincare. And we need someone who eats, sleeps, and breathes Amazon PPC to join our team and take our advertising game to the next level.

If you're the kind of person who gets a rush from watching ACoS drop while sales climb - keep reading.

You'll own our entire Amazon advertising and sales strategy end to end. That means you're not just pushing buttons in a dashboard, you're the person who spots the opportunity everyone else missed, tests the idea no one else thought of, and delivers results that make the whole team look good.

title: Social Media Support Person
description:
We’re seeking a FULL TIME Social Media Support person to work remotely for our business.



We’re offering up to 35,000php per month for this role depending on the quality of candidate... we're looking for people with outstanding attention to detail & dedication and a solid understanding of social media, advertising metrics and scheduling systems.



We’re seeking someone who’s able to work from 9am – 5pm AEST (7am-3pm PH Time) Monday – Friday.



If this sounds like you, please read below and apply!

____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Social Status is a Social Media Agency that aims to become undeniably recognised as the best agency in Australia. We are Social People, and we want to spend our time with like-minded tea
mbers doing what we love & helping each other grow.



We’re expanding the team to increase our capacity for new clients and are looking for an experienced Social Media Support Person to take on some of our repeatable tasks and free up our internal resources.



As a Social Media Marketing Agency, we believe that Social Media is the best marketing channel on the planet & nobody knows it like we do. Social Status offers a fast-paced work environment where you can say goodbye to the mundane monotony encountered in so many other roles.



We work hard and value building meaningful relationships with our teammates & clients while maintaining an exciting, supportive workplace. Our team is consistently pushing to better themselves personally & professionally to increase their success and that of our clients and our business.



This is your opportunity to be a part of one of Australia’s premier agencies and join a team of young, fun individuals working on some of Australia's biggest brands.



About You:



As Social Media Support, you will be a highly organised person with great attention to detail. You'll have an understanding of Social Media Metrics and experience in Social Media Scheduling Platforms (Sked Social, Sprout Social, Agora Pulse, Later, Buffer etc.), you’ll have a excitement for data entry & be fluent in spoken & written English.



You’ll spend your time completing 5 core tasks:



From the 1st – 7th you’ll be exporting Social Media Reports and using AI to craft
s that speak to their results.

From the 13th – 17th you’ll be completing our clients’ Half-Month Check-ins

From the 21st – 30th you’ll be scheduling our content in Agora Pulse for the upcoming month.

All month you'll be monitoring our clients' accounts Community Management, responding to questions, comments, messages from our FAQs and flagging important queries / complaints with our internal team.

You'll also be assisting in Influencer / UGC reach-outs and management using tools like Gifted.



What will your day look like?



- Exporting Social Media Reports & filling in
 templates to forward to clients

- Completing Half-Month Check-ins for our clients & reporting back to Account Managers

- Scheduling content from Google Sheets into our Scheduling Tool (Sked Social)

- Monitoring and completing Community Management on our clients' social accounts.



What’s in it for you?



- A generous starting salary that is reviewed annually

- A comprehensive training & processes system

- Consistent, repeatable tasks & a supportive team



You'll benefit from:



- A comprehensive training & processes system.

- A collaborative workspace and nurturing environment.

- A great company culture.

- Working with a group of legends who make work fun rather than a chore.



We would love you to have:



- 3+ years Social Media Marketing experience.

- Perfect Written & Spoken English

- Impeccable attention to detail

- Strong Understanding of Social Media Metrics (reach, engagement, engagement rate, click-through rate, cost per click etc.)

- Solid Understanding of Western Culture & Language

- Exceptional Time Management

- Well Organised

- Proactive tea
mber who looks for opportunities for improvement.



Once you have applied for the role, we will review your resume and get back to you if we would like to discuss further.



We're looking for someone who can work 7am - 3pm Philippines time and has a track record of successful social media support & data entry.



Please let us know your past experience and why you're the right person for the role. Include any past examples of social media work you've completed.

___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Why you will love us!



If this sounds like you, we can offer you a challenging and rewarding environment that supports your career goals and aspirations. You will also be getting involved with one of Australia’s premier digital marketing agencies.



Interested?



Go on then, we invite you to apply. We can’t wait to see your application pop up!



So…what happens next?



Once you have applied for the role, we will review your resume and get back to you if we would like to discuss further.

Office Location: Woodland Hills, CA 91364

Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday – Friday, 9:00AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time

 

Who We Are



With passion and precision, we craft top-quality roofs that enhance homes, build trust, and deliver lasting protection. Our vision is to protect 6,000 homes with quality roofing over the next 10 years.

We are a fast-growing roofing company building a strong internal team of professionals who want stability, growth, and long-term career development.



 

Position Overview



We are seeking an experienced and motivated Bookkeeper to manage financial operations for our growing roofing business. This role is essential to keeping projects profitable, operations smooth, and leadership informed through accurate financial reporting.

This position is ideal for someone who enjoys working in a high-volume, fast-paced environment, has strong accounting fundamentals, and is interested in growing into a senior financial leadership role (Financial Controller) over time.



 



Key Responsibilities

As our Bookkeeper, you will:

• Manage day-to-day bookkeeping and project-level financials.

• Prepare and maintain accurate invoices, bills, and financial records.

• Track job costs, materials, and subcontractor expenses.

• Produce regular profit & loss reports and financial summaries.

• Maintain clean records in QuickBooks Online, CRM, and internal systems.

• Support leadership with financial insights and reporting.

• Ensure deadlines are met and data is accurate across all platforms.



 



What We’re Looking For



-  2+ years of bookkeeping or accounting experience with a USA BASED COMAPNY. - REQUIRED

- Strong knowledge of QuickBooks Online and Excel. - REQUIRED

- Experience in construction, roofing, or contractor-based businesses. – GREAT ADVANTAGE

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail. - REQUIRED

- Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously. - REQUIRED

- Professional communication skills and ability to collaborate with production and management teams.

- Self-motivated, disciplined, and accountable. - GREAT ADVANTAGE



 

Our Core Values



We are looking for someone who aligns with our culture:

• Integrity – Doing the right thing, always.

• Respectful – Treating everyone with professionalism and kindness.

• Disciplined – Following through with precision and consistency.

• Accountable – Taking ownership of work and results.

• Transparent – Communicating openly and honestly.

• Aligned – Working together toward shared goals.

• Results-Oriented – Delivering excellence in everything we do.

 

Why Join Us?



* Growing company with long-term stability.

* Clear path for career advancement into financial leadership.

* Work directly with ownership and decision-makers.

* Supportive, professional, and positive team culture.

* Opportunity to build systems, not just maintain them.

 

Ready to take the next step in your accounting career?

If you’re looking for more than just another bookkeeping role—and want to grow with a company that values both performance and people—we’d love to hear from you. Apply today and help us build something exceptional.

title: FULL-STACK MARKETER & CONTENT STRATEGIST
description:
WHO WE ARE



OptiME Health (
) is a women's telehealth company on a mission to help women break the cycle of generational weight struggles — for good. We combine GLP-1 therapy, clinical expertise, proprietary fitness protocols, nutrition, and real coaching into one transformative program called the OptiME Method. We are founder-led, pre-revenue, and launching soon.



This is not a creative-only role. This is not an admin-only role. This is both — and the person who thrives here understands that great marketing requires equal parts creative instinct and operational discipline.



????????????????????????????????



THE ROLE



You will be OptiME Health's sole marketing engine — owning everything from content creation and video editing to CRM management, campaign execution, analytics, and workflow systems. You are a full-stack marketer: you can shoot and edit a Reel in the morning and build a lead tracking dashboard in the afternoon.



You will report directly to the founder and be expected to move fast, think strategically, and produce results — not just activity.



????????????????????????????????



WHAT YOU WILL OWN



SOCIAL MEDIA & CONTENT (All Platforms)

? Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, X — full ownership

? Short and long-form video creation, editing, and publishing

? Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts, Stories, and long-form content

? Content calendar management across all platforms

? Trend research — identify and act before trends peak

? Captions, hooks, and copy written for real women, not algorithms

? Podcast episode editing and clip distribution

? Platform analytics — track what works, kill what doesn't



MARKETING CAMPAIGN MANAGEMENT

? Execute launch campaigns for programs, hero offers, and promotions

? Coordinate landing pages,
s, and social posts per campaign

? Maintain campaign timelines and checklists

? Ensure consistency across all digital channels



 MARKETING & CRM

? Build and manage
 sequences — welcome, nurture, promotional

? List management, tagging, and segmentation

? CRM flow setup and maintenance

? Intake form and funnel coordination

? Copy must be proofed, compliant, and on-brand



ADS & FUNNEL SUPPORT

? Support Meta and Instagram ad execution

? Upload creatives, copy, and links

? Monitor basic ad performance and flag issues

? Maintain organized ad asset library



WEBSITE, FUNNEL & ASSET MANAGEMENT

? Update website content and landing pages

? Upload lead magnets, PDFs, and resources

? Maintain brand consistency across all digital touchpoints



ANALYTICS, REPORTING & OPTIMIZATION

? Track KPIs: leads, conversions, engagement,
 open rates, social reach

? Prepare weekly performance summaries — delivered every Monday

? Identify what is working and what is not — with recommendations

? Maintain dashboards and tracking sheets



SYSTEMS & SOPs

? Create and maintain SOPs for all marketing workflows

? Keep files, folders, and assets organized

? Manage project trackers (Notion or Google Sheets)

? Ensure nothing falls through the cracks



????????????????????????????????



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This role requires both halves of your brain — creative and analytical. If you are only one, this is not the right fit.



The most important qualities — in order:



1. FULL-STACK MINDSET — You can create a video and build a workflow in the same day. You do not say "that's not my job."



2. RESULTS-DRIVEN — You measure everything. Vanity metrics are not wins. Leads, conversions, and revenue contribution are wins.



3. RELENTLESSLY LEARNING — Social media changes weekly. Algorithms shift. You study constantly and adapt without being asked.



4. SELF-DIRECTED — You do not need to be told what to do every day. You bring a plan and you execute it.



5. PASSIONATE — About women's health, wellness, or healthcare. You do not need a medical degree. You need to genuinely care about the mission.



Skills required:

? Video editing — CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

? Content creation across at least 3 major platforms

? CRM experience — GoHighLevel, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, or similar

?
 marketing — building and managing sequences

? Meta/Instagram ads — execution and basic performance monitoring

? Canva or basic graphic design

? Analytics platforms — social,
, and web

? Project management tools — Notion, Asana, or Google Sheets

? Strong written English — your copy must connect with American women

? Podcast editing is a strong plus



????????????????????????????????



THE CULTURE



We are building something real and we are building it fast. You will have direct access to the founder, genuine creative ownership, and room to grow as OptiME scales. This is an early hire — the person who builds this function owns it long-term.



We welcome pushback and creative disagreement. What we will not work with is someone who resists direction without offering solutions, or who produces effort without outcomes.



????????????????????????????????



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application to: 

Subject line: OptiME Full-Stack Marketer — [Your Name]



Your application must include:



1. A video introduction (2–3 minutes) — no scripts, no reading. Tell us who you are and why this role. Show your personality. Applications without video will not be reviewed.



2. Portfolio — links to content you created AND campaigns or systems you managed. Both sides. Not one or the other.



3. Your resume — highlight any marketing, CRM, campaign, or analytics experience specifically.



4. Answer this one question in writing: "Walk me through a campaign you ran from strategy to results — content,
, and reporting. What did you build and what did the numbers say?"



We read every application. We respond to every one that shows us you mean it.



????????????????????????????????

OptiME Health | 
 |

title: SEO WEB DEVELOPER
description:
We are looking for a Web Developer with strong SEO awareness to build, optimize, and maintain high-performance websites that scale in search visibility and technical quality.



You will work closely with SEO strategists, content teams, and designers to ensure that websites are crawlable, indexable, fast, and semantically structured, while maintaining clean code and excellent user experience.



Responsibilities

 • Develop and maintain websites with SEO-first architecture and clean HTML structure

 • Implement technical SEO best practices (Core Web Vitals, crawl efficiency, indexing control)

 • Optimize page speed, rendering, and server responses (CWV, lazy loading, caching)

 • Ensure proper use of semantic HTML (H1–H6 hierarchy, internal linking, contextual components)

 • Implement and maintain structured data (JSON-LD)

 • Work with log files, redirects, canonicals, pagination, and hreflang

 • Collaborate with SEO teams on scalable, programmatic page generation

 • Identify and fix technical SEO issues across large websites



Requirements

 • Strong experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern web standards

 • Experience with WordPress or similar CMS platforms

 • Solid understanding of technical SEO fundamentals

 • Familiarity with Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse, and PageSpeed Insights

 • Ability to work on large websites with thousands of URLs

 • Attention to detail and clean, maintainable code practices



Nice to Have

 • Experience with programmatic SEO or large-scale content systems

 • Knowledge of server-side rendering, caching layers, or CDN setups

 • Familiarity with SEO tools (Search Console, log analysis, crawlers)



This role is ideal for a developer who understands that code quality, performance, and SEO are deeply connected, and wants to build websites that perform well both for users and search engines.
