title: HR & Talent Operations Manager
description:
**HR & Recruitment Coordinator (People-First, High-Impact Role)**



We’re looking for a sharp, people-first **HR & Recruitment Coordinator** who is technically savvy, highly organized, and ready to take ownership from day one.



This is not a placeholder role — we’re building something real, and we need someone who wants to grow with it.



## **WHAT THIS ROLE OWNS**



**Recruitment (50%)**

* Support and execute recruitment processes — sourcing, screening, and coordinating interviews

* Work closely with leadership to identify and attract **high-quality candidates**

* Maintain an organized and efficient candidate pipeline

* Ensure a strong candidate experience from first touchpoint to onboarding



**Client & Growth Support (25%)**



* Assist in identifying and organizing potential client or candidate opportunities

* Support outreach coordination and follow-ups (non-sales focused)

* Help maintain internal tracking systems and pipelines

* Ensure smooth coordination between recruitment efforts and business needs



**Operations & HR Support (25%)**



* Support onboarding processes to ensure new hires are set up for success

* Assist with offboarding and transitions when needed

* Maintain HR documentation, contracts, and internal systems (Notion)

* Help track team compliance and internal processes

* Support day-to-day operational needs as the company grows



**YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF YOU:**



* Have solid HR or recruitment experience and understand people, process, and accountability

* Are strong at sourcing and identifying the **right candidates, not just filling roles**

* Are highly proficient in **Notion** and enjoy organizing systems

* Have experience with **AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT)** and are eager to use them to work smarter

* Are technically savvy and quick to learn new tools

* Communicate proactively — you update before being asked

* Can handle sensitive situations with professionalism and discretion

* Thrive in a fast-moving, high-standard environment

* Genuinely care about people and team culture



**THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF YOU:**



* Need constant direction to move forward

* Struggle in fast-paced or evolving environments

* View HR as purely administrative

* Are looking for a short-term or side role



**TO APPLY**

Send your resume + a short 1–2 minute introduction.

We move fast — if you’re the right fit, you’ll know quickly.

title: Community Moderator (Discord & Stream Support)
description:
Remote | Contract |

About Us



We are a woman-owned creative studio based in Los Angeles, California working with VTubers, streamers, content creators, and digital brands.

Our focus is building internet-native media such as motion graphics, intro videos, creator branding, thumbnails, announcement videos, website visuals, and social media content.



We are a small but growing creative studio that values collaboration, creativity, and initiative. We are looking for individuals who understand online culture and want to grow with a team from the ground up.



This role will start as contract work with the potential for long-term collaboration as the studio grows.



The Role



You will support 
 communities and live streams by maintaining a positive, engaging, and safe environment for VTubers and their audiences.



This is a part-time, gig-based role focused on moderation, community engagement, and assisting with maintaining the overall tone and structure of online communities.



You will work under the Creative Director and alongside the Social Media & Community team.



What You Will Be Working On



Projects and tasks may include:



• Moderating 
 servers for VTubers and communities

• Assisting with live stream chat moderation

• Supporting community engagement and conversations

• Helping maintain a positive and welcoming environment

• Assisting with simple 
 organization and updates

• Supporting community events and activities



Responsibilities



• Monitor 
 chats and enforce community guidelines

• Moderate live stream chats (Twitch, YouTube, etc.) when needed

• Respond to users in a friendly and on-brand manner

• Identify and handle spam, toxicity, or disruptive behavior

• Support community engagement and encourage conversations

• Assist with onboarding new members and answering basic questions



• Help maintain community tone, language, and overall “vibe”

• Report issues or concerns to Social Media & Community Lead and team

• Assist with basic 
 organization (channels, roles, etc.)

• Support events, announcements, and community activities



• Work collaboratively using tools such as 
 and Trello

• Follow assigned direction and moderation guidelines



What We Are Looking For



• Active 
 user with moderation experience

• Strong understanding of online communities and internet culture

• Familiarity with VTubers, streaming, or gaming communities

• Ability to stay calm and professional in fast-moving chats

• Reliable communication in a remote work environment



A high school diploma or equivalent is acceptable, but relevant moderation or community experience is required.



Preferred



• Experience moderating 
 servers or Twitch/YouTube chats

• Experience in VTuber or streaming communities

• Understanding of 
s, trends, and online behavior

• Ability to handle difficult situations or users professionally

• Familiarity with 
 moderation tools and bots (e.g., MEE6, Dyno, Carl-bot, etc.)



Candidates with experience setting up or managing 
 bots, automation, or moderation tools may be considered for higher pay.



Work Setup



• Remote work

• Contract position

• Part-time / gig-based (hours vary based on activity and streams)

• Flexible schedule (may include evenings or weekends)



This role has the potential to transition into a longer-term position based on performance and team fit.



Compensation



Community Moderator (Entry Level)

• $1.00 – $2.00 USD per hour depending on experience

• Hours vary depending on activity and coverage needs



Candidates with strong 
 bot knowledge, automation experience, or advanced moderation skills may be considered at a higher rate.



The first 30 days will serve as a trial period to establish workflow and expectations.

Pay increases may be considered later based on performance and long-term collaboration.



How to Apply



Please include:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Any moderation or community experience

• Examples of servers or communities you have moderated (if available)

• A short answer to this question:



How would you handle a disruptive or toxic user in a 
 or stream chat?



Important



We are looking for genuine, thoughtful responses.



Applications that use AI-generated answers or fail to answer the question will be ignored.

title: Creator Outreach Specialist (Instagram DM — High Volume)
description:
Are you fast, organized, and great at finding the right people on Instagram — then starting real conversations with them?

We're hiring a full-time Creator Outreach Specialist to find and recruit UGC creators and micro-influencers for our DTC brand's affiliate program.

This is not a "send 10 messages a day" role.

You will be reaching out to 50+ creators per day with personalized DMs from our brand's Instagram account — and managing all replies until they're qualified and ready for onboarding.

If you're sharp at social media research, comfortable with high outreach volume, and can hold natural conversations in DMs — read on.

What You'll Be Doing



Research and identify creators on Instagram who match our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)

We will provide you with the exact ICP criteria — your job is to find creators who match it

Manually send personalized DMs from the brand's Instagram account (no bots, no automation tools)

Handle all replies: answer questions about the program, build interest, qualify fit

Log every contacted creator in Go High Level (CRM) with tags and status updates

Move creators through GHL pipeline stages as conversations progress:



Prospecting ? Contacted ? Replied ? Interested ? Ready to go





Run follow-up sequences on non-responders (1 follow-up DM after 3–5 days)

Keep a clean, up-to-date pipeline so our onboarding team knows exactly who is ready



Output Expectations (Very Important)

This role requires high daily output.

You should be comfortable delivering approximately:



50+ personalized creator outreach DMs per day

Managing 100+ active conversations in various stages at any time

Updating GHL pipeline statuses daily — no backlog, no missed contacts

Maintaining a 90%+ logging accuracy (every contact must be in GHL)



You must be:



Fast

Organized

Able to juggle high volume without dropping conversations



We are scaling — and speed matters.

Must-Have Skills



Strong Instagram research skills:



Finding creators by niche, hashtag, content style, engagement patterns

Quickly assessing follower quality (spotting fake followers, low engagement)

Understanding what "good content" looks like for product-based brands





Excellent English writing for DMs:



Natural, conversational tone — not robotic or salesy

Ability to personalize messages by referencing the creator's actual content

Comfortable handling objections and questions in a friendly way





CRM experience:



Familiar with pipeline-based CRMs (Go High Level preferred, but HubSpot, Pipedrive, or similar is fine)

Comfortable with tagging, status updates, and contact management





Self-management:



You track your own progress

You flag issues before they become problems

You don't need to be reminded to update the CRM







Bonus (Nice to Have)



Experience with influencer or creator outreach

Familiarity with DTC/e-commerce brands and UGC

Previous work with Go High Level specifically

Understanding of affiliate programs or performance marketing

Experience working with Scandinavian or European brands



Who You Are



You're a people person who can start conversations with strangers naturally

You move fast but don't sacrifice quality for speed

You're detail-oriented — every contact is logged, every status is updated

You can work independently without daily check-ins

You're reliable, show up on time, and communicate proactively

You understand that this is a volume role — and you thrive in that environment



Important Note

You will NOT be handling contracts, product shipments, or any technical setup.

Your job ends when you move a qualified, interested creator to the "Ready to go" status in GHL.

From there, our onboarding team takes over.

Your entire focus is: find the right creators, start the conversation, qualify them, and hand them off ready.

Job Details



Hours: 30–40 hrs/week (negotiable)

Long-term position

Fully remote

Payment: Monthly salary (based on experience)



How to Apply (Important)

???? Apply only via OnlineJobs.ph

When applying, you MUST include:



A short description of any outreach, lead gen, or DM-based work you've done before

Your expected monthly salary

Your availability (hours/week + timezone)



???? Subject line:

"Creator Outreach Specialist — High Volume DM"

Applications without relevant experience description will not be reviewed.

title: Creator Onboarding & Affiliate Coordinator (CRM + Shopify)
description:
Are you detail-oriented, process-driven, and comfortable managing multiple tools to onboard creators into a brand's affiliate program?

We're hiring a Creator Onboarding Coordinator to manage the full post-qualification pipeline — from sending contracts to getting creators fully set up and active in our affiliate system.

This is not a creative role. This is an operations role.

You will be managing contracts, setting up affiliate profiles, coordinating product shipments, and confirming Meta Partnership Ads access — all while keeping the CRM pipeline clean and up to date.

If you're the type of person who loves checklists, follows up relentlessly, and never lets a ball drop — read on.

What You'll Be Doing



Monitor the Go High Level (GHL) pipeline for creators who reach "Ready to go" status

These creators have already been qualified by our outreach team — your job starts here

Manage contract delivery:



Contracts are auto-sent via GHL/PandaDoc when status changes

You follow up on unsigned contracts (48h reminder, then personal follow-up)

Answer any questions creators have about the contract terms

Confirm contract is signed and move GHL status forward





Set up creators in UpPromote (Shopify affiliate app):



Add creator to the affiliate program

Ensure unique affiliate/discount code is generated

Send creator their portal login and code





Coordinate product delivery:



Ship product to creator OR confirm they used their discount code to self-purchase

Track shipment and confirm receipt

Update GHL status at each step





Handle Meta Partnership Ads (whitelisting) setup:



Send the Partnership Ads request from our Meta Ads Manager

Guide the creator through accepting the request in their Instagram app

Confirm access is live in Ads Manager





Send content brief once the creator has received the product and whitelisting is confirmed

Move creator to "Active" status — handoff to our ad ops/creative team



Output Expectations (Very Important)

This role requires careful pipeline management, not speed.

You should be comfortable managing:



15–25 creators in active onboarding at any given time

Processing 5–10 new "Ready to go" creators per week

Daily pipeline review — no creator should sit in a status for more than 48h without action

100% follow-through — every creator who signs a contract must reach "Active" status



You must be:



Thorough

Organized

Relentless with follow-ups

Comfortable managing multiple tools simultaneously



If something is stuck, you flag it. You don't wait.

Must-Have Skills



CRM management:



Comfortable with pipeline-based CRMs (Go High Level preferred, but similar tools work)

Tagging, status updates, follow-up scheduling, contact notes





Shopify basics:



Navigating Shopify admin to manage affiliate app (UpPromote)

Processing or confirming orders

You don't need to be a Shopify developer — just comfortable in the admin panel





Contract/document management:



Experience with PandaDoc, DocuSign, or similar e-signature tools

Following up on unsigned documents without being pushy





Clear written communication:



Professional, friendly English for creator-facing messages

Ability to explain simple technical steps (e.g., "how to accept Partnership Ads in Instagram")





Process management:



You can manage a checklist of 5–6 steps per creator without missing any

You keep clean notes in the CRM

You escalate issues before they become blockers







Bonus (Nice to Have)



Experience with affiliate marketing platforms (UpPromote, Refersion, GoAffPro, etc.)

Familiarity with Meta Business Manager or Ads Manager

Understanding of influencer/creator onboarding workflows

Previous work in DTC or e-commerce operations

Experience with Go High Level specifically



Who You Are



You're a natural operator — you love systems and processes

You're the person who follows up when others forget

You can manage 5 different tools without getting confused about what goes where

You communicate clearly when something is blocked or needs attention

You're reliable, consistent, and take ownership of your pipeline

You understand that your job is to get creators from "interested" to "active" with zero drop-off



Job Details



Hours: 20–30 hrs/week (negotiable, may increase as volume grows)

Long-term position

Fully remote

Payment: Monthly salary (based on experience)



How to Apply (Important)

???? Apply only via OnlineJobs.ph

When applying, you MUST include:



A short description of any operations, onboarding, or CRM management work you've done before

Any experience with Shopify, affiliate platforms, or contract management tools

Your expected monthly salary

Your availability (hours/week + timezone)



???? Subject line:

"Creator Onboarding Coordinator — CRM + Shopify"

Applications without relevant experience description will not be reviewed.

title: Fast Placement! VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: SEO & PPC Specialist
description:
Parking this:



 



SEO & PPC Specialist — Vertex Group



 



About Vertex Group



Vertex Group is a multi-brand organisation operating across Australia's NDIS, aged care, legal, and SaaS sectors. Our portfolio includes brands that serve NDIS participants, support providers, plan managers, compliance consultants, and aged care recipients. We are a remote-first team with people based across Australia, the Philippines, and Pakistan, united by a shared focus on making a real difference in the lives of people navigating complex care and support systems.



We are growing, and we are looking for a performance-driven SEO and Google Ads Specialist to join our marketing team and help our active brands scale.



The Role



As our SEO and PPC Specialist, you will manage search marketing across a portfolio of brands in the NDIS, aged care, legal, and SaaS sectors in Australia. Your primary focus is Google Ads — building, managing, and optimizing paid search campaigns that generate qualified leads and enquiries across our active brands. Your SEO knowledge supports your ads work by ensuring landing pages, keyword strategy, and conversion tracking are aligned across channels.



This is a full-time remote role. You will work closely with the Head of Marketing, the Marketing Coordinator, and the wider SEO team to deliver measurable results across multiple brands simultaneously.



Key Responsibilities



 



Google Ads



Build and manage Google Ads campaigns across search, display, and remarketing for four active brands

Optimize budgets to maximize ROAS across a combined monthly ad spend of AUD 10,000+

Conduct A/B testing on ad copy, creatives, and landing pages to improve conversion rates

Set up and maintain conversion tracking via Google Tag Manager and GA4

Conduct audience research and continuously refine targeting based on performance data

Identify underperforming campaigns and recommend budget reallocation before being asked

Produce weekly performance snapshots and monthly campaign reports for the Head of Marketing

SEO



Monitor on-page SEO health across active brand websites using Google Search Console and Semrush

Conduct keyword research to inform both paid targeting and organic content strategy

Identify landing page issues affecting Quality Score or conversion rates and flag them with recommended fixes

Collaborate with the SEO team on keyword ownership — paid versus organic — to avoid overlap and maximize coverage across both channels

Support technical SEO checks when landing pages are being built or updated for new campaigns

General



Work across multiple brands in different sectors — NDIS services, SaaS, compliance consulting, and aged care — adapting campaign strategy to different audiences and conversion goals

Collaborate with the Marketing Coordinator on campaign briefs, landing page update requests, and creative asset coordination

Contribute to the monthly marketing report submitted to the Head of Marketing

Stay current on Google Ads updates, algorithm changes, and industry best practices relevant to the Australian market

Participate in tea
etings and contribute ideas for improving campaign performance and marketing efficiency across the portfolio

What We're Looking For



Required



Hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns under direct ownership — not assisting, owning

Google Ads certified, or able to demonstrate equivalent practical knowledge

Proficient in GA4, Google Tag Manager, and Google Search Console

Experience running campaigns for service-based businesses — healthcare, professional services, SaaS, or similar

Comfortable managing multiple brand accounts simultaneously without losing attention to detail on any single one

Strong analytical mindset — you read data before drawing conclusions and back recommendations with numbers

Proactive communicator — you flag issues and opportunities without waiting to be asked

Available during Australian Eastern Time business hours

Nice to Have



Experience working across multi-brand or multi-sector businesses

Background in a digital marketing agency with direct client accountability for campaign performance

Google Ads certification or equivalent credentials

Familiarity with NDIS, disability services, aged care, or healthcare marketing in Australia

Experience with SaaS or professional services marketing targeting the Australian market

Knowledge of compliance considerations in regulated industries — legal, healthcare, or government-funded services

What We Offer



Full-time remote position based in the Philippines or Pakistan

Direct collaboration with the Head of Marketing in a lean, high-ownership team

A role where your decisions have immediate and visible impact on campaign performance across real brands

Exposure to a diverse brand portfolio across multiple sectors and audiences

Australian Eastern Time working hours with a stable, structured team environment

A clear reporting line with defined decision-making authority — no bureaucratic approval chains for day-to-day campaign decisions

Reporting Line and Working Pattern



Reports to: Head of Marketing

Fully remote — Philippines-based or Pakistan-based

Full-time position

Must be available during Australian Eastern Time business hours (AEST/AEDT)

description:

You will play a key role in shaping our online presence, managing content, and optimizing strategies to drive engagement and growth.

- Stay current on social media trends, platform updates, and best practices

Work Schedule & Compensation

- Part-time (10-20 hours per week)

Your updated resume

3. A brief cover letter included in the body of your

 Subject Line:

Social Media Manager_[Your First Name] [Your Last Name]

title: Phone call setter
description:
You MUST have credit repair experience.



If you do not have experience, you must be willing to be trained and pushed to perform at a high level.



This is a performance based role. You will be trained and expected to improve quickly.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



ALL QUALIFICATION AND NO SHOW RECOVERY SPECIALIST (REMOTE)



Your job is simple.



You will call leads who missed their appointment and get them back on the calendar.



You will find out why they did not show up.



You will requalify them and ensure they are serious and have the funds to move forward.



You will also call new leads within 1 to 5 minutes of their application.



You will confirm their answers from our application and make sure they are a good fit.



Only qualified leads should stay booked.



We already have a proven script and system.



Your job is to execute and help increase our show-up rate.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Strong English speaking and writing

Confident on the phone

High energy but still professional

Able to control conversations

Comfortable asking about money

Coachable and able to take feedback



Bonus if you have experience in credit repair or business funding.



COMPENSATION



Base pay plus performance bonuses

or performance based depending on experience



Top performers will earn more.



EXPECTATIONS



This is a performance based role.



You will be held to a high standard.



You will receive direct feedback and coaching.



If you are not serious about performing, do not apply.



GROWTH



There is room to grow in this role if you perform.



HOW TO APPLY



Send a Loom video.



In the video show how you would:



- Call a lead who missed their appointment

- Re qualify them

- Get them back on the calendar

title: Meta Ads Specialist — F&B / Catering Brand in Singapore (Remote)
description:
About Us

Raja’s Catering (Indian Cooked Food Catering Service Pte Ltd) is a Singapore-based South Indian catering company serving everyday catering orders, festive events, and premium dining experiences. We are part of the Alangkaar Group of Companies, a multi-brand conglomerate that has delivered over 11,200 events across 5 countries.



The Role

We are looking for a remote Meta Ads Specialist to manage all
 and Instagram advertising for 
’s Catering. You will be responsible for generating WhatsApp leads for catering orders through paid social campaigns. This is a dedicated, ongoing role — not a one-off project.



What You Will Do

• Plan, build, and manage Meta Ads campaigns 
 and Instagram) for a catering brand targeting Singapore audiences

• Create and test ad creatives (images, carousels, short-form video) — basic design capability is a plus

• Set up and optimise Click-to-WhatsApp campaigns as the primary lead generation method

• Manage audience targeting, retargeting, and lookalike audiences for Singaporean Indian and Malay/Muslim households

• Monitor and optimise campaigns daily for cost-per-lead and return on ad spend

• Deliver a weekly performance report every Monday (template will be provided)

• Coordinate with our team on festive and seasonal campaign launches (Deepavali, Pongal, Hari Raya, etc.)



Requirements

• Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience managing Meta Ads 
 and Instagram)

• Experience running ads specifically for food, restaurant, catering, or F&B businesses (not just e-commerce or SaaS)

• Proven track record of at least SGD 30,000 (or equivalent) in lifetime managed ad spend in the F&B or events space

• Strong understanding of Meta Pixel, conversion tracking, and Click-to-WhatsApp campaign setup

• Ability to create or edit basic ad creatives (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)

• Excellent written English for ad copy and weekly reporting

• Available to overlap with Singapore business hours (SGT) for at least 3–4 hours daily



Budget and Compensation

• Monthly ad budget you will manage: SGD 2,000–3,000 (scaling based on performance)

• Your retainer: SGD 1,200–1,800/month depending on experience (with performance bonus opportunity)

• This starts with a paid 2-week trial (SGD 250–350 + ad budget provided)



To Apply — Submit All Three Within 48 Hours

1. A Loom video (3–5 minutes) walking through one F&B campaign you have managed — show us the Ads Manager, explain your strategy, and share the results

2. A screenshot of your Ads Manager dashboard showing real spend and results from an F&B or events campaign

3. A short paragraph (5–10 sentences) on how you would structure a Meta Ads campaign for a South Indian catering company targeting customers in Singapore



Applications missing any of the above three items will not be considered.

description:
The IT Quality Assurance role has ended up being 99% focused on Quality Assurance (QA) rather than audits. It is responsible for ensuring that IT systems and processes are consistently monitored and improved in alignment with MAG’s standards and industry regulations. Responsibilities include performing detailed tests to identify and resolve system bugs, developing and maintaining automated test scripts, and providing expert and technical audits.



An ability to be an expert in problem-solving, critical thinking, and an understanding of complex system dependencies are essential in enabling the IT Manager to show where My Amazon Guy processes are broken and how those processes are affecting key data points. An individual with a strong passion to solve problems and improve data integrity will excel in this position.



Key Responsibilities:

- Ensure proper prioritization of tasks is observed, and assignments are properly actioned and handled per MAG standards.

- Proactively contribute to providing strategies for work quality advancements.

- Collaborate with IT Devs to ensure testing and observation of solutions add value to end users.

- Ensure all fields in tasks have met the standard requirement of the team.

- Perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA) on complex system issues.

- Act as a Cross-Departmental Unblocker by managing tasks such as workflow automations.

- Create templates and initiatives to improve QA process efficiency across the organization.

- Coordinate and generate independent test cases for each newly developed application/system.

- Manage QA IT projects during each phase, ensuring all tasks are reviewed for quality assurance.

- Communicate and recommend improvements to the functionality, design, and usability of new systems/applications.

- Ensure all work projects are compliant with the company’s standards.

- Serve as the final line of defense to ensure IT solutions meet end users’ requests.



Reporting & Growth:

- Reports to the IT Team Lead / IT Manager.

- Expected to manage multiple tasks independently while maintaining high-quality standards.

- Opportunities to contribute across departments and help improve organizational processes.



Qualifications:

- At least 3 years of relevant experience in IT quality assurance and audit roles.

- Strong understanding of quality assurance principles, methodologies, and best practices.

- Hands-on experience with No-Code/Low-Code platforms, such as Zapier, Google Workspace, JotForms, HubSpot, PandaDoc, and AirTable.

- Knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, and API integration.

- Experience with Asana or similar project management tools for task and project tracking.

- Familiarity with software testing techniques, tools, and defect-tracking systems.

- Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

- Ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a team environment.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Ready to transform the way we work and drive real results? If this role excites you, don’t wait—apply today and be part of a team where your ideas make a difference.



Questions or need to follow up? Contact us at

title: Senior UGC Video Editor Needed (Full-Time)
description:

We need short-form video editors who are exceptional, period. You must live and breathe editing.







If you’re not constantly pushing for better, this isn’t for you.







We expect top-tier performance, fresh ideas, and relentless attention to detail in everything you do.







If you’re not aiming to be the best, don’t waste your time.

Candidates must be fluent in English

Minimum of 2+ years of experience in related fields

Experience creating fast-paced content for Meta, Shorts, and TikTok - you should know how to make it grab attention immediately and how to keep it.

Creating fast-paced content that grabs attention

Ability to use AI tools such as audio enhancement, ElevenLabs, ChatGPT

Experience using software such as Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects

Experience with scripted content

Excellent knowledge of TikTok/Meta/YouTube trends.





HOW TO APPLY: If you believe we're the right fit, please fill in this form: 







WHY WORK WITH US



Serious Pay: You’ll be compensated well, because we only hire the best.

Creative editing freedom: You will have creative control over your projects. We want our media to be fresh, innovative, and unique.

Flexible Hours: You work when it suits you, but we expect results, but meeting deadlines is essential. This is a full-time role. (And you will be expected to give your absolute best every single day. Great is not good enough.)





ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS



Experience in the medical field is a plus.

Strong attention to detail in advertising.

Familiarity with current editing trends.

Ability to harmonize visual elements with audio design and effectively use VFX.

Graphic Design

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description:
Digital Marketing Manager



We are seeking a results-driven Digital Marketing Manager to lead and execute B2B demand generation and lead generation initiatives in a fast-paced agency environment. This is a highly hands-on role that blends strategy with execution, ideal for someone who understands what campaigns to run, how to optimize them, and how to drive measurable pipeline growth.



Key Responsibilities:

- Plan, execute, and optimize B2B demand generation and lead generation campaigns. 

- Develop marketing strategies and high-converting ad copy across digital channels. 

- Own campaign execution: identify what campaigns to run, when to run them, and how to scale them effectively. 

- Manage and optimize campaigns using platforms such as HubSpot, Instantly, Active Campaign, Ahrefs, and more. 

- Build and maintain B2B agency nurturing workflows to improve lead quality and conversion. 

- Execute and refine on-page and backend technical SEO strategies to improve organic visibility and performance. 

- Analyze campaign performance and continuously optimize for ROI and pipeline growth. 

- Collaborate cross-functionally to align marketing efforts with business goals. 



Qualifications:

- Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital marketing (B2B preferred; agency experience is a plus).

- Strong expertise in B2B demand generation, lead generation, and nurturing strategies. 

- Proven track record of driving qualified leads and revenue growth. 

- Solid understanding of on-page SEO and broader SEO principles. 

- Hands-on experience with marketing platforms such as HubSpot, Instantly, Active Campaign, Ahrefs, and more (or similar tools).

- Strong ability to develop marketing strategy and ad copy that converts. 

- Highly analytical, with a data-driven approach to decision-making. 

- Self-starter with a strong sense of ownership, accountability, and execution. 



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

title: Creative Generalist & Creative Strategist
description:
CREATIVE GENERALIST



We’re hiring a Creative Generalist with strong design and video editing chops to produce compelling visual assets for our paid media campaigns, landing pages, and brand communication. This hybrid role supports 2–3 DTC brands to start and is perfect for someone who thrives on fast-paced creative production, balancing aesthetics with performance goals. You’ll be responsible for creating everything from static ads and animated social assets to UGC edits and conversion-driven landing page graphics.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design static, motion, and video ad creatives for Meta, TikTok, and Google

- Edit high-performing UGC ads with strong hooks, CTAs, captions, and transitions

- Repurpose testimonials, reviews, and influencer content for paid and organic use

- Create
, SMS, and promotional visuals aligned with brand identity

- Stylize social proof assets (e.g., screenshots, quotes) into branded, engaging formats

- Follow platform-specific best practices for ad creatives

- Ensure design supports performance goals like ROAS and CAC

- Maintain brand consistency across diverse formats and placements

- Collaborate with media buyers, marketers, and creatives to meet campaign goals

- Stay current with trends in ad design and DTC creative performance



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design and video editing for digital marketing.

- Advanced skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

- Proven experience creating high-converting static and motion ads for Meta, TikTok, or Google.

- Strong eye for layout, color, typography, and brand consistency.

- Experience editing UGC and social proof content for performance-driven campaigns.

- Able to follow creative briefs, meet tight deadlines, and collaborate well with remote teams.

- Portfolio demonstrating versatility across static design, motion, and video editing.





-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





CREATIVE STRATEGIST



The Creative Strategist will own the research, ideation, and optimization of creative assets across paid ads,
/SMS, landing pages, and UGC. They'll translate brand goals, market data, and consumer psychology into briefs, scripts, and testing roadmaps, partnering with designers, editors, media buyers, and UGC creators to execute.



This role focuses on conversion optimization and creative direction — guiding creative generalists, reviewing and approving output, and ensuring all creatives are aligned with CRO goals. The strategist does not handle direct web design, but must have strong CRO experience to boost campaign effectiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze client creative performance, benchmark competitors, and identify positioning and messaging opportunities across the full funnel.

- Develop creative roadmaps for DTC brands, concept new hooks and angles, and build testing frameworks across multiple ad formats.

- Create detailed UGC briefs, collaborate with creators through production, and curate social proof for ads and owned channels.

- Partner with media buyers and cross-functional teams to ensure creative aligns with funnel stages, KPIs, and brand standards.

- Guide creative generalists and support
/SMS and CRO-focused landing page strategy without executing web design.

- Track and interpret performance data, document insights, and iterate continuously to optimize campaigns.

- Present strategies, testing plans, and performance recaps to clients and internal leadership to support retention and revenue goals.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and creative strategy for digital marketing.

- Ability to analyze creative performance metrics and translate data insights into actionable design or messaging improvements.

- Strong leadership and feedback skills to guide generalists and align creative output with performance goals.

- Ability to drive creative decisions that enhance campaign effectiveness and conversion rates.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Ready to take your skills to the next level? If this role feels like the right fit for you, don’t wait—apply today and join a team where your impact truly matters.

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative
description:
This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent WFH setup

- Unlimited FREE access to MAG School courses and SOP Library!

- Work schedule is in EST (Monday-Friday only)

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Why wait for permission to level up? Apply now and step into a role where your skills are truly valued.

title: Website SEO Specialist
description:
The Website SEO Specialist leads the charge in optimizing our website's performance and driving the growth of organic traffic. As part of this role, you'll be at the forefront of boosting our online visibility and attaining top search engine rankings. We're looking for someone with a strategic mindset, a profound enthusiasm for SEO, and an unyielding dedication to delivering measurable outcomes. An SEO Specialist will play a pivotal role in refining our online presence to achieve unmatched success.



If you're a strategic thinker with a passion for SEO and a drive for results, we want you on our team. Join us as a Website SEO Specialist and play a key role in optimizing our online presence for success. Apply now to embark on a rewarding career in digital marketing with us!



Key Responsibilities:

- Conduct thorough keyword research to pinpoint pertinent search terms and optimization prospects.

- Enhance website content, meta tags, headings, and URLs to boost search engine visibility and enhance user experience.

- Carry out technical audits to detect and rectify issues affecting website crawlability, indexing, and ranking.

- Formulate and implement strategies for building links to obtain top-tier backlinks and enhance domain authority.

- Work closely with content creators to optimize website content for both search engines and user interaction.

- Monitor and analyze website performance metrics, keep track of keyword rankings, and compile routine SEO reports for stakeholders.



Qualifications:

- Preferably has 2 years of experience previously working at an SEO Agency.

- Proven experience in SEO, with a strong track record of improving search engine rankings and driving organic traffic.

- In-depth knowledge of SEO tools and techniques, including keyword research tools, SEO auditing tools, and analytics platforms.

- Familiarity with HTML, CSS, and website CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress, Shopify) for implementing technical SEO optimizations.

- Strong analytical skills and attention to detail, with the ability to interpret data and draw actionable insights.

- Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work cross-functionally with content creators, developers, and marketing teams.

- SEO certification or relevant training courses is a plus.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

title: Business Analyst
description:
We are seeking a highly strategic, tech-forward Business Analyst to serve as the connective tissue between stakeholders, operations, and IT execution. This role is responsible for identifying business bottlenecks, architecting scalable system solutions, and driving technology initiatives that elevate performance across the entire organization.



This is not a passive documentation role. This person must think like an operator.



The ideal candidate understands Agency operations deeply, sees operational inefficiencies before they become problems, and can translate business complexity into executable IT projects. Amazon account management, listing optimization, and PPC experience is a strong asset. They must be comfortable challenging assumptions, aligning leadership on priorities, and guiding technical teams toward high-impact outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Lead discovery sessions to uncover operational constraints and workflow inefficiencies.

- Analyze processes end-to-end, mapping current and future workflows for scalability.

- Translate business challenges into project charters, requirements, and actionable plans.

- Collaborate with IT to validate feasibility, manage resources, and oversee execution.

- Enhance systems, dashboards, CRMs, and cross-platform integrations for efficiency.

- Develop scalable SOPs, optimize workflows, and increase output without adding headcount.

- Serve as liaison between technical and non-technical teams, driving alignment and supporting change management.

- Strong working knowledge of Amazon Seller Central and/or Vendor Central operations

- Proven experience leading cross-functional IT initiatives from discovery to launch

- Strong documentation and process-mapping skills

- Excellent executive-level communication and stakeholder management skills

- Strategic thinker with the ability to balance short-term fixes with long-term scalability

title: Marketing Automation Specialist
description:
The Marketing Automation Specialist will own, rebuild, and scale My Amazon Guy’s marketing infrastructure, with a primary focus on HubSpot architecture, lifecycle automation, attribution clarity, and governance standards. This is a systems-first, hands-on role responsible for transforming our CRM and marketing automation ecosystem into a clean, scalable, revenue-driving engine. This is not a brand marketing or campaign execution role. This is a technical marketing systems leadership position focused on structure, integrity, and long-term scalability.



Key Responsibilities:

- Audit, clean, and restructure CRM data, workflows, lifecycle stages, and automation

- Remove deprecated assets, deduplicate records, and eliminate redundant processes

- Establish clear lifecycle definitions, segmentation logic, and governance standards

- Build intent-based segmentation and automated journeys tied to revenue movement

- Align marketing automation with sales handoffs and outbound outreach

- Prevent overlapping messaging and ensure accurate intent-driven actions

- Standardize tracking, UTMs, and attribution across marketing and sales platforms

- Improve visibility into MQL ? SQL ? Opportunity progression and reporting accuracy

- Reduce unnecessary broadcast activity and reporting ambiguity

- Implement request protocols, documentation, and long-term system governance



Qualifications:

- 5+ years in Marketing Operations, RevOps, or Marketing Technology

- Deep, hands-on HubSpot experience (required)

- Proven experience cleaning and restructuring complex CRM environments

- Strong understanding of paid media funnels and conversion tracking

- Experience with lifecycle marketing, lead scoring, and segmentation frameworks

- Experience building or restructuring automation systems

- Comfortable enforcing governance and setting system standards

- Experience working with distributed teams (Filipino team experience preferred)



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

title: DSP Strategist
description:

- Strong understanding of DSP platforms, programmatic media, and performance marketing principles.

- Excellent analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable marketing insights.

title: Content Manager Needed (Full-Time)
description:
WHO ARE WE?



We’re Nooro - a fast-growing app company operating alongside a highly profitable eCommerce business, doing over $100M per year.

If you’re sharp, dependable, and excited to help organize and scale a serious creative engine, we’d love to hear from you.





WHAT WE EXPECT?



Reliability - You are hardworking, independent, and operate well under pressure.

title: Amazon Brand Manager & Brand Manager Intern
description:
AMAZON BRAND MANAGER



We are looking for a talented and versatile Amazon Brand Manager! If you think that you have what it takes to be successful in this role, we welcome you to apply!



Do you like going from one meeting to another with non-stop action and solving problems every day while managing 8 people? Where you are trying to please clients and juggling tons of competing priorities? If so, this is the job for you.



Brand Managers own the relationships at our agency. It’s your job to make customers like us while delivering our team’s accurate non-stop activities.



Responsibilities:

- Manage clients' accounts assigned. The Brand Manager will act as the direct point of contact for the client, responsible for coordinating MAGs services, implementing strategy, communicating with clients, direct reports, and leadership.

- 2+ Direct Reports. In addition to client services, this position is also a managerial position, and following the completion of training, brand managers will be expected to lead a small team of Amazon specialists, who will assist the manager with delivering MAG services to the client.

- Brand managers are the company's backbone, directly responsible for our client accounts.

- Proactively provide a strategy for the account, communicate with the client, and ensure MAG process and deliverables are met.

- Delegate tasks properly to your direct reports and the MAG teams, follow up on delegations, hold staff accountable, and report back to the client.



Qualifications:

- Amazon Expertise: 1+ year with Seller Central (flat files, FBA, PPC, SEO, reinstatements, brand registry, Helium10, keyword research).

- Agency & Management: Experience handling multiple demands, leading teams, hiring, and performance management.

- Project & Client Management: Skilled in multitasking, project management, client communication, and account ownership.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with tools like Zoom, Slack, Asana, and adapting in fast-changing environments.

- Passion for eCommerce: Independent, people-focused, and driven to grow client sales on Amazon.



Expectations:

- Competitive salary!

- Fun Fully Remote Culture – Community Culture, Team Oriented Environment

- You can have your OWN Amazon selling business and utilize company resources to build your own account! We love and ? encourage entrepreneurs, in fact, the majority of employees have their own selling accounts!

- Unlimited Learning and Growth – If you meet and exceed our core values and grow sales, you will have unlimited opportunities to grow, advance, promote, and earn more.

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- Permanent WFH setup

- The work schedule is in Eastern Standard Time (Monday to Friday only)

- A dual-monitor setup is required (at least 8GB of RAM)

- Good quality camera and microphone

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Must consistently maintain good performance and seek skills development for professional growth.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





AMAZON BRAND MANAGER INTERN



Want to catapult out of that “Walmart uniform” and into a world of digital marketing?



We're hiring a Brand Manager Intern at our agency. If you're a tech-savvy gamer who thrives amidst organized chaos, then you are the one that we are looking for!



We will train you how to manage people effectively, communicate better with clients, and navigate tools such as Slack smoothly, while you work at home on your computer. You also get to learn how to sell on Amazon which is the number 1 wealth generation platform in the USA for beginners.



Here's what you'd be doing with us:

- Mastermind core services like PPC, SEO, Design, Catalog merchandising, and troubleshoot like a pro.

- Take charge of at least 8-10 accounts in Seller Central Accounts under a Brand Manager.

- Be the communication bridge between clients and our agency.

- Train and mentor at least 2 AS Intern/BM Intern.



Yes, it's challenging. Yes, it's exciting. Yes, it could be the start of your new career!



We will train you on everything. MAG is an education company and we find it’s easier to find the right culture fit and then train the skills than the other way around.



We're looking for:

- High Drive

- Friendly Introverts

- Strategic Communication Skills

- Ability to take charge, and follow through on a plan



So what are you waiting for? Toss away that nametag and make the switch today.



Expectations:

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

title: INSTAGRAM POSTER — 4 ACCOUNTS (REMOTE)
description:
============================================

INSTAGRAM POSTER -- 4 ACCOUNTS (REMOTE)

============================================



THE ROLE

We're a fast-moving content agency managing multiple Instagram accounts

and we're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented person to join our

remote team long-term.



Your job is simple: post pre-made content (stories, reels, feed posts)

across 4 Instagram accounts daily -- all content is prepared and ready

for you. No creativity required, no guesswork. Just clean, consistent

execution from wherever you are.



The first 3 days are a structured onboarding. After that, you work

independently -- as long as content goes up on time, you manage your

own day.



============================================

WHAT YOU'LL DO

============================================

- Post pre-made content daily across 4 accounts (2 per phone)

- Follow our step-by-step guides -- everything is documented

- Send a short daily check-in: what went up, anything to flag

- Stay in touch with the team and flag issues as they happen



============================================

WHAT MAKES THIS A GOOD FIT

============================================

- Fully remote -- work from anywhere, no commute, no office

- Stable monthly income paid in USDC (crypto) -- reliable and fast

- Everything is provided -- content, guides, schedule, support

- You're part of a structured team that invests in your growth

- Long-term role -- we train you properly and want you to stay



============================================

WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU

============================================

- 2 iPhones with unlimited mobile data on both devices

- Available daily including weekends (posting runs 7 days/week)

- Someone who follows a process precisely and takes it seriously

- Proactive communicator -- daily updates are part of the job

- Basic Instagram knowledge (stories, reels, feed posts)

- Open to feedback and able to apply it quickly



============================================

WHAT WE PROVIDE

============================================

- All content ready to post (images, videos, captions)

- Step-by-step guides for every task

- Day 1-3 structured onboarding

- Ongoing team support and training



============================================

IDEAL CANDIDATE

============================================

You enjoy structured, routine work and take pride in doing it right.

You don't need to be micromanaged -- you just show up, get it done,

and communicate clearly. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear

from you.



============================================

COMPENSATION

============================================

Competitive monthly rate, paid in USDC (crypto).

Discussed during interview based on location & experience.



============================================

HOW TO APPLY

============================================

Send us a short message with:



1. Your location and timezone

2. Confirm you have 2 iPhones with unlimited mobile data

3. Your Instagram experience (personal use counts)

4. Your availability -- can you post daily including weekends?

5. Why you'd be a good fit for this kind of role



============================================

title: FULL TIME Video Editor
description:
We're looking for an AI Video Editor to grow with us long-term.



We're a small, focused ecommerce operation managing multiple brands in the health and beauty space. We move fast, we're hands-on, and we're building something serious. This isn't a corporate job - it's a role where your work directly impacts the business every single day.



What you'll be doing:

- Generating AI avatar videos for ads using tools like HeyGen, Kling, Runway, or similar

- Lip syncing and animating images to create realistic, high-quality video content

- Using Gemini and other AI generation tools to produce high-quality content consistently

What we need from you:

Compensation:

You'll start on an hourly rate. As the role grows, you move to a fixed monthly salary plus performance bonuses - every video that performs well earns you more. There's no ceiling on what you can make if your work delivers results. We also provide all the tools and training resources you need to do the job at the highest level.

title: Social-First Video Editor for Creators & Personal Brands
description:
THE ROLE: Social-First Editing With Ownership



I’m looking for a professional Video Editor who thrives on autonomy. This is a flexible remote role. I don’t believe in micro-management or tracking your every move. You’ll have the flexibility to manage your own schedule, as long as the work is strong and deadlines are hit.



This role is for someone who can do more than simply cut clips together. You’ll be editing Instagram Reels and TikTok videos for creator-led client accounts, working from raw footage, content ideas and strategic direction. 



At the start, there will be support on the strategy side, but over time I want someone who can take ownership of the edit itself, make strong creative decisions independently, and turn footage into content that feels sharp, engaging, premium and platform-native.



You should be comfortable reviewing footage, spotting the strongest 
nts, shaping the structure of the video, and feeding back on what footage would be more useful to capture next time so the content gets better over time.



The types of creators and niches we work across are primarily:



?  lifestyle

?  motorsport

?  sport

?  media

?  business

?  education



That means the editor needs range. Some edits need to feel internet-native, clever and engaging. Others need to feel cinematic, premium and more restrained.





THE VIBE: HIGH STANDARDS, SPEED AND GOOD JUDGEMENT



This role offers flexibility, but it is still a serious position with real standards.



The pace

I’m looking for someone who wants to build speed and efficiency over time. Fast turnaround and strong judgement matter here.



The pressure

Most days are smooth, but this can be a fast-moving environment when multiple edits land at once or deadlines get tight. I need someone who stays level-headed, communicates clearly and keeps standards high.



The standard

I’m looking for someone who understands short-form content, not just editing software. You should know what makes a Reel or TikTok work in terms of pacing, hooks, captions, structure, retention, visual stimulation and clarity.



---



WHAT I’M LOOKING FOR VISUALLY



I do NOT want generic talking-head edits, basic auto-captions, or lazy podcast-style clipping.



I’m looking for an editor who understands how to make creator-led social content feel intentional, engaging and premium.



Broadly, the styles I like sit across 3 lanes:



1) Personable infotainment



Educational or opinion-led talking-head videos that use interpreted captions, visual aids, 
s, cultural references, pop-up imagery, split screens and supporting B-roll to keep retention high.



2) Cinematic and kinetic



Premium, high-energy edits where the footage is elevated through pacing, motion, masking, sound design, subtle transitions and strong visual rhythm.



3) Soft cinematic



Minimal, premium edits where the footage is already strong and the editor knows how to enhance it through restraint, timing and polish rather than over-editing.



---



REQUIRED EDITING CAPABILITIES AND STYLE



Advanced mixed-media compositing



You must be highly skilled at integrating pop-culture imagery, 
s, historical images, relevant screenshots and visual aids into talking-head footage.



This includes clean 50/50 split-screen layouts where one side may contain the speaker and the other side may contain supporting footage, imagery or visual explanation.



Interpreted copywriting and typography



I do not want automated, word-for-word captions.



You must be able to listen to the audio, understand the core point being made, and create punchy, summarised on-screen text that strengthens the idea.



A lot of the edits I like use two distinct fonts to create contrast and hierarchy. The text should feel designed, not auto-generated.



Strong visual judgement



You need to know when an edit needs pop-up images, 
s, relevant B-roll, cultural references, cleaner negative space, minimalism, faster pacing or slower cinematic breathing room.



I am not looking for someone who applies the same editing formula to every video.



High-end social editing



You should know how to make standard footage feel better than it is.



That may involve clean masking, subject isolation, dynamic text placement, subtle zooms, motion blur, stronger pacing, tasteful overlays, stronger shot selection, polished transitions and elevated sound design.



Dynamic sound design



Your edits should sound as good as they look.



You should know how to use sound to support the viewing experience, whether that’s subtle UI pops, soft whooshes, crisp transitions, stronger impacts, risers, or more restrained natural Foley depending on the style of video.



Adaptable pacing



Some videos need speed, stimulation and density. Others need confidence, restraint and room to breathe.



You need to understand the difference and edit accordingly.



---



REFERENCE STYLES



Below are five reference reels that reflect the level and style I’m looking for.



These are not here for you to copy shot-for-shot. They are here to show the level of editing taste, pacing, layout, visual interpretation and overall aesthetic I want.



Reference 1 — Personable infotainment



I like this because the images pop up in direct relation to what’s being discussed. It is not the most technically complex edit, but it is highly engaging. The images take up meaningful space on screen, the captions use two fonts, and the use of 
s, cultural imagery and supporting visuals really helps bring the idea to life. This works especially well for creator clients trying to educate in an entertaining way.







Reference 2 — Personable infotainment



Again, this is a relatively simple edit, but it’s effective. The split between talking head and supporting footage works well. I also like that the text is not simply repeating the speaker word-for-word. It interprets and expands on the point, which means the editor needs to actually understand the message, not just transcribe it.




==



Reference 3 — Soft cinematic



I like how cinematic this feels. The footage already does a lot of the heavy lifting, but the edit enhances it through subtle transitions, pacing and polish rather than overdoing it.




==



Reference 4 — Cinematic and kinetic



I like the animations here, the pacing, and the way the cinematic footage is elevated through post-production. It feels premium without feeling messy.




==



Reference 5 — Cinematic B-roll-led content



This is the kind of B-roll-led video style I want some clients making. It’s a lighter lift for the creator when it comes to filming, but the magic is in the edit.




==



---



READ THIS BEFORE APPLYING



Be honest with yourself before applying.



If you do NOT think you can edit to the level of the references above, DO NOT APPLY.



If your current sample work does NOT compare to the level, taste, pacing or execution of the reference work above, do not apply.



If your work is mainly generic podcast clipping, basic captions, low-effort reels, slow flat edits, or templated short-form that all looks the same, DO NOT APPLY.



I am looking for someone whose current level is already close to the standard shown above or has shown potential to achieve this.



This is deliberate. I want to save both your time and mine.



---



COMPENSATION AND TERMS



Salary: $700 USD per month (negotiable)

Payment: Paid consistently on the last Friday of every month

Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible working hours

Turnaround: Same-day turnaround preferred, 24 hours maximum unless agreed otherwise in advance

Equipment: You must have your own professional editing setup and hardware

Start date: Immediate start preferred



---



## TIMELINE



I am looking to move quickly.



The job advert will be closed within the next 24 hours.

A final decision will be made by Friday at 5pm UK Time.



If you are genuinely interested, you will need to be PROACTIVE. Do not send a vague message and disappear. Send the right examples, follow the instructions properly, and make it easy for me to assess you quickly.



---



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS — READ CAREFULLY



I want to see your talent, not a document.



DO NOT send me a CV or resume. CVs will be dismissed immediately.



To apply, please send:



1) Exactly 5 links to your best work



No more than 5. No fewer than 5. No general portfolio links.



I want the FIVE pieces of work you believe are the closest match to the style and quality level referenced above.



2) A short note explaining why you chose those 5 examples



Keep it brief. I want to understand your judgement and taste.



3) A sentence confirming your availability



Please confirm whether you would be able to start immediately.



4) Your editing software stack



Tell me what you edit with.



If you cannot follow these instructions properly, this role is probably not the right fit.



---



WHAT GOOD APPLICATIONS WILL SHOW



The strongest applicants will usually show some mix of:



? talking-head edits

? educational or insight-led content

? split-screen or mixed-media edits

? fast-paced creator content

? cinematic B-roll-led work

? strong text hierarchy and on-screen design

? evidence of good pacing and good judgement



---



FINAL NOTE



This role is for someone who wants ownership, speed, creative responsibility and clear standards.



If your work already looks and feels close to the references above, apply.



If your work DOESN'T already looks and feels close to the references above, BUT you believe with the right opportunity you can achieve that level of production, then apply.



If neither of the above, don’t.



Thanks,



Phil

title: HubSpot Developer
description:
Ultra Labs is searching for a proactive, highly organized Marketing Manager to support and strengthen our marketing operations across multiple projects and brands. Ultra Labs is a U.S.–based Business Incubator/Accelerator focused on software and tech-driven businesses.



**What You'll Work On**

- Porting React/Tailwind pages (built in Lovable) into HubSpot CMS as standalone module projects

- Building and maintaining HubSpot workflows, sequences, and dashboards

- Writing HubSpot module code using React — Component, fields, and meta exports

- Handling interactivity via HubSpot islands architecture

- Supporting ongoing CMS updates across our marketing sites



**You Need to Know**

- React (JSX, hooks, component structure)

- HubSpot CMS — standalone project setup, hs CLI, hs project upload/deploy

- HubSpot Marketing Hub — workflows, sequences, lists, dashboards

- Tailwind CSS

- Git basics



**Nice to Have**

- HubSpot CMS Developer certification

- Experience with HubSpot CRM contact/deal pipelines

- Familiarity with HubL templating



**You Are NOT a Fit If**

- Your HubSpot experience is only certifications with no shipped modules

- You've never written React outside of a no-code tool

- You need step-by-step direction on standard HubSpot tasks



**To Apply**

Skip the cover letter. 

Send:

1. A link to a HubSpot module you built (Design Manager or project-based)

2. Your answer to this question — no more than 5 sentences:

   ? *"You're given a React + Tailwind component from Lovable. Walk me through how you move it into HubSpot CMS as a standalone module project."

3. Your rate (hourly or monthly) and availability

title: LinkedIn Outreach Specialist — Own Infrastructure Required
